titles.arabic: كتاب الشعر

titles.english: The Book of Virtues

titles.arabic: كتاب فضائل الصحابة رضى الله تعالى عنهم
titles.english: The Book of the Merits of the Companions

titles.english: The Book of Destiny

titles.english: The Book of Knowledge

titles.english: The Book Pertaining to the Remembrance of Allah, Supplication, Repentance and Seeking Forgiveness

titles.arabic: كتاب الرقاق
titles.english: The Book of Heart-Melting Traditions

titles.arabic: كتاب التوبة
titles.english: The Book of Repentance

titles.arabic: كتاب صفات المنافقين وأحكامهم
titles.english: Characteristics of The Hypocrites And Rulings Concerning Them

titles.arabic: كتاب صفة القيامة والجنة والنار
titles.english: Characteristics of the Day of Judgment, Paradise, and Hell

titles.arabic: كتاب الجنة وصفة نعيمها وأهلها
titles.english: The Book of Paradise, its Description, its Bounties and its Inhabitants

titles.arabic: كتاب الفتن وأشراط الساعة
titles.english: The Book of Tribulations and Portents of the Last Hour

titles.arabic: كتاب الزهد والرقائق
titles.english: The Book of Zuhd and Softening of Hearts

titles.arabic: كتاب التفسير
titles.english: The Book of Commentary on the Qur'an

titles.arabic: باب بيان الإيمان والإسلام والإحسان ووجوب الإيمان بإثبات قدر الله سبحانه وتعالى وبيان الدليل على التبري ممن لا يؤمن بالقدر وإغلاظ القول في حقه
titles.english: Chapter: Explaining Al-Iman (Faith), Al-Islam, and Al-Ihsan, and The Obligations of Al-Iman With Affirmation of The Qadar of Allah, Glorious And Most High is He. And Explaining The Evidence For Declaring One's Innocence Of One Who Does Not Believe In Al-Qadar, And Having A Harsh View Of His Case

titles.arabic: باب الإِيمَانُ مَا هُوَ وَبَيَانُ خِصَالِهِ
titles.english: Chapter: What is Al-Iman (Faith)? Explaining Its Characteristics

titles.arabic: باب الإِسْلاَمُ مَا هُوَ وَبَيَانُ خِصَالِهِ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: What is Islam? Explaining its characteristics.

titles.arabic: باب بَيَانِ الصَّلَوَاتِ الَّتِي هِيَ أَحَدُ أَرْكَانِ الإِسْلاَمِ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: Explaining the prayers which are one of the pillars of Islam

titles.arabic: باب السُّؤَالِ عَنْ أَرْكَانِ الْإِسْلَامِ
titles.english: Chapter: Asking about the pillars of Islam

titles.arabic: باب بَيَانِ الإِيمَانِ الَّذِي يُدْخَلُ بِهِ الْجَنَّةُ وَأَنَّ مَنْ تَمَسَّكَ بِمَا أُمِرَ بِهِ دَخَلَ الجَنَّةَ
titles.english: Chapter: Explaining the faith by means of which a person is admitted into paradise, and that the one who adheres to what is enjoined upon him will enter paradise

titles.arabic: باب بَيَانِ أَرْكَانِ الْإِسْلَامِ وَدَعَائِمِهِ الْعِظَامِ
titles.english: Chapter: Clarifying the pillars of Islam and its grand supports

titles.arabic: باب الْأَمْرِ بِالْإِيمَانِ بِاللَّهِ تَعَالَى وَرَسُولِهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ وَشَرَائِعِ الدِّينِ
titles.english: Chapter: The command to believe in Allah and His Messenger (saws) and the laws of Islam, calling people to it, asking about it, memorizing it and conveying it to those who have not heard the message

titles.arabic: باب الدُّعَاءِ إِلَى الشَّهَادَتَيْنِ وَشَرَائِعِ الإِسْلاَمِ
titles.english: Chapter: Calling people to the twin declaration of faith and the laws of Islam

titles.arabic: باب الأَمْرِ بِقِتَالِ النَّاسِ حَتَّى يَقُولُوا لاَ إِلَهَ إِلاَّ اللَّهُ مُحَمَّدٌ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ‏‏ويقيموا الصلاة ويؤتوا الزكاة ويؤمنوا بجميع ما جاء به النبي صلى الله عليه وسلم وأن من فعل ذلك عصم نفسه وماله إلا بحقها ووكلت سريرته إلى الله تعالى وقتال من منع الزكاة أو غيرها من حقوق الإسلام واهتمام الإمام بشعائر الإسلام
titles.english: Chapter: The command to fight the people until they say "La ilaha illallah Muhammad Rasul-Allah", and establish Salat, and pay the Zakat, and believe in everything that the prophet (saws) brought. Whoever does that, his life and his wealth are protected except by its right, and his secrets are entrusted to Allah, the most high. Fighting those who withhold Zakat or other than that is one of the duties of Islam and the Imam should be concerned with the Laws of Islam

titles.arabic: باب الدليل على صحة إسلام من حضره الموت ما لم يشرع في النزع وهو الغرغرة ونسخ جواز الاستغفار للمشركين والدليل على أن من مات على الشرك فهو في أصحاب الجحيم ولا ينقذه من ذلك شيء من الوسائل
titles.english: Chapter: Evidence that the islam of one who becomes muslim on his deathbed is valid, so long as the death thoes have not begun; Abrogation of permission to supplicate for forgiveness for the idolators; Evidence that one who dies an idolator is one of the people of hell and no intervention can save him from that

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ لَقِيَ اللَّهَ بِالإِيمَانِ وَهُوَ غَيْرُ شَاكٍّ فِيهِ دَخَلَ الْجَنَّةَ وَحَرُمَ عَلَى النَّارِ
titles.english: Chapter: The evidence that one who dies believing in tawhid will definitely enter paradise

titles.arabic: بَاب الدَّلِيلِ عَلَى أَنَّ مَنْ رَضِيَ بِاللَّهِ رَبًّا وَبِالْإِسْلَامِ دِينًا وَبِمُحَمَّدٍ رَسُولًا فَهُوَ مُؤْمِنٌ وَإِنْ ارْتَكَبَ الْمَعَاصِيَ الْكَبَائِرَ
titles.english: Chapter: Evidence that the one who is content with Allah as his Lord, Islam as his religion and Muhammad (saws) as his prophet, then he is a believer, even if he commits major sins

titles.arabic: باب بَيَانِ عَدَدِ شُعَبِ الْإِيمَانِ وَأَفْضَلِهَا وَأَدْنَاهَا وَفَضِيلَةِ الْحَيَاءِ وَكَوْنِهِ مِنْ الْإِيمَانِ
titles.english: Chapter: Clarifying the number of branches of faith, the best and the least of them, the virtue of modesty (Al-Haya') and the fact that it is part of faith

titles.arabic: باب جَامِعِ أَوْصَافِ الإِسْلاَمِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: A phrase that sums up Islam

titles.arabic: باب بَيَانِ تَفَاضُلِ الإِسْلاَمِ وَأَىِّ أُمُورِهِ أَفْضَلُ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Clarifying the superiority of Islam, and what part of it is best

titles.arabic: باب بَيَانِ خِصَالٍ مَنِ اتَّصَفَ بِهِنَّ وَجَدَ حَلاَوَةَ الإِيمَانِ
titles.english: Chapter: Clarification of those characteristics which, if a person attains them, he will find the sweetness of faith

titles.arabic: باب وُجُوبِ مَحَبَّةِ رَسُولِ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ أَكْثَرَ مِنَ الأَهْلِ وَالْوَلَدِ وَالْوَالِدِ وَالنَّاسِ أَجْمَعِينَ وَإِطْلاَقِ عَدَمِ الإِيمَانِ عَلَى مَنْ لَمْ يُحِبَّهُ هَذِهِ الْمَحَبَّةَ
titles.english: Chapter: The obligation to love the messenger of Allah (saws) more than one's family, son, father, and all other people; And mentions of an absolute absence of faith regarding one who does not love him with such love

titles.arabic: باب الدَّلِيلِ عَلَى أَنَّ مِنْ خِصَالِ الإِيمَانِ أَنْ يُحِبَّ لأَخِيهِ الْمُسْلِمِ مَا يُحِبُّ لِنَفْسِه مِنَ الْخَيْرِ
titles.english: Chapter: The evidence that one of the attributes of faith is to love for one's brother muslim that one loves for oneself of goodness

titles.arabic: باب بَيَانِ تَحْرِيمِ إِيذَاءِ الْجَارِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Clarifying the prohibition of annoying one's neighbor

titles.arabic: باب الْحَثِّ عَلَى إِكْرَامِ الْجَارِ وَالضَّيْفِ وَلُزُومِ الصَّمْتِ إِلاَّ مِنَ الْخَيْرِ وَكَوْنِ ذَلِكَ كُلِّهِ مِنَ الإِيمَانِ
titles.english: Chapter: Encouragement to honor one's neighbor and guest, and the obligation to remain silent unless one has something good to say, and the fact that all of that is part of faith

titles.arabic: باب بَيَانِ كَوْنِ النَّهْىِ عَنِ الْمُنْكَرِ، مِنَ الإِيمَانِ وَأَنَّ الإِيمَانَ يَزِيدُ وَيَنْقُصُ وَأَنَّ الأَمْرَ بِالْمَعْرُوفِ وَالنَّهْيَ عَنِ الْمُنْكَرِ وَاجِبَانِ
titles.english: Chapter: Clarifying that forbidding evil is part of faith, faith increases and decreases; Enjoying what is good and forbidding what is evil are obligatory

titles.arabic: باب تَفَاضُلِ أَهْلِ الإِيمَانِ فِيهِ وَرُجْحَانِ أَهْلِ الْيَمَنِ فِيهِ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: People excel over one another in faith, and the superiority of the people of Yemen in faith

titles.arabic: باب بَيَانِ أَنَّهُ لاَ يَدْخُلُ الْجَنَّةَ إِلاَّ الْمُؤْمِنُونَ وَأَنَّ مَحَبَّةَ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ مِنَ الإِيمَانِ وَأَنَّ إِفْشَاءَ السَّلاَمِ سَبَبٌ لِحُصُولِهَا
titles.english: Chapter: Clarifying that no one will enter paradise but the believers; loving the believers is part of faith and spreading Salam is a means of attaining that

titles.arabic: باب بَيَانِ أَنَّ الدِّينَ النَّصِيحَةُ
titles.english: Chapter: Clarifying that the religion is sincerity

titles.arabic: باب بَيَانِ نُقْصَانِ الإِيمَانِ بِالْمَعَاصِي وَنَفْيِهِ عَنِ الْمُتَلَبِّسِ بِالْمَعْصِيَةِ عَلَى إِرَادَةِ نَفْيِ كَمَالِهِ
titles.english: Chapter: Clarifying that faith decreases because of disobedience and negating it from the one committing the act of disobedience, with the meaning of negating its completion

titles.arabic: باب بَيَانِ خِصَالِ الْمُنَافِقِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The characteristics of the hypocrite

titles.arabic: باب بَيَانِ حَالِ إِيمَانِ مَنْ قَالَ لأَخِيهِ الْمُسْلِمِ يَا كَافِرُ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Clarifying the condition of faith for one who says to his muslim brother: "O Kafir (Disbeliever)."

titles.arabic: باب بَيَانِ حَالِ إِيمَانِ مَنْ رَغِبَ عَنْ أَبِيهِ وَهُوَ يَعْلَمُ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Clarifying the condition of the fath of one who knowingly denies his father

titles.arabic: باب بَيَانِ قَوْلِ النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم ‏"‏ سِبَابُ الْمُسْلِمِ فُسُوقٌ وَقِتَالُهُ كُفْرٌ ‏"‏ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: Clarifying the words of the prophet (saws): "Insulting A Muslim is an evil action and fighting him is disbelief (Kufr)"

titles.arabic: باب ‏"‏ لاَ تَرْجِعُوا بَعْدِي كُفَّارًا يَضْرِبُ بَعْضُكمْ رِقَابَ بَعْضٍ ‏"‏ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Clarifying the meaning of the Statement of the Prophet (saws): "Do not revert to disbelief (Kuffar) after I am Gone, striking one another's necks"

titles.arabic: باب إِطْلاَقِ اسْمِ الْكُفْرِ عَلَى الطَّعْنِ فِي النَّسَبِ وَالنِّيَاحَةِ عَلَى الْمَيِّتِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Use of the word Kufr with regard to slandering people's lineage and wailing

titles.arabic: باب تَسْمِيَةِ الْعَبْدِ الآبِقِ كَافِرًا ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Calling a runaway slave a kafirg

titles.arabic: باب بَيَانِ كُفْرِ مَنْ قَالَ مُطِرْنَا بِالنَّوْءِ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: Clarifying the Kufr of one who says: "We got rain because of the stars."

titles.arabic: باب الدَّلِيلِ عَلَى أَنَّ حُبَّ الأَنْصَارِ وَعَلِيٍّ رَضِيَ اللَّهُ عَنْهُمْ مِنَ الإِيمَانِ وَعَلاَمَاتِهِ وَبُغْضَهُمْ مِنْ عَلاَمَاتِ النِّفَاقِ
titles.english: Chapter: Evidence that love of the Ansar and Ali (r.a.) is a part of faith and a sign thereof; Hating them is a sign of hypocrisy

titles.arabic: باب بَيَانِ نُقْصَانِ الإِيمَانِ بِنَقْصِ الطَّاعَاتِ وَبَيَانِ إِطْلاَقِ لَفْظِ الْكُفْرِ عَلَى غَيْرِ الْكُفْرِ بِاللَّهِ كَكُفْرِ النِّعْمَةِ وَالْحُقُوقِ
titles.english: Chapter: Clarifying that faith decreases with shortcoming in obedience, and the word Kufr may be used with regard to matters other than dsbelief in Allah, such as ingratitude for blessings and not fulfilling one's duties

titles.arabic: باب بَيَانِ إِطْلاَقِ اسْمِ الْكُفْرِ عَلَى مَنْ تَرَكَ الصَّلاَةَ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Clarifying the usage of the word Kafir for one who abandons Salat

titles.arabic: باب بَيَانِ كَوْنِ الإِيمَانِ بِاللَّهِ تَعَالَى أَفْضَلَ الأَعْمَالِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Clarifying that faith in Allah most high is the best of deeds

titles.arabic: باب كَوْنِ الشِّرْكِ أَقْبَحَ الذُّنُوبِ وَبَيَانِ أَعْظَمِهَا بَعْدَهُ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Clarifying that Shirk is the worst of sins, and the worst sins after Shirk

titles.arabic: باب بَيَانِ الْكَبَائِرِ وَأَكْبَرِهَا ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The major sins and the most serious of them

titles.arabic: باب تَحْرِيمِ الْكِبْرِ وَبَيَانِهِ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: The prohibition of pride and definition of it

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ مَاتَ لاَ يُشْرِكُ بِاللَّهِ شَيْئًا دَخَلَ الْجَنَّةَ وَمَنْ مَاتَ مُشْرِكًا دَخَلَ النَّارَ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The evidence that the one who dies not associating anything with Allah will enter paradise, and the one who dies as idolator will enter the fire

titles.arabic: باب تَحْرِيمِ قَتْلِ الْكَافِرِ بَعْدَ أَنْ قَالَ لاَ إِلَهَ إِلاَّ اللَّهُ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The prohibition of killing a disbeliever after he says La ilaha illallah

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِ النَّبِيِّ - صلى الله تعالى عليه وسلم - ‏"‏ مَنْ حَمَل عَلَيْنَا السِّلاَحَ فَلَيْسَ مِنَّا ‏"‏ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Saying of the prophet (saws): "Whoever bears weapons against us is not one of us."

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِ النَّبِيِّ - صلى الله تعالى عليه وسلم - ‏"‏ مَنْ غَشَّنَا فَلَيْسَ مِنَّا ‏"‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Saying of the prophet (saws): "Whoever deceives us is not one of us."

titles.arabic: باب تَحْرِيمِ ضَرْبِ الْخُدُودِ وَشَقِّ الْجُيُوبِ وَالدُّعَاءِ بِدَعْوَى الْجَاهِلِيَّةِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The prohibition of striking one's checks, tearing one's garment and calling with the calls of Jahilliyyah

titles.arabic: باب بَيَانِ غِلَظِ تَحْرِيمِ النَّمِيمَةِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Clarifying the emphatic prohibition of An-Namimah (Malicious Gossip)

titles.arabic: باب بَيَانِ غِلَظِ تَحْرِيمِ إِسْبَالِ الإِزَارِ وَالْمَنِّ بِالْعَطِيَّةِ وَتَنْفِيقِ السِّلْعَةِ بِالْحَلِفِ وَبَيَانِ الثَّلاَثَةِ الَّذِينَ لاَ يُكَلِّمُهُمُ اللَّهُ يَوْمَ الْقِيَامَةِ وَلاَ يَنْظُرُ إِلَيْهِمْ وَلاَ يُزَكِّيهِمْ وَلَهُمْ عَذَابٌ أَلِيمٌ
titles.english: Chapter: Clarifying the emphatic prohibition of letting one's garment hang below the ankles (isbal), reminding others of one's gift and selling goods by means of a false oath; Mention of the three to whom Allah, Most High, will not speak on the day of resurrection, nor look at them, nor sanctify them, and theirs will be a painful torment

titles.arabic: باب غِلَظِ تَحْرِيمِ قَتْلِ الإِنْسَانِ نَفْسَهُ وَإِنَّ مَنْ قَتَلَ نَفْسَهُ بِشَيْءٍ عُذِّبَ بِهِ فِي النَّارِ وَأَنَّهُ لاَ يَدْخُلُ الْجَنَّةَ إِلاَّ نَفْسٌ مُسْلِمَةٌ
titles.english: Chapter: Clarifying the emphatic prohibition against killing oneself; The one who kills himself with something will be punished with it in the fire; And that no one will enter Paradise but a muslim

titles.arabic: باب غِلَظِ تَحْرِيمِ الْغُلُولِ وَأَنَّهُ لاَ يَدْخُلُ الْجَنَّةَ إِلاَّ الْمُؤْمِنُونَ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Emphatic prohibition against stealing from the spoils of war; and that no one will enter paradise except the believers

titles.arabic: باب الدَّلِيلِ عَلَى أَنَّ قَاتِلَ نَفْسِهِ لاَ يَكْفُرُ
titles.english: Chapter: The evidence that the one who kills himself is not considered a disbeliever

titles.arabic: باب فِي الرِّيحِ الَّتِي تَكُونُ قُرْبَ الْقِيَامَةِ تَقْبِضُ مَنْ فِي قَلْبِهِ شَىْءٌ مِنَ الإِيمَانِ
titles.english: Chapter: Regarding the wind which will come just before the resurrection and take the soul of anyone who has any fath in his heart

titles.arabic: باب الْحَثِّ عَلَى الْمُبَادَرَةِ بِالأَعْمَالِ قَبْلَ تَظَاهُرِ الْفِتَنِ
titles.english: Chapter: Encouragement to hasten to do good deeds before the emergence of the Fitnah

titles.arabic: باب مَخَافَةِ الْمُؤْمِنِ أَنْ يَحْبَطَ عَمَلُهُ
titles.english: Chapter: The believer's fear that his good deeds may be lost

titles.arabic: باب هَلْ يُؤَاخَذُ بِأَعْمَالِ الْجَاهِلِيَّةِ
titles.english: Chapter: Will a person be punished for his actions during the Jahlilliyyah?

titles.arabic: باب كَوْنِ الإِسْلاَمِ يَهْدِمُ مَا قَبْلَهُ وَكَذَا الْهِجْرَةُ وَالْحَجُّ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Islam destroys that which came before it, as do Hijrah (Emigration) and Hajj

titles.arabic: باب بَيَانِ حُكْمِ عَمَلِ الْكَافِرِ إِذَا أَسْلَمَ بَعْدَهُ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Clarifying the ruling of the action of an unbeliever if he accepts Islam after it

titles.arabic: باب صِدْقِ الإِيمَانِ وَإِخْلاَصِهِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Sincerity of Faith and its Purity

titles.arabic: باب بَيَانِ أَنَّهُ سُبْحَانَهُ وَتَعَالَى لَمْ يُكَلِّفْ إِلَّا مَا يُطَاقُ
titles.english: Chapter: Clarification that Allah, most high allows a person's thoughts and whatever occurs in his heart, so long as they do not become established, and the clarification that he, glorious is he and most high, does not burden anyone with more than he can bear, and clarifying the ruling on thinking of doing good and bad deeds

titles.arabic: باب تَجَاوُزِ اللَّهِ عَنْ حَدِيثِ النَّفْسِ، وَالْخَوَاطِرِ، بِالْقَلْبِ إِذَا لَمْ تَسْتَقِرَّ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Allah allows a person's thoughts and whatever occurs in his heart so long as they do not become established

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا هَمَّ الْعَبْدُ بِحَسَنَةٍ كُتِبَتْ وَإِذَا هَمَّ بِسَيِّئَةٍ لَمْ تُكْتَبْ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: If a person thinks of doing a good deed it will be recorded for him, and if he thinks of doing a bad deed it will not be recorded for him

titles.arabic: باب بَيَانِ الْوَسْوَسَةِ فِي الإِيمَانِ وَمَا يَقُولُهُ مَنْ وَجَدَهَا ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Clarifying the Waswasah (Whispers, Bad Thoughts) with regard to faith, and what the one who experiences that should say

titles.arabic: باب وَعِيدِ مَنِ اقْتَطَعَ حَقَّ مُسْلِمٍ بِيَمِينٍ فَاجِرَةٍ بِالنَّارِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Warning of the Fire for the one who swears a false oath in order to unlawfully take the right of another muslim

titles.arabic: باب الدَّلِيلِ عَلَى أَنَّ مَنْ قَصَدَ أَخْذَ مَالِ غَيْرِهِ بِغَيْرِ حَقٍّ كَانَ الْقَاصِدُ مُهْدَرَ الدَّمِ فِي حَقِّهِ وَإِنْ قُتِلَ كَانَ فِي النَّارِ وَأَنَّ مَنْ قُتِلَ دُونَ مَالِهِ فَهُوَ شَهِيدٌ
titles.english: Chapter: The evidence that the blood of one who aims to seize other people's wealth without right may be shed, if he is killed he will be in the fire, and the one who is killed defending his property is a martyr

titles.arabic: باب اسْتِحْقَاقِ الْوَالِي الْغَاشِّ لِرَعِيَّتِهِ النَّارَ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: One in charge of a matter, who cheats his subjects, deserves the fire

titles.arabic: باب رَفْعِ الأَمَانَةِ وَالإِيمَانِ مِنْ بَعْضِ الْقُلُوبِ وَعَرْضِ الْفِتَنِ عَلَى الْقُلُوبِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The disappearance of honesty and faith from some hearts and the appearance of fitnah in some hearts

titles.arabic: باب بَيَانِ أَنَّ الْإِسْلَامَ بَدَأَ غَرِيبًا وَسَيَعُودُ غَرِيبًا وَأَنَّهُ يَأْرِزُ بَيْنَ الْمَسْجِدَيْنِ
titles.english: Chapter: Clarifying that Islam started as something strange, and will revert to being something strange, and it will retreat between the two Masajid

titles.arabic: باب ذَهَابِ الإِيمَانِ آخِرَ الزَّمَانِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Disappearance of Faith at the End of Time

titles.arabic: باب جَوَازِ الاِسْتِسْرَارِ لِلْخَائِفِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Permissibility of concealing one's faith in the case of fear

titles.arabic: باب تَأَلُّفِ قَلْبِ مَنْ يَخَافُ عَلَى إِيمَانِهِ لِضَعْفِهِ وَالنَّهْيِ عَنِ الْقَطْعِ بِالإِيمَانِ مِنْ غَيْرِ دَلِيلٍ قَاطِعٍ
titles.english: Chapter: Being kind to one for whose faith there is concern because it is weak; Prohibition of attributing Faith to someone without definitive evidence

titles.arabic: باب زِيَادَةِ طُمَأْنِينَةِ الْقَلْبِ بِتَظَاهُرِ الأَدِلَّةِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Increasing the heart's tranquility with the appearance evidence

titles.arabic: باب وُجُوبِ الإِيمَانِ بِرِسَالَةِ نَبِيِّنَا مُحَمَّدٍ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ إِلَى جَمِيعِ النَّاسِ وَنَسْخِ الْمِلَلِ بِمِلَّتِهِ
titles.english: Chapter: Obligation of believing that the message of our Prophet Muhammad (saws) is for all people, and the abrogation of all other religions

titles.arabic: باب نُزُولِ عِيسَى ابْنِ مَرْيَمَ حَاكِمًا بِشَرِيعَةِ نَبِيِّنَا مُحَمَّدٍ صلى الله عليه وسلم
titles.english: Chapter: The descent of 'Eisa bin Mariam to judge according to the Shari'ah of our Prophet Muhammad (saws); And how Allah has honored this Ummah; And clarifying the evidence that this religion will not be abrogated; and that a group from it will continue to adhere to the truth and prevail until the day of resurrection

titles.arabic: باب بَيَانِ الزَّمَنِ الَّذِي لاَ يُقْبَلُ فِيهِ الإِيمَانُ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Clarifying the time when faith will no longer be accepted

titles.arabic: باب بَدْءِ الْوَحْىِ إِلَى رَسُولِ اللَّهِ صلى الله عليه وسلم ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The beginning of the revelation to the messenger of Allah (saws)

titles.arabic: باب الإِسْرَاءِ بِرَسُولِ اللَّهِ صلى الله عليه وسلم إِلَى السَّمَوَاتِ وَفَرْضِ الصَّلَوَاتِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The night journey on which the messenger of Allah (saws) was taken up into the heavens and the prayers were enjoined

titles.arabic: باب فِي ذِكْرِ الْمَسِيحِ ابْنِ مَرْيَمَ وَالْمَسِيحِ الدَّجَّالِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Mentioning Al-Masih Son of Mariam and Al-Masih ad-Dajjal

titles.arabic: باب فِي ذِكْرِ سِدْرَةِ الْمُنْتَهَى ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: About (The Lote-Tree of the Utmost Boundary)

titles.arabic: باب مَعْنَى قَوْلِ اللَّهِ عَزَّ وَجَلَّ: {وَلَقَدْ رَآهُ نَزْلَةً أُخْرَى} وَهَلْ رَأَى النَّبِيُّ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ رَبَّهُ لَيْلَةَ الإِسْرَاءِ
titles.english: Chapter: The Meaning of the Saying of Allah, The Mighty and Sublime: And indeed he saw him at a second descent (another time)"; And did the prophet (saws) see his lord on the night of the Isra?

titles.arabic: باب فِي قَوْلِهِ عَلَيْهِ السَّلاَمُ ‏"‏ نُورٌ أَنَّى أَرَاهُ ‏"‏ ‏.‏ وَفِي قَوْلِهِ ‏"‏ رَأَيْتُ نُورًا
titles.english: Chapter: The saying of the Prophet (saws): "Light, How could I see Him?" and: "I saw Light"

titles.arabic: باب فِي قَوْلِهِ عَلَيْهِ السَّلاَمُ: «إِنَّ اللَّهَ لاَ يَنَامُ». وَفِي قَوْلِهِ: «حِجَابُهُ النُّورُ لَوْ كَشَفَهُ لأَحْرَقَ سُبُحَاتُ وَجْهِهِ مَا انْتَهَى إِلَيْهِ بَصَرُهُ مِنْ خَلْقِهِ»
titles.english: Chapter: The saying of the Prophet (saws): "Allah does not sleep" and "His veil is light, and if he were to remove it, the splendour of his face would burn all of his creation, as far as hs sght reaches".

titles.arabic: باب إِثْبَاتِ رُؤْيَةِ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ فِي الآخِرَةِ رَبَّهُمْ سُبْحَانَهُ وَتَعَالَى ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Affirming that the believers will see their Lord, Glorious is he and most high, in the hereafter

titles.arabic: باب مَعْرِفَةِ طَرِيقِ الرُّؤْيَةِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Knowing about the seeing

titles.arabic: باب إِثْبَاتِ الشَّفَاعَةِ وَإِخْرَاجِ الْمُوَحِّدِينَ مِنَ النَّارِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Intercession and bringing those who believed in tawhid out of the Fire

titles.arabic: باب آخِرِ أَهْلِ النَّارِ خُرُوجًا ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Last of the people of the Fire to be brought out of it

titles.arabic: باب أَدْنَى أَهْلِ الْجَنَّةِ مَنْزِلَةً فِيهَا ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Status of the Lowest people in paradise

titles.arabic: باب فِي قَوْلِ النَّبِيِّ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ: «أَنَا أَوَّلُ النَّاسِ يَشْفَعُ فِي الْجَنَّةِ وَأَنَا أَكْثَرُ الأَنْبِيَاءِ تَبَعًا»
titles.english: Chapter: Regarding the saying of the Prophet (saws): "I will be the first of the people to intercede concerning Paradise, and I will be the Prophet with the Greatest Number of Followers."

titles.arabic: باب اخْتِبَاءِ النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم دَعْوَةَ الشَّفَاعَةِ لأُمَّتِهِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Prophet (saws) will defer his supplication in order to intercede for his ummah

titles.arabic: باب دُعَاءِ النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم لأُمَّتِهِ وَبُكَائِهِ شَفَقَةً عَلَيْهِمْ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The supplication of the Prophet (saws) for his ummah and his weeping out of compassion for them

titles.arabic: باب بَيَانِ أَنَّ مَنْ مَاتَ عَلَى الْكُفْرِ فَهُوَ فِي النَّارِ وَلاَ تَنَالُهُ شَفَاعَةٌ وَلاَ تَنْفَعُهُ قَرَابَةُ الْمُقَرَّبِينَ
titles.english: Chapter: Clarifying that whoever died upon disbelief then he is in the Fire, and no intercession or relationship with those who are close to Allah will be of any avail for him

titles.arabic: باب فِي قَوْلِهِ تَعَالَى: {وَأَنْذِرْ عَشِيرَتَكَ الأَقْرَبِينَ}
titles.english: Chapter: Regarding the saying of Allah, the most High: "And warn your tribe of near kindred."

titles.arabic: باب شَفَاعَةِ النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم لأَبِي طَالِبٍ وَالتَّخْفِيفِ عَنْهُ بِسَبَبِهِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Intercession of the Prophet (saws) for Abu Talib and the reduction of his punishment as a result

titles.arabic: باب أَهْوَنِ أَهْلِ النَّارِ عَذَابًا ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The least severely punished of the people of the Fire

titles.arabic: باب الدَّلِيلِ علَى أَنَّ مَنْ مَاتَ عَلَى الْكُفْرِ لاَ يَنْفَعُهُ عَمَلٌ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The evidence that whoever dies upon disbelief, no good deed will benefit him

titles.arabic: باب مُوَالاَةِ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ وَمُقَاطَعَةِ غَيْرِهِمْ وَالْبَرَاءَةِ مِنْهُمْ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Allegiance to the believers, and forsaking others and disavowing them

titles.arabic: باب الدَّلِيلِ عَلَى دُخُولِ طَوَائِفَ مِنَ الْمُسْلِمِينَ الْجَنَّةَ بِغَيْرِ حِسَابٍ وَلاَ عَذَابٍ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Evidence that groups of Muslims will enter Paradise without being called to account, and without being punished

titles.arabic: باب كَوْنِ هَذِهِ الأُمَّةِ نِصْفَ أَهْلِ الْجَنَّةِ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: Clarifying that this ummah will form half of the People of Paradise

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ يَقُولُ اللَّهُ لِآدَمَ أَخْرِجْ بَعْثَ النَّارِ مِنْ كُلِّ أَلْفٍ تِسْعَ مِائَةٍ وَتِسْعَةً وَتِسْعِينَ
titles.english: Chapter: Allah will say to Adam: "Bring out the Portion of the Fire; Nine Hundred and Ninety-Nine Out of Every Thousand."

titles.arabic: باب صَلاَةِ الْكُسُوفِ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Eclipse Prayer

titles.arabic: باب ذِكْرِ عَذَابِ الْقَبْرِ فِي صَلاَةِ الْخُسُوفِ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: Mentioning The Punishment In The Grave During The Eclipse Prayer

titles.arabic: باب مَا عُرِضَ عَلَى النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم فِي صَلاَةِ الْكُسُوفِ مِنْ أَمْرِ الْجَنَّةِ وَالنَّارِ
titles.english: Chapter: What Was Shown To The Prophet Of Paradise And Hell During The Eclipse Prayer

titles.arabic: باب ذِكْرِ مَنْ قَالَ إِنَّهُ رَكَعَ ثَمَانَ رَكَعَاتٍ فِي أَرْبَعِ سَجَدَاتٍ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: Those Who Say That He Prayed With Eight Bowings And Four Prostrations

titles.arabic: باب ذِكْرِ النِّدَاءِ بِصَلاَةِ الْكُسُوفِ ‏"‏ الصَّلاَةَ جَامِعَةً ‏"‏ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Call For The Eclipse Prayer: "As-Salatu Jami'ah (The Prayer Is Being Assembled)

titles.arabic: باب تَلْقِينِ الْمَوْتَى لاَ إِلَهَ إِلاَّ اللَّهُ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: Prompt the Dying person to say La Ilaha Ill-Allah

titles.arabic: باب مَا يُقَالُ عِنْدَ الْمُصِيبَةِ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: What should be said at times of calamity?

titles.arabic: باب مَا يُقَالُ عِنْدَ الْمَرِيضِ وَالْمَيِّتِ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: What is to be said in the presence of the sick and the dying

titles.arabic: باب فِي إِغْمَاضِ الْمَيِّتِ وَالدُّعَاءِ لَهُ إِذَا حُضِرَ
titles.english: Chapter: Closing the eyes of the deceased and supplicating for him, when he dies

titles.arabic: باب فِي شُخُوصِ بَصَرِ الْمَيِّتِ يَتْبَعُ نَفْسَهُ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: The upward gaze of the deceased follows his soul

titles.arabic: باب الْبُكَاءِ عَلَى الْمَيِّتِ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: Crying for the deceased

titles.arabic: باب فِي عِيَادَةِ الْمَرْضَى ‏
titles.english: Chapter: Visiting the sick

titles.arabic: باب فِي الصَّبْرِ عَلَى الْمُصِيبَةِ عِنْدَ الصَّدْمَةِ الأُولَى ‏
titles.english: Chapter: Patience in bearing calamity when it first strikes

titles.arabic: باب الْمَيِّتُ يُعَذَّبُ بِبُكَاءِ أَهْلِهِ عَلَيْهِ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: The deceased is tormented because of his family's crying for him

titles.arabic: باب التَّشْدِيدِ فِي النِّيَاحَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: Stern warning against wailing

titles.arabic: باب نَهْىِ النِّسَاءِ عَنِ اتِّبَاعِ الْجَنَائِزِ، ‏
titles.english: Chapter: Prohibition of women attending funerals

titles.arabic: باب فِي غَسْلِ الْمَيِّتِ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: Washing the deceased

titles.arabic: باب فِي كَفَنِ الْمَيِّتِ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: Shrouding the deceased

titles.arabic: باب تَسْجِيَةِ الْمَيِّتِ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: Covering the deceased

titles.arabic: باب فِي تَحْسِينِ كَفَنِ الْمَيِّتِ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: Shrouding the deceased well

titles.arabic: باب الإِسْرَاعِ بِالْجَنَازَةِ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: Hastening with the funeral

titles.arabic: باب فَضْلِ الصَّلاَةِ عَلَى الْجَنَازَةِ وَاتِّبَاعِهَا ‏
titles.english: Chapter: The virtue of offering the funeral prayer and following the bier

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ صَلَّى عَلَيْهِ مِائَةٌ شُفِّعُوا فِيهِ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: If one hundred (people) pray for a person, they will intercede for him

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ صَلَّى عَلَيْهِ أَرْبَعُونَ شُفِّعُوا فِيهِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: If forty people pray for a person, they will intercede for him

titles.arabic: باب فِيمَنْ يُثْنَى عَلَيْهِ خَيْرٌ أَوْ شَرٌّ مِنَ الْمَوْتَى ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The deceased who is spoken well of and the one who is spoken badly of

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي ‏"‏ مُسْتَرِيحٌ وَمُسْتَرَاحٌ مِنْهُ ‏"‏ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: What was narrated concerning one who finds relief and one from whom relief is found

titles.arabic: باب فِي التَّكْبِيرِ عَلَى الْجَنَازَةِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Saying the takbir over the deceased

titles.arabic: باب الصَّلاَةِ عَلَى الْقَبْرِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Praying over the grave

titles.arabic: باب الْقِيَامِ لِلْجَنَازَةِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Standing for funerals

titles.arabic: باب نَسْخِ الْقِيَامِ لِلْجَنَازَةِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Abrogation of standing for funerals

titles.arabic: باب الدُّعَاءِ لِلْمَيِّتِ فِي الصَّلاَةِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Supplicating for the deceased during the (funeral) prayer

titles.arabic: باب أَيْنَ يَقُومُ الإِمَامُ مِنَ الْمَيِّتِ لِلصَّلاَةِ عَلَيْهِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Where the Imam should stand in relation to the deceased when performing the funeral prayer

titles.arabic: باب رُكُوبِ الْمُصَلِّي عَلَى الْجَنَازَةِ إِذَا انْصَرَفَ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Riding back after the funeral

titles.arabic: باب فِي اللَّحْدِ وَنَصْبِ اللَّبِنِ عَلَى الْمَيِّتِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Lahd (Niche), and setting up bricks over the deceased

titles.arabic: باب جَعْلِ الْقَطِيفَةِ فِي الْقَبْرِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Putting a piece of velvet in the grave

titles.arabic: باب الأَمْرِ بِتَسْوِيَةِ الْقَبْرِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The command to level the grave

titles.arabic: باب النَّهْىِ عَنْ تَجْصِيصِ الْقَبْرِ، وَالْبِنَاءِ، عَلَيْهِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The prohibition of plastering graves or erecting structures over them

titles.arabic: باب النَّهْىِ عَنِ الْجُلُوسِ، عَلَى الْقَبْرِ وَالصَّلاَةِ عَلَيْهِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Prohibition against sitting and praying on graves

titles.arabic: باب الصَّلاَةِ عَلَى الْجَنَازَةِ فِي الْمَسْجِدِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Offering the funeral prayer in the masjid

titles.arabic: باب مَا يُقَالُ عِنْدَ دُخُولِ الْقُبُورِ وَالدُّعَاءِ لأَهْلِهَا ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: What is to be said when entering the graveyard and supplicating for its occupants

titles.arabic: باب اسْتِئْذَانِ النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم رَبَّهُ عَزَّ وَجَلَّ فِي زِيَارَةِ قَبْرِ أُمِّهِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The prophet (saws) asked his Lord for permission to visit the grave of his mother

titles.arabic: باب تَرْكِ الصَّلاَةِ عَلَى الْقَاتِلِ نَفْسَهُ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Leaving the funeral prayer for one who committed suicide

titles.arabic: باب مَا فِيهِ الْعُشْرُ أَوْ نِصْفُ الْعُشْرِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: On what one-tenth or half of one-tenth is due

titles.arabic: باب لاَ زَكَاةَ عَلَى الْمُسْلِمِ فِي عَبْدِهِ وَفَرَسِهِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Muslim is not obliged to give Zakat on his slave nor his horse

titles.arabic: باب فِي تَقْدِيمِ الزَّكَاةِ وَمَنْعِهَا ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Paying or withholding Zakat

titles.arabic: باب زَكَاةِ الْفِطْرِ عَلَى الْمُسْلِمِينَ مِنَ التَّمْرِ وَالشَّعِيرِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Zakat Al-Fitr is due from the muslims in the form of dates and barley

titles.arabic: باب الأَمْرِ بِإِخْرَاجِ زَكَاةِ الْفِطْرِ قَبْلَ الصَّلاَةِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The command to pay Zakat Al-Fitr before the prayer

titles.arabic: باب إِثْمِ مَانِعِ الزَّكَاةِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The sin of one who withholds Zakat

titles.arabic: باب إِرْضَاءِ السُّعَاةِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Pleasing the Su'ah (Zakat Collectors)

titles.arabic: باب تَغْلِيظِ عُقُوبَةِ مَنْ لاَ يُؤَدِّي الزَّكَاةَ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Severe Punishment for the one who does not pay Zakat

titles.arabic: باب التَّرْغِيبِ فِي الصَّدَقَةِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Encouragement to give Charity

titles.arabic: باب فِي الْكَنَّازِينَ لِلأَمْوَالِ وَالتَّغْلِيظِ عَلَيْهِمْ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Stern warning concerning those who hoard wealth

titles.arabic: باب الْحَثِّ عَلَى النَّفَقَةِ وَتَبْشِيرِ الْمُنْفِقِ بِالْخَلَفِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Encouragement to spend and glad tidings of compensation for the one who spends on good deeds

titles.arabic: باب فَضْلِ النَّفَقَةِ عَلَى الْعِيَالِ وَالْمَمْلُوكِ وَإِثْمِ مَنْ ضَيَّعَهُمْ أَوْ حَبَسَ نَفَقَتَهُمْ عَنْهُمْ
titles.english: Chapter: The virtue of spending on one's family and slaves, and the sin of the one who neglects them or withholds maintenance from them

titles.arabic: باب الاِبْتِدَاءِ فِي النَّفَقَةِ بِالنَّفْسِ ثُمَّ أَهْلِهِ ثُمَّ الْقَرَابَةِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Starting with oneself, then one's family, then one's relatives, when spending

titles.arabic: باب فَضْلِ النَّفَقَةِ وَالصَّدَقَةِ عَلَى الْأَقْرَبِينَ وَالزَّوْجِ وَالْأَوْلَادِ وَالْوَالِدَيْنِ وَلَوْ كَانُوا مُشْرِكِينَ
titles.english: Chapter: The virtue of spending and giving charity to relatives, spuses, children and parents, even if they are idolaters

titles.arabic: باب وُصُولِ ثَوَابِ الصَّدَقَةِ عَنِ الْمَيِّتِ، إِلَيْهِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Charity given on behalf of the deceased will reach him

titles.arabic: باب بَيَانِ أَنَّ اسْمَ الصَّدَقَةِ يَقَعُ عَلَى كُلِّ نَوْعٍ مِنَ الْمَعْرُوفِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The word charity (Sadaqah) may apply to all good deeds Ma'ruf

titles.arabic: باب فِي الْمُنْفِقِ وَالْمُمْسِكِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The one who spends and the one who withholds

titles.arabic: باب التَّرْغِيبِ فِي الصَّدَقَةِ قَبْلَ أَنْ لاَ يُوجَدَ مَنْ يَقْبَلُهَا ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Encouragement to give charity before there is no one to accept it

titles.arabic: باب قَبُولِ الصَّدَقَةِ مِنَ الْكَسْبِ الطَّيِّبِ وَتَرْبِيَتِهَا ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Acceptance of charity that comes from good (Tayyib) earnings, and the growth thereof

titles.arabic: باب الْحَثِّ عَلَى الصَّدَقَةِ وَلَوْ بِشِقِّ تَمْرَةٍ أَوْ كَلِمَةٍ طَيِّبَةٍ وَأَنَّهَا حِجَابٌ مِنْ النَّارِ
titles.english: Chapter: Encouragement to give charity even if it is with half a date or a kind word. And charity is a shield against the fire.

titles.arabic: باب الْحَمْلِ بِأُجْرَةٍ يُتَصَدَّقُ بِهَا وَالنَّهْىِ الشَّدِيدِ عَنْ تَنْقِيصِ الْمُتَصَدِّقِ بِقَلِيل
titles.english: Chapter: Carrying goods for payment and giving charity out of one's wages, and the stern prohibition of belittling the one who gives something small in charity

titles.arabic: باب فَضْلِ الْمَنِيحَةِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The virute of giving gifts

titles.arabic: باب مَثَلِ الْمُنْفِقِ وَالْبَخِيلِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Likeness of the giver and the miser

titles.arabic: باب ثُبُوتِ أَجْرِ الْمُتَصَدِّقِ وَإِنْ وَقَعَتِ الصَّدَقَةُ فِي يَدِ غَيْرِ أَهْلِهَا ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Confirmation of the reward of the one who gives Charity, even if the Charity ends up in the hands of an evildoer, and the like

titles.arabic: باب أَجْرِ الْخَازِنِ الأَمِينِ وَالْمَرْأَةِ إِذَا تَصَدَّقَتْ مِنْ بَيْتِ زَوْجِهَا غَيْرَ مُفْسِدَةٍ ب
titles.english: Chapter: The reward of the Trustworthy Trustee, and if a woman gives charity from her husband's house without causing any damage, with his explicit or implicit permission

titles.arabic: باب مَا أَنْفَقَ الْعَبْدُ مِنْ مَالِ مَوْلاَهُ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: What a slave spends of his master's wealth

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ جَمَعَ الصَّدَقَةَ وَأَعْمَالَ الْبِرِّ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The virtue of the one who does other kinds of good deeds in addition to giving charity

titles.arabic: باب الْحَثِّ فِي الإِنْفَاقِ وَكَرَاهَةِ الإِحْصَاءِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Encouragement to spend, and it is disliked to count how much

titles.arabic: باب الْحَثِّ عَلَى الصَّدَقَةِ وَلَوْ بِالْقَلِيلِ وَلاَ تُمْتَنَعُ مِنَ الْقَلِيلِ لاِحْتِقَارِهِ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: Encouragement to give in charity even if it is a little, and a little should not be withheld because one thinks it is too little

titles.arabic: باب فَضْلِ إِخْفَاءِ الصَّدَقَةِ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: The virtue of concealing (what is given in) charity

titles.arabic: باب بَيَانِ أَنَّ أَفْضَلَ الصَّدَقَةِ صَدَقَةُ الصَّحِيحِ الشَّحِيحِ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: The best of charity is that which is given when one is healthy and inclined to be stingy

titles.arabic: باب بَيَانِ أَنَّ الْيَدَ الْعُلْيَا خَيْرٌ مِنْ الْيَدِ السُّفْلَى وَأَنَّ الْيَدَ الْعُلْيَا هِيَ الْمُنْفِقَةُ وَأَنَّ السُّفْلَى هِيَ الْآخِذَةُ
titles.english: Chapter: The upper hand is better than the lower hand, and the upper hand is the one that gives and the lower hand is the one that receives

titles.arabic: باب النَّهْىِ عَنِ الْمَسْأَلَةِ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: The prohibition of Begging

titles.arabic: باب الْمِسْكِينِ الَّذِي لاَ يَجِدُ غِنًى وَلاَ يُفْطَنُ لَهُ فَيُتَصَدَّقَ عَلَيْهِ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: The poor person who cannot find enough to make him independent of means, but the people do not realize that he is in need, so they do not give Charity to him

titles.arabic: باب كَرَاهَةِ الْمَسْأَلَةِ لِلنَّاسِ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: It is disliked to beg from people

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ تَحِلُّ لَهُ الْمَسْأَلَةُ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: The one for whom it is permissible to ask for help

titles.arabic: باب إِبَاحَةِ الأَخْذِ لِمَنْ أُعْطِيَ مِنْ غَيْرِ مَسْأَلَةٍ وَلاَ إِشْرَافٍ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: It is permissible to take without asking for it or hoping for it

titles.arabic: باب كَرَاهَةِ الْحِرْصِ عَلَى الدُّنْيَا ‏
titles.english: Chapter: It is disliked to be eager to acquire worldly gains

titles.arabic: باب لَوْ أَنَّ لاِبْنِ آدَمَ وَادِيَيْنِ لاَبْتَغَى ثَالِثًا ‏
titles.english: Chapter: If the Son of Adam had two valleys, he would desire a third

titles.arabic: باب لَيْسَ الْغِنَى عَنْ كَثْرَةِ الْعَرَضِ
titles.english: Chapter: The virtue of contentment and encouragement thereof

titles.arabic: باب تَخَوُّفِ مَا يَخْرُجُ مِنْ زَهْرَةِ الدُّنْيَا ‏
titles.english: Chapter: Warning against being deceived by the splendor and luxury of this world

titles.arabic: باب فَضْلِ التَّعَفُّفِ وَالصَّبْرِ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: The virtue of refraining from asking and being patient and content

titles.arabic: باب فِي الْكَفَافِ وَالْقَنَاعَةِ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: Sufficient provision and contentment

titles.arabic: باب إِعْطَاءِ مَنْ سَأَلَ بِفُحْشٍ وَغِلْظَةٍ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: Giving to those whose hearts have been inclined (towards Islam) and to those for whose faith there is fear if they are not given anything, and putting up with the one who asks rudely due to ignorance, and the Khawarij and rulings regarding them

titles.arabic: باب إِعْطَاءِ مَنْ يُخَافُ عَلَى إِيمَانِهِ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: Giving to one whose faith one fears

titles.arabic: باب إِعْطَاءِ الْمُؤَلَّفَةِ قُلُوبُهُمْ عَلَى الإِسْلاَمِ وَتَصَبُّرِ مَنْ قَوِيَ إِيمَانُهُ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: Giving to those whose hearts have been inclined (towards Islam) and urging those whose faith is strong to show patience

titles.arabic: باب ذِكْرِ الْخَوَارِجِ وَصِفَاتِهِمْ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Khawarij and their attributes

titles.arabic: باب التَّحْرِيضِ عَلَى قَتْلِ الْخَوَارِجِ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: Exhortation to kill the Khawarij

titles.arabic: باب الْخَوَارِجُ شَرُّ الْخَلْقِ وَالْخَلِيقَةِ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Khawarij are the most evil of people and of all creation

titles.arabic: باب تَحْرِيمِ الزَّكَاةِ عَلَى رَسُولِ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ وَعَلَى آلِهِ وَهُمْ بَنُو هَاشِمٍ وَبَنُو الْمُطَّلِبِ دُونَ غَيْرِهِمْ
titles.english: Chapter: Zakat is forbidden for the messenger of Allah pbuh and his family, and they are Banu Hashim and Banu Al-Muttalib, and no one else

titles.arabic: باب تَرْكِ اسْتِعْمَالِ آلِ النَّبِيِّ عَلَى الصَّدَقَةِ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: Not appointing the family of the prophet (saws) in charge of charity

titles.arabic: باب إِبَاحَةِ الْهَدِيَّةِ لِلنَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم وَلِبَنِي هَاشِمٍ وَبَنِي الْمُطَّلِبِ
titles.english: Chapter: Gifts are permissible for the Prophet (saws) and Banu Hashim and Banu Al-Muttalib, even if the giver acquired it by way of charity. When the receipient takes possession of Charity, it is no longer described as charity, and it is permissible for anyone for whom charity is otherwise unlawful

titles.arabic: باب قَبُولِ النَّبِيِّ الْهَدِيَّةَ وَرَدِّهِ الصَّدَقَةَ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The prophet (saws) accepted gifts but refused Charity

titles.arabic: باب الدُّعَاءِ لِمَنْ أَتَى بِصَدَقَتِهِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The supplication for the one who brings Charity

titles.arabic: باب إِرْضَاءِ السَّاعِي مَا لَمْ يَطْلُبْ حَرَامًا ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Pleasing the Zakat Collector unless he asks for something unlawful

titles.arabic: باب فَضْلِ شَهْرِ رَمَضَانَ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Virtues of the month of Ramadan

titles.arabic: بَاب وُجُوبِ صَوْمِ رَمَضَانَ لِرُؤْيَةِ الْهِلَالِ وَالْفِطْرِ لِرُؤْيَةِ الْهِلَالِ وَأَنَّهُ إِذَا غُمَّ فِي أَوَّلِهِ أَوْ آخِرِهِ أُكْمِلَتْ عِدَّةُ الشَّهْرِ ثَلَاثِينَ يَوْمًا
titles.english: Chapter: The obligation to fast Ramadan when the crescent is sighted, and to break the fast when the crescent is sighted, and that if it is cloudy at the beginning or end of the month, then the month should be completed as thirty days.

titles.arabic: باب لاَ تَقَدَّمُوا رَمَضَانَ بِصَوْمِ يَوْمٍ وَلاَ يَوْمَيْنِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Do not start fasting one or two days before Ramadan

titles.arabic: باب الشَّهْرُ يَكُونُ تِسْعًا وَعِشْرِينَ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The month may be twenty-nine days

titles.arabic: باب بَيَانِ أَنَّ لِكُلِّ بَلَدٍ رُؤْيَتَهُمْ وَأَنَّهُمْ إِذَا رَأَوْا الْهِلَالَ بِبَلَدٍ لَا يَثْبُتُ حُكْمُهُ لِمَا بَعُدَ عَنْهُمْ
titles.english: Chapter: Each land has its own sighting of the moon, and if they see the crescent in one land, that does not necessarily apply to regions that are far away from it

titles.arabic: باب بَيَانِ أَنَّهُ لَا اعْتِبَارَ بِكُبْرِ الْهِلَالِ وَصِغَرِهِ وَأَنَّ اللَّهَ تَعَالَى أَمَدَّهُ لِلرُّؤْيَةِ فَإِنْ غُمَّ فَلْيُكْمَلْ ثَلَاثُونَ
titles.english: Chapter: Clarifying that it does not matter whether the crescent is large or small, for Allah, the Most High, causes it to appear for long enough that people can see it, and if it is cloudy then thirty days should be completed

titles.arabic: باب بَيَانِ مَعْنَى قَوْلِهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ شَهْرَا عِيدٍ لَا يَنْقُصَانِ
titles.english: Chapter: The meaning of the Prophet's words: "The two months of 'Id cannot both be incomplete"

titles.arabic: بَاب بَيَانِ أَنَّ الدُّخُولَ فِي الصَّوْمِ يَحْصُلُ بِطُلُوعِ الْفَجْرِ وَأَنَّ لَهُ الْأَكْلَ وَغَيْرَهُ حَتَّى يَطْلُعَ الْفَجْرُ وَبَيَانِ صِفَةِ الْفَجْرِ الَّذِي تَتَعَلَّقُ بِهِ الْأَحْكَامُ مِنْ الدُّخُولِ فِي الصَّوْمِ وَدُخُولِ وَقْتِ صَلَاةِ الصُّبْحِ وَغَيْرِ ذَلِكَ
titles.english: Chapter: Clarifying that fasting begins at dawn, and a person may eat and other than that until dawn begins; And clarifying the dawn which has to do with the rulings concerning the beginning of fasting and the beginning of the time for the Subh Prayer, and other than that, which is the Second Dawn, which is called the True Dawn. The First Dawn, which is the False Dawn, has nothing to do with the rulings

titles.arabic: باب فَضْلِ السُّحُورِ وَتَأْكِيدِ اسْتِحْبَابِهِ وَاسْتِحْبَابِ تَأْخِيرِهِ وَتَعْجِيلِ الْفِطْرِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The virtue of sahur, which is recommended. It is recommended to delay it and to hasten the breaking of the fast

titles.arabic: باب بَيَانِ وَقْتِ انْقِضَاءِ الصَّوْمِ وَخُرُوجِ النَّهَارِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Clarifying the time for ending the fast and the end of the day

titles.arabic: باب النَّهْىِ عَنِ الْوِصَالِ، فِي الصَّوْمِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The prohibition of Al-Wisal

titles.arabic: باب بَيَانِ أَنَّ الْقُبْلَةَ فِي الصَّوْمِ لَيْسَتْ مُحَرَّمَةً عَلَى مَنْ لَمْ تُحَرِّكْ شَهْوَتَهُ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Clarifying that Kissing when fasting is not unlawful for the one whose desire is not provoked by that

titles.arabic: باب صِحَّةِ صَوْمِ مَنْ طَلَعَ عَلَيْهِ الْفَجْرُ وَهُوَ جُنُبٌ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The fasting is valid for the one who is Junub when dawn comes

titles.arabic: باب تَغْلِيظِ تَحْرِيمِ الْجِمَاعِ فِي نَهَارِ رَمَضَانَ عَلَى الصَّائِمِ وَوُجُوبِ الْكَفَّارَةِ الْكُبْرَى فِيهِ وبيانها وأنها تجب على الموسر والمعسر وتثبت في ذمة المعسر حتى يستطيع
titles.english: Chapter: The strict prohibition of intercourse during the day in Ramadan for one who is fasting; And the obligation of offering major expiation and the definition thereof; And that it is obligatory for both the one who can afford it and the one who cannot afford it, and it remains an obligation for the one who cannot afford it until he has the means

titles.arabic: باب جواز الصوم والفطر في شهر رمضان للمسافر في غير معصية إذا كان سفره مرحلتين فأكثر وأن الأفضل لمن أطاقه بلا ضرر أن يصوم ولمن يشق عليه أن يفطر
titles.english: Chapter: It is permissible to fast or not to fast during Ramadan for one who is travelling for no sinful purpose, if his journey is two stages or further. But it is better for the one who is able to fast without suffering any harm to do so, and the one for whom it is difficult may break the fast

titles.arabic: باب أَجْرِ الْمُفْطِرِ فِي السَّفَرِ إِذَا تَوَلَّى الْعَمَلَ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The reward of the one who does not fast when travelling if he does any tasks that are required

titles.arabic: باب التَّخْيِيرِ فِي الصَّوْمِ وَالْفِطْرِ فِي السَّفَرِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The choice between fasting and not fasting when travelling

titles.arabic: باب اسْتِحْبَابِ الْفِطْرِ لِلْحَاجِّ بِعَرَفَاتٍ يَوْمَ عَرَفَةَ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: It is recommended for the person performing Hajj in 'Arafat not to fast on the day of 'Arafah.

titles.arabic: باب صَوْمِ يَوْمِ عَاشُورَاءَ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Fasting on the day of Ashura'

titles.arabic: باب أَىُّ يَوْمٍ يُصَامُ فِي عَاشُورَاءَ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Which day should be fasted for 'Ashura?

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ أَكَلَ فِي عَاشُورَاءَ فَلْيَكُفَّ بَقِيَّةَ يَوْمِهِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Whoever eats on'Ashura, let him refrain (from eating) for the rest of the day

titles.arabic: باب النَّهْىِ عَنْ صَوْمِ، يَوْمِ الْفِطْرِ وَيَوْمِ الأَضْحَى ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The prohibition of fasting on the two days of 'Id

titles.arabic: باب تَحْرِيمِ صَوْمِ أَيَّامِ التَّشْرِيقِ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: The prohibition of fasting the days of At-Tashriq, which are the days of eating, drinking and remembering Allah, The Mighty and Sublime

titles.arabic: باب كَرَاهِيَةِ صِيَامِ يَوْمِ الْجُمُعَةِ مُنْفَرِدًا
titles.english: Chapter: It is disliked to single out Friday for fasting, unless it coincides with a day that one customarily fasts

titles.arabic: باب بَيَانِ نَسْخِ قَوْلِهِ تَعَالَى ‏{‏ وَعَلَى الَّذِينَ يُطِيقُونَه} فِدْيَةٌ بِقَوْلِهِ فَمَنْ شَهِدَ مِنْكُمْ الشَّهْرَ فَلْيَصُمْهُ
titles.english: Chapter: The Saying of Allah Most High: "... And as for those who can fast with difficulty, they have) a choice either to fast or) to feed a Miskin (poor person) (for every day)" is Abrogated by His saying: "... So whoever of you sights (the crescent on the first night of) the month (of Ramadan i.e. is present at his home), he must observe Sawm (fasts) that month"...

titles.arabic: باب قَضَاءِ رَمَضَانَ فِي شَعْبَانَ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: It is Permissible to delay making up missed Ramadan Fasts until before the next Ramadan comes, and this is for those who broke the fast for a reason such as sickness, travel, menstruation and the like

titles.arabic: باب قَضَاءِ الصِّيَامِ عَنِ الْمَيِّتِ
titles.english: Chapter: Making up fasts on behalf of the deceased

titles.arabic: باب الصَّائِمِ يُدْعَى لِطَعَامٍ أَوْ يُقَاتَلُ فَلْيَقُلْ إِنِّي صَائِمٌ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: If a fasting person is invited to eat and he does not want to break his fast, or someone insults him or argues with him, it is recommended for him to say: "I am Fasting", and he should protect his fast from obscene speech, ignorance and the like

titles.arabic: باب حِفْظِ اللِّسَانِ لِلصَّائِمِ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: Guarding One's Tongue when Fasting

titles.arabic: باب فَضْلِ الصِّيَامِ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Virtue of Fasting

titles.arabic: باب فَضْلِ الصِّيَامِ فِي سَبِيلِ اللَّهِ لِمَنْ يُطِيقُهُ بِلاَ ضَرَرٍ وَلاَ تَفْوِيتِ حَقٍّ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Virtue of Fasting for in the cause of Allah, for those who are able to without suffering any harm or neglecting other duties

titles.arabic: بَاب جَوَازِ صَوْمِ النَّافِلَةِ بِنِيَّةٍ مِنْ النَّهَارِ قَبْلَ الزَّوَالِ وَجَوَازِ فِطْرِ الصَّائِمِ نَفْلًا مِنْ غَيْرِ عُذْرٍ
titles.english: Chapter: It is permissible to observe a voluntary fast with an intention formed during the day before the sun reaches its Zenith, and it is permissible for one who is observing a voluntary fast to break his fast with no excuse, although it is better for him to complete it

titles.arabic: باب أَكْلُ النَّاسِي وَشُرْبُهُ وَجِمَاعُهُ لاَ يُفْطِرُ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: The one who eats, drinks, or has intercourse by mistake does not break his fast

titles.arabic: بَاب صِيَامِ النَّبِيِّ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ فِي غَيْرِ رَمَضَانَ وَاسْتِحْبَابِ أَنْ لَا يُخْلِيَ شَهْرًا عَنْ صَوْمٍ
titles.english: Chapter: The Prophet's Fasts at times other than Ramadan; and it is recommended to ensure that no month is free of fasting

titles.arabic: بَاب النَّهْيِ عَنْ صَوْمِ الدَّهْرِ لِمَنْ تَضَرَّرَ بِهِ أَوْ فَوَّتَ بِهِ حَقًّا أَوْ لَمْ يُفْطِرْ الْعِيدَيْنِ وَالتَّشْرِيقَ وَبَيَانِ تَفْضِيلِ صَوْمِ يَوْمٍ وَإِفْطَارِ يَوْمٍ
titles.english: Chapter: Prohibition of Fasting for a lifetime for the one who will be harmed by that or who will neglect other duties, or does not break his fast on the two 'Ids or during the days of At-Tashriq; It is better to fast alternate days

titles.arabic: باب اسْتِحْبَابِ صِيَامِ ثَلَاثَةِ أَيَّامٍ مِنْ كُلِّ شَهْرٍ وَصَوْمِ يَوْمِ عَرَفَةَ وَعَاشُورَاءَ وَالِاثْنَيْنِ وَالْخَمِيسِ
titles.english: Chapter: It is recommended to fast three days of every month, and to fast on the days of 'Arafah and 'Ashura', and to fast on Mondays and Thursdays

titles.arabic: باب صَوْمِ سَرَرِ شَعْبَانَ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: Fasting at the end of Sha'ban

titles.arabic: باب فَضْلِ صَوْمِ الْمُحَرَّمِ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: The virtue of fasting Muharram

titles.arabic: باب اسْتِحْبَابِ صَوْمِ سِتَّةِ أَيَّامٍ مِنْ شَوَّالٍ اتِّبَاعًا لِرَمَضَانَ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: It is recommended to fast Six Days in Shawwal following Ramadan

titles.arabic: باب فَضْلِ لَيْلَةِ الْقَدْرِ وَالْحَثِّ عَلَى طَلَبِهَا وَبَيَانِ مَحَلِّهَا وَأَرْجَى أَوْقَاتِ طَلَبِهَا
titles.english: Chapter: The virtue of Lailat Al-Qadr and the Exhortation to seek it; When it is and the most likely times to seek it

titles.arabic: باب اعْتِكَافِ الْعَشْرِ الأَوَاخِرِ مِنْ رَمَضَانَ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: I'tikaf during the last ten days of Ramadan

titles.arabic: باب مَتَى يَدْخُلُ مَنْ أَرَادَ الاِعْتِكَافَ فِي مُعْتَكَفِهِ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: When should the one who wants to observe I'tikaf enter his place of I'tikaf ?

titles.arabic: باب الاِجْتِهَادِ فِي الْعَشْرِ الأَوَاخِرِ مِنْ شَهْرِ رَمَضَانَ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: Striving harder in worship during the last ten days of Ramadan

titles.arabic: باب صَوْمِ عَشْرِ ذِي الْحِجَّةِ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: Fasting the (first) ten days of Dhul Hijjah

titles.arabic: باب مَا يُبَاحُ لِلْمُحْرِمِ بِحَجٍّ أَوْ عُمْرَةٍ وَمَا لاَ يُبَاحُ وَبَيَانِ تَحْرِيمِ الطِّيبِ عَلَيْهِ
titles.english: Chapter: What one who has entered Ihram for Hajj or Umrah is permitted to wear, and what is not permissible, and perfume is forbidden for him

titles.arabic: باب مَوَاقِيتِ الْحَجِّ وَالْعُمْرَةِ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Mawaqit of Hajj

titles.arabic: باب التَّلْبِيَةِ وَصِفَتِهَا وَوَقْتِهَا ‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Talbiyah, its description and timing

titles.arabic: باب أَمْرِ أَهْلِ الْمَدِينَةِ بِالإِحْرَامِ مِنْ عِنْدِ مَسْجِدِ ذِي الْحُلَيْفَةِ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: The command to the people of Al-Madinah to enter Ihram from the Masjid at Dhul-Hulaifah

titles.arabic: باب الإِهْلاَلِ مِنْ حَيْثُ تَنْبَعِثُ الرَّاحِلَةُ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: Clarifying that it is better to enter Ihram when a person's mount sets off with him, heading towards Makkah, not straight after the two rak'ah

titles.arabic: باب الصَّلاَةِ فِي مَسْجِدِ ذِي الْحُلَيْفَةِ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: Praying at the Masjid of Dhul-Hulaifah

titles.arabic: باب الطِّيبِ لِلْمُحْرِمِ عِنْدَ الإِحْرَامِ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: It is recommended to apply perfume just before entering Ihram, and it is recommended to use Musk, and it does not matter if its glistening traces remain

titles.arabic: باب تَحْرِيمِ الصَّيْدِ لِلْمُحْرِمِ
titles.english: Chapter: The prohibition of hunting game for the one who has entered Ihram for Hajj or for Umrah or for both

titles.arabic: باب مَا يُنْدَبُ لِلْمُحْرِمِ وَغَيْرِهِ قَتْلُهُ مِنَ الدَّوَابِّ فِي الْحِلِّ وَالْحَرَمِ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: What animals it is recommended for the Muhrim and others to kill inside and outside the Sanctuary

titles.arabic: باب جَوَازِ حَلْقِ الرَّأْسِ لِلْمُحْرِمِ إِذَا كَانَ بِهِ أَذًى وَوُجُوبِ الْفِدْيَةِ لِحَلْقِهِ وَبَيَانِ قَدْرِهَا
titles.english: Chapter: It is permissible for a Muhrim to shave his head if there is a problem, but it is obligatory to offer a Fidyah for shaving it, and Clarifying what the Fidyah is

titles.arabic: باب جَوَازِ الْحِجَامَةِ لِلْمُحْرِمِ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: Cupping is permissible for the Muhrim (pilgrim in Ihram)

titles.arabic: باب جَوَازِ مُدَاوَاةِ الْمُحْرِمِ عَيْنَيْهِ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: It is permissible for a Muhrim to treat his eyes

titles.arabic: باب جَوَازِ غَسْلِ الْمُحْرِمِ بَدَنَهُ وَرَأْسَهُ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: It is permissible for the Muhrim to wash his body and head

titles.arabic: باب مَا يُفْعَلُ بِالْمُحْرِمِ إِذَا مَاتَ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: What should be done with a Muhrim if he dies?

titles.arabic: باب جَوَازِ اشْتِرَاطِ الْمُحْرِمِ التَّحَلُّلَ بِعُذْرِ الْمَرَضِ وَنَحْوِهِ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: It is permissible for the Muhrim to stipulate a condition for exiting Ihram because of sickness and the like

titles.arabic: باب إِحْرَامِ النُّفَسَاءِ وَاسْتِحْبَابِ اغْتِسَالِهَا لِلإِحْرَامِ وَكَذَا الْحَائِضِ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: The soundness of Ihram for the woman in Nifas; It is recommended for her to perform Ghusl before entering Ihram, and the same applies to one who is menstruating

titles.arabic: باب بَيَانِ وُجُوهِ الإِحْرَامِ وَأَنَّهُ يَجُوزُ إِفْرَادُ الْحَجِّ وَالتَّمَتُّعِ وَالْقِرَانِ وَجَوَازِ إِدْخَالِ الْحَجِّ عَلَى الْعُمْرَةِ وَمَتَى يَحِلُّ الْقَارِنُ مِنْ نُسُكِهِ
titles.english: Chapter: Clarifying the types of Ihram; and that it is permissible to perfom Hajj that is Ifrad, Tamattu and Qiran. It is permissible to join Hajj to Umrah. And when the pilgrim who is performing Qiran should exit Ihram

titles.arabic: باب فِي الْمُتْعَةِ بِالْحَجِّ وَالْعُمْرَةِ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: Tamattu with Hajj and Umrah

titles.arabic: باب حَجَّةِ النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم ‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Hajj of the Prophet saws

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ أَنَّ عَرَفَةَ كُلَّهَا مَوْقِفٌ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: All of Arafat is a place of standing

titles.arabic: باب فِي الْوُقُوفِ وَقَوْلِهِ تَعَالَى ‏ {‏ ثُمَّ أَفِيضُوا مِنْ حَيْث أَفَاضَ النَّاسُ}
titles.english: Chapter: The Standing and the Saying of Allah, The Most High: "Then depart from the place whence all the people depart"

titles.arabic: باب فِي نَسْخِ التَّحَلُّلِ مِنَ الإِحْرَامِ وَالأَمْرِ بِالتَّمَامِ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: It is permissible to base one's intention for Ihram on the intention of another

titles.arabic: باب جَوَازِ التَّمَتُّعِ
titles.english: Chapter: The Permissibilty of Tamattu'

titles.arabic: باب وُجُوبِ الدَّمِ عَلَى الْمُتَمَتِّعِ وَأَنَّهُ إِذَا عَدِمَهُ لَزِمَهُ صَوْمُ ثَلاَثَةِ أَيَّامٍ فِي الْحَجِّ وَسَبْعَةٍ إِذَا رَجَعَ إِلَى أَهْلِهِ
titles.english: Chapter: The Obligation For the Pilgrim who is performing Tamattu' to offer a sacrifice; If he has no animal to sacrifice, he must fast for three days during Hajj and seven days when he goes back to his family

titles.arabic: باب بَيَانِ أَنَّ الْقَارِنَ لاَ يَتَحَلَّلُ إِلاَّ فِي وَقْتِ تَحَلُّلِ الْحَاجِّ الْمُفْرِدِ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: The pilgrim performing Qiran should not exit Ihram except when the pilgrims performing Ifrad exit Ihram

titles.arabic: باب بَيَانِ جَوَازِ التَّحَلُّلِ بِالإِحْصَارِ وَجَوَازِ الْقِرَانِ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: It is permissible to exit Ihram if one is prevented from completing Hajj; It is permissible to perform Qiran and the pilgrim performing Qiran should perform just one Tawaf and one Sa'i

titles.arabic: باب فِي الإِفْرَادِ وَالْقِرَانِ بِالْحَجِّ وَالْعُمْرَةِ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: Ifrad and Qiran

titles.arabic: باب مَا يَلْزَمُ مَنْ أَحْرَمَ بِالْحَجِّ ثُمَّ قَدِمَ مَكَّةَ مِنَ الطَّوَافِ وَالسَّعْىِ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: It is recommended for the pilgrim to perform Tawaf Al-Qudum and As-Sa'i after it

titles.arabic: باب مَا يَلْزَمُ مَنْ طَافَ بِالْبَيْتِ وَسَعَى مِنَ الْبَقَاءِ عَلَى الإِحْرَامِ وَتَرْكِ التَّحَلُّلِ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: Clarifying that the pilgrim who has entered Ihram for Umrah should not exit Ihram after performing Tawaf before Sa'i; And the pilgrim who has entered Ihram for Hajj should not exit Ihram after performing Tawaf Al-Qudum, and the same applies to the pilgrim performing Qiran

titles.arabic: باب فِي مُتْعَةِ الْحَجِّ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: Tamattu' in Hajj

titles.arabic: باب جَوَازِ الْعُمْرَةِ فِي أَشْهُرِ الْحَجِّ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: It is permissible to perform 'Umrah during the months of Hajj

titles.arabic: باب تَقْلِيدِ الْهَدْىِ وَإِشْعَارِهِ عِنْدَ الإِحْرَامِ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: Marking and Garlanding the sacrificial animal when entering Ihram

titles.arabic: باب التَّقْصِيرِ فِي الْعُمْرَةِ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: It is permissible for the pilgrim performing Umrah to shorten his hair and he does not have to shave it. It is recommended for him to shave his hair or shorten it at Al-Marwah

titles.arabic: باب إِهْلاَلِ النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم وَهَدْيِهِ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Ihram and Hadi of the Prophet (saws)

titles.arabic: باب بَيَانِ عَدَدِ عُمَرِ النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم وَزَمَانِهِنَّ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: The number of Umrahs performed by the prophet (saws) and when he performed them

titles.arabic: باب فَضْلِ الْعُمْرَةِ فِي رَمَضَانَ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: The virtue of the Umrah performed during Ramadan

titles.arabic: باب اسْتِحْبَابِ دُخُولِ مَكَّةَ مِنَ الثَّنِيَّةِ الْعُلْيَا وَالْخُرُوجِ مِنْهَا مِنَ الثَّنِيَّةِ السُّفْلَى وَدُخُولِ بَلْدَةٍ مِنْ طَرِيقٍ غَيْرِ الَّتِي خَرَجَ مِنْهَا
titles.english: Chapter: It is recommended to enter Makkah from the Upper Mountain Pass and to leave from the Lower Mountain Pass; Entering a city via a route different than the one by which you leave it

titles.arabic: باب اسْتِحْبَابِ الْمَبِيتِ بِذِي طَوًى عِنْدَ إِرَادَةِ دُخُولِ مَكَّةَ وَالاِغْتِسَالِ لِدُخُولِهَا نَهَارًا
titles.english: Chapter: It is recommended to stay overnight in Dhu Tuwa when intending to enter Makkah, and to perform Ghusl before entering it, and to enter it by day

titles.arabic: باب اسْتِحْبَابِ الرَّمَلِ فِي الطَّوَافِ وَالْعُمْرَةِ وَفِي الطَّوَافِ الأَوَّلِ فِي الْحَجِّ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: Raml (walking rapidly) is recommended in the Tawaf of Umrah, and in the first Tawaf of Hajj

titles.arabic: باب اسْتِحْبَابِ اسْتِلاَمِ الرُّكْنَيْنِ الْيَمَانِيَيْنِ فِي الطَّوَافِ دُونَ الرُّكْنَيْنِ الآخَرَيْن
titles.english: Chapter: It is recommended to touch the two Yemeni Corners in Tawaf and not the other two corners

titles.arabic: باب اسْتِحْبَابِ تَقْبِيلِ الْحَجَرِ الأَسْوَدِ فِي الطَّوَافِ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: It is recommended to kiss the black stone during circumambulation (Tawaf)

titles.arabic: باب جَوَازِ الطَّوَافِ عَلَى بَعِيرٍ وَغَيْرِهِ وَاسْتِلاَمِ الْحَجَرِ بِمِحْجَنٍ وَنَحْوِهِ لِلرَّاكِبِ
titles.english: Chapter: It is permissible to circumambulate the Ka'bah on a camel and the like, And for one who is riding to touch the (black) stone with a crooked staff and the like.

titles.arabic: باب بَيَانِ أَنَّ السَّعْىَ بَيْنَ الصَّفَا وَالْمَرْوَةِ رُكْنٌ لاَ يَصِحُّ الْحَجُّ إِلاَّ بِهِ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: Clarifying that Sa'i between As-safa and Al-Marwah is a pillar of Hajj, without which Hajj is not valid

titles.arabic: باب بَيَانِ أَنَّ السَّعْىَ لاَ يُكَرَّرُ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: Clarifying that Sa'i should not be repeated

titles.arabic: باب اسْتِحْبَابِ إِدَامَةِ الْحَاجِّ التَّلْبِيَةَ حَتَّى يَشْرَعَ فِي رَمْىِ جَمْرَةِ الْعَقَبَةِ يَوْمَ النَّحْرِ
titles.english: Chapter: It is recommended for the pilgrim to continue reciting the Talbiyah until he starts stoning Jamrat Al-'Aqabah on the day of sacrifice

titles.arabic: باب التَّلْبِيَةِ وَالتَّكْبِيرِ فِي الذِّهَابِ مِنْ مِنًى إِلَى عَرَفَاتٍ فِي يَوْمِ عَرَفَةَ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Talbiyah and the Takbir when going from Mina to 'Arafat on the day of 'Arafat

titles.arabic: باب الإِفَاضَةِ مِنْ عَرَفَاتٍ إِلَى الْمُزْدَلِفَةِ وَاسْتِحْبَابِ صَلاَتَىِ الْمَغْرِبِ وَالْعِشَاءِ جَمْعًا بِالْمُزْدَلِفَةِ فِي هَذِهِ اللَّيْلَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: Departing from 'Arafat to Al-Muzdalifah. It is recommended to pray Maghrib and 'Isha together in Al-Muzdalifah on this night

titles.arabic: باب اسْتِحْبَابِ زِيَادَةِ التَّغْلِيسِ بِصَلاَةِ الصُّبْحِ يَوْمَ النَّحْرِ بِالْمُزْدَلِفَةِ وَالْمُبَالَغَةِ فِيهِ بَعْدَ تَحَقُّقِ طُلُوعِ الْفَجْرِ
titles.english: Chapter: It is recommended to pray Subh when it is still dark on the day of sacrifice in Al-Muzdalifah, and to do it very early after ascertaining that dawn has broken

titles.arabic: باب اسْتِحْبَابِ تَقْدِيمِ دَفْعِ الضَّعَفَةِ مِنَ النِّسَاءِ وَغَيْرِهِنَّ مِنْ مُزْدَلِفَةَ إِلَى مِنًى فِي أَوَاخِرِ اللَّيَالِي قَبْلَ زَحْمَةِ النَّاسِ وَاسْتِحْبَابِ الْمُكْثِ لِغَيْرِهِمْ حَتَّى يُصَلُّوا الصُّبْحَ بِمُزْدَلِفَةَ
titles.english: Chapter: It is recommended to send the weak among women and others ahead from Al-Muzdalifah to Mina at the end of the night, before it gets crowded, but it is recommended for others to stay there until they have prayed Subh in Al-Muzdalifah

titles.arabic: باب رَمْىِ جَمْرَةِ الْعَقَبَةِ مِنْ بَطْنِ الْوَادِي وَتَكُونُ مَكَّةُ عَنْ يَسَارِهِ وَيُكَبِّرُ مَعَ كُلِّ حَصَاةٍ
titles.english: Chapter: Stoning Jamrat Al-'Aqabah from the bottom of the valley; Makkah should be on to one's left and one should say Takbir with each throw

titles.arabic: باب اسْتِحْبَابِ رَمْىِ جَمْرَةِ الْعَقَبَةِ يَوْمَ النَّحْرِ رَاكِبًا وَبَيَانِ قَوْلِهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ تَعَالَى عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ: «لِتَأْخُذُوا مَنَاسِكَكُمْ»
titles.english: Chapter: It is recommended to stone Jamrat Al-'Aqabah, on the day of sacrifice, riding, and the prophet saws said: "Learn your rituals (of Hajj) from me"

titles.arabic: باب اسْتِحْبَابِ كَوْنِ حَصَى الْجِمَارِ بِقَدْرِ حَصَى الْخَذْفِ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: It is recommended for the pebbles used for stoning to be the size of broad beans

titles.arabic: باب بَيَانِ وَقْتِ اسْتِحْبَابِ الرَّمْىِ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: The time when it is recommended to stone the Jamrah

titles.arabic: باب بَيَانِ أَنَّ حَصَى الْجِمَارِ سَبْعٌ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: The number of pebbles for stoning the Jamrahs is seven at a time

titles.arabic: باب تَفْضِيلِ الْحَلْقِ عَلَى التَّقْصِيرِ وَجَوَازِ التَّقْصِيرِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Shaving the head is preferrable to cutting the hair, although cutting the hair is permissible

titles.arabic: باب بَيَانِ أَنَّ السُّنَّةَ يَوْمَ النَّحْرِ أَنْ يَرْمِيَ ثُمَّ يَنْحَرَ ثُمَّ يَحْلِقَ وَالاِبْتِدَاءِ فِي الْحَلْقِ بِالْجَانِبِ الأَيْمَنِ مِنْ رَأْسِ الْمَحْلُوقِ
titles.english: Chapter: The Sunnah on the day of sacrifice is to stone the Jamrah, then offer the sacrifice, then shave the head, and shaving should be started on the right side of the head

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ حَلَقَ قَبْلَ النَّحْرِ أَوْ نَحَرَ قَبْلَ الرَّمْىِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: It is permissible to offer the sacrifice before stoning the Jamrah, or to shave before offering the sacrifice or stoning the Jamrah, or to perform Tawaf before any of them

titles.arabic: باب اسْتِحْبَابِ طَوَافِ الإِفَاضَةِ يَوْمَ النَّحْرِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: It is recommended to perform Tawaf Al-Ifadah on the day of sacrifice

titles.arabic: باب اسْتِحْبَابِ النُّزُولِ بِالْمُحَصَّبِ يَوْمَ النَّفْرِ وَالصَّلاَةِ بِهِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: It is recommended to halt at Al-Muhassab on the day of departing from Mina and to perform Zuhr and subsequent prayers there

titles.arabic: باب وُجُوبِ الْمَبِيتِ بِمِنًى لَيَالِيَ أَيَّامِ التَّشْرِيقِ وَالتَّرْخِيصِ فِي تَرْكِهِ لأَهْلِ السِّقَايَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: It is obligatory to stay overnight in Mina during the nights of the days of At-Tashriq, and the concession allowing those who supply water to leave

titles.arabic: باب فِي الصَّدَقَةِ بِلُحُومِ الْهَدْىِ وَجُلُودِهَا وَجِلاَلِهَا ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Giving the meat, skin and blankets of the Hadi in charity; the butcher should not be given any of it; It is permissible to delegate someone else to offer the sacrifice

titles.arabic: باب الاِشْتِرَاكِ فِي الْهَدْىِ وَإِجْزَاءِ الْبَقَرَةِ وَالْبَدَنَةِ كُلٍّ مِنْهُمَا عَنْ سَبْعَةٍ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: It is permissible to share in the sacrifice, and a camel or a cow is sufficient for seven people

titles.arabic: باب نَحْرِ الْبُدْنِ قِيَامًا مُقَيَّدَةً ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: It is recommended to sacrifice the camel when it is standing and tied

titles.arabic: باب اسْتِحْبَابِ بَعْثِ الْهَدْىِ إِلَى الْحَرَمِ لِمَنْ لاَ يُرِيدُ الذَّهَابَ بِنَفْسِهِ وَاسْتِحْبَابِ تَقْلِيدِهِ وَفَتْلِ الْقَلاَئِدِ وَأَنَّ بَاعِثَهُ لاَ يَصِيرُ مُحْرِمًا وَلاَ يَحْرُمُ عَلَيْهِ شيء بِذَلِكَ
titles.english: Chapter: It is recommended to send the sacrificial animal to the Haram for one who does not intend to go there himself; It is reommended to garland it and to make the garland, but the one who sends it does not enter a state of Ihram, and nothing is forbidden to him because of that

titles.arabic: باب جَوَازِ رُكُوبِ الْبَدَنَةِ الْمُهْدَاةِ لِمَنِ احْتَاجَ إِلَيْهَا ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: It is permissible to ride the sacrificial animal if necessary

titles.arabic: باب مَا يُفْعَلُ بِالْهَدْىِ إِذَا عَطِبَ فِي الطَّرِيقِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: What should be done with the sacrificial animal if it gets injured on the way?

titles.arabic: باب وُجُوبِ طَوَافِ الْوَدَاعِ وَسُقُوطِهِ عَنِ الْحَائِضِ
titles.english: Chapter: The farewell Tawaf is obligatory, but it is waived in the case of menstruating women

titles.arabic: باب اسْتِحْبَابِ دُخُولِ الْكَعْبَةِ لِلْحَاجِّ وَغَيْرِهِ وَالصَّلاَةِ فِيهَا وَالدُّعَاءِ فِي نَوَاحِيهَا كُلِّهَا
titles.english: Chapter: It is recommended for pilgrims and others to enter the Ka'bah and pray therein, and supplicate in all its corners

titles.arabic: باب نَقْضِ الْكَعْبَةِ وَبِنَائِهَا ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Demolishing the Ka'bah and rebuilding it

titles.arabic: باب جَدْرِ الْكَعْبَةِ وَبَابِهَا ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The wall and the door of the Ka'bah

titles.arabic: باب الْحَجِّ عَنِ الْعَاجِزِ، لِزَمَانَةٍ وَهِرَمٍ وَنَحْوِهِمَا أَوْ لِلْمَوْتِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Hajj on behalf of one who is incapable of doing it because of chronic illness, old age and the like, or on behalf of one who has died

titles.arabic: باب صِحَّةِ حَجِّ الصَّبِيِّ وَأَجْرِ مَنْ حَجَّ بِهِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Validity of a child's hajj, and the reward of the one who takes him for Hajj

titles.arabic: باب فَرْضِ الْحَجِّ مَرَّةً فِي الْعُمْرِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Hajj is obligatory once in a lifetime

titles.arabic: باب سَفَرِ الْمَرْأَةِ مَعَ مَحْرَمٍ إِلَى حَجٍّ وَغَيْرِهِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: A woman travelling with a Mahram for Hajj and other purposes

titles.arabic: باب مَا يَقُولُ إِذَا رَكِبَ إِلَى سَفَرٍ الْحَجِّ وَغَيْرِهِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: It is recommended to recite statements of remembrance when setting out for Hajj or any other purpose, and the best of this remembrances

titles.arabic: باب مَا يَقُولُ إِذَا قَفَلَ مِنْ سَفَرٍ الْحَجِّ وَغَيْرِهِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: What should be said when returning from Hajj and other journeys

titles.arabic: باب التَّعْرِيسِ بِذِي الْحُلَيْفَةِ وَالصَّلاَةِ بِهَا إِذَا صَدَرَ مِنَ الْحَجِّ أَوِ الْعُمْرَةِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: It is recommended to stop in Batha' of Dhul-Hulaifah and pray there when departing from Hajj and 'Umrah, or any time one passes through it

titles.arabic: باب لاَ يَحُجُّ الْبَيْتَ مُشْرِكٌ وَلاَ يَطُوفُ بِالْبَيْتِ عُرْيَانٌ وَبَيَانُ يَوْمِ الْحَجِّ الأَكْبَبَرِ
titles.english: Chapter: No idolator may circumambulate the house, and no one may circumambulate the house naked, and when the greatest day of Hajj is

titles.arabic: باب فِي فَضْلِ الْحَجِّ وَالْعُمْرَةِ وَيَوْمِ عَرَفَةَ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The virtue of the day of 'Arafat

titles.arabic: باب النُّزُولِ بِمَكَّةَ لِلْحَاجِّ وَتَوْرِيثِ دُورِهَا ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Pilgrims staying in Makkah, and Inheriting its houses

titles.arabic: باب جَوَازِ الإِقَامَةِ بِمَكَّةَ لِلْمُهَاجِرِ مِنْهَا بَعْدَ فَرَاغِ الْحَجِّ وَالْعُمْرَةِ ثَلاَثَةَ أَيَّامٍ بِلاَ زِيَادَةٍ
titles.english: Chapter: It is permissible for the one who emigrated from Makkah to stay there for three days after completing Hajj and 'Umrah, and no more than that

titles.arabic: باب تَحْرِيمِ مَكَّةَ وَصَيْدِهَا وَخَلاَهَا وَشَجَرِهَا وَلُقَطَتِهَا إِلاَّ لِمُنْشِدٍ عَلَى الدَّوَام
titles.english: Chapter: The sanctity of Makkah and the sanctity of its game, grasses, trees and lost property, except for the one who announces it, is forever

titles.arabic: باب النَّهْىِ عَنْ حَمْلِ السِّلاَحِ، بِمَكَّةَ بِلاَ حَاجَةٍ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The prohibition of carrying weapons in Makkah when there is no need for that

titles.arabic: باب جَوَازِ دُخُولِ مَكَّةَ بِغَيْرِ إِحْرَامٍ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: It is permissible to enter Makkah without Ihram

titles.arabic: باب فَضْلِ الْمَدِينَةِ وَدُعَاءِ النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم فِيهَا بِالْبَرَكَةِ وَبَيَانِ تَحْرِيمِها وَتَحْرِيمِ صَيْدِهَا وَشَجَرِهَا وَبَيَانِ حُدُودِ حَرَمِهَا
titles.english: Chapter: The virtue of Al-Madinah and the Prophet's Prayer for it to be blessed. Its sanctity and the sanctity of its game and trees. The Boundaries of its sanctuary

titles.arabic: باب التَّرْغِيبِ فِي سُكْنَى الْمَدِينَةِ وَالصَّبْرِ عَلَى لأْوَائِهَا ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Encouragement to live in Al-Madinah and to be patient on bearing its distress and hardships

titles.arabic: باب صِيَانَةِ الْمَدِينَةِ مِنْ دُخُولِ الطَّاعُونِ وَالدَّجَّالِ إِلَيْهَا ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Al-Madinah is protected against the plague and the Dajjal entering it

titles.arabic: باب الْمَدِينَةِ تَنْفِي شِرَارَهَا ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Al-Madinah eliminates its Dross and it is also called Tabah, and Taibah

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ أَرَادَ أَهْلَ الْمَدِينَةِ بِسُوءٍ أَذَابَهُ اللَّهُ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The prohibition of wishing ill towards the people of Al-Madinah, and that the one who wishes them ill will be caused to melt by Allah

titles.arabic: باب التَّرْغِيبِ فِي الْمَدِينَةِ عِنْدَ فَتْحِ الأَمْصَارِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Encouraging people to stay in Al-Madinah when the regions were conquered

titles.arabic: باب فِي الْمَدِينَةِ حِينَ يَتْرُكُهَا أَهْلُهَا ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Prophet saws foretold that the people will abandon Al-Madinah when it is the best it ever was

titles.arabic: باب مَا بَيْنَ الْقَبْرِ وَالْمِنْبَرِ رَوْضَةٌ مِنْ رِيَاضِ الْجَنَّةِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The virtue of the area between the prophet's grave and his Minbar, and the virtue of the spot where his minbar is

titles.arabic: باب أُحُدٌ جَبَلٌ يُحِبُّنَا وَنُحِبُّهُ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The virtue of Uhud

titles.arabic: باب فَضْلِ الصَّلاَةِ بِمَسْجِدَىْ مَكَّةَ وَالْمَدِينَةِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The virtue of praying in the Masajid of Makkah and Al-Madinah

titles.arabic: باب لاَ تُشَدُّ الرِّحَالُ إِلاَّ إِلَى ثَلاَثَةِ مَسَاجِدَ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The virtue of the Three Masajid

titles.arabic: باب بَيَانِ أَنَّ الْمَسْجِدَ الَّذِي أُسِّسَ عَلَى التَّقْوَى هُوَ مَسْجِدُ النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم بِالْمَدِينَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: The Masjid whose foundation was founded upon piety is the Masjid of the Prophet saws in Al-Madinah

titles.arabic: باب فَضْلِ مَسْجِدِ قُبَاءٍ وَفَضْلِ الصَّلاَةِ فِيهِ وَزِيَارَتِهِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The virtue of the Masjid of Quba', and the virtue of praying therein and visiting it

titles.arabic: باب اسْتِحْبَابِ النِّكَاحِ لِمَنْ تَاقَتْ نَفْسُهُ إِلَيْهِ وَوَجَدَ مُؤْنَةً وَاشْتِغَالِ مَنْ عَجَزَ عَنِ الْمُؤَنِ بِالصَّوْمِ
titles.english: Chapter: Marriage is recommended for the one who desires it and can afford it, and the one who cannot afford it should distract himself by fasting

titles.arabic: باب نَدْبِ مَنْ رَأَى امْرَأَةً فَوَقَعَتْ فِي نَفْسِهِ إِلَى أَنْ يَأْتِيَ امْرَأَتَهُ أَوْ جَارِيَتَهُ فَيُوَاقِعَهَا
titles.english: Chapter: Recommendation to the one who sees a woman and is attracted to her, to go to his wife or slave woman and have intercourse with her

titles.arabic: باب نِكَاحِ الْمُتْعَةِ وَبَيَانِ أَنَّهُ أُبِيحَ ثُمَّ نُسِخَ ثُمَّ أُبِيحَ ثُمَّ نُسِخَ وَاسْتَقَرَّ تَحْرِيمُهُ إِلَى يَوْمِ الْقِيَامَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: Mut'ah Marriage: It was permitted then abrograted, then permitted then abrogated, and it will remain Forbidden until the day of resurrection

titles.arabic: باب تَحْرِيمِ الْجَمْعِ بَيْنَ الْمَرْأَةِ وَعَمَّتِهَا أَوْ خَالَتِهَا فِي النِّكَاحِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The prohibition of being married to a woman and her paternal aunt or maternal aunt at the same time

titles.arabic: باب تَحْرِيمِ نِكَاحِ الْمُحْرِمِ وَكَرَاهَةِ خِطْبَتِهِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The prohibition of marriage for one who is in Ihram, and it is disliked for him to propose marriage

titles.arabic: باب تَحْرِيمِ الْخِطْبَةِ عَلَى خِطْبَةِ أَخِيهِ حَتَّى يَأْذَنَ أَوْ يَتْرُكَ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The prohibition of proposing marriage when one's brother has already proposed, unless he gives permission or gives up the idea

titles.arabic: باب تَحْرِيمِ نِكَاحِ الشِّغَارِ وَبُطْلاَنِهِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Prohibition and invalidity of Shighar Marriage

titles.arabic: باب الْوَفَاءِ بِالشُّرُوطِ فِي النِّكَاحِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Fulfilling the conditions stipulated in the Marriage

titles.arabic: باب اسْتِئْذَانِ الثَّيِّبِ فِي النِّكَاحِ بِالنُّطْقِ وَالْبِكْرِ بِالسُّكُوتِ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: Seeking permission of a previously-married woman in words, and of a virgin by silence

titles.arabic: باب تَزْوِيجِ الأَبِ الْبِكْرَ الصَّغِيرَةَ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: It is permissible for a father to arrange the marriage of a young virgin

titles.arabic: باب اسْتِحْبَابِ التَّزَوُّجِ وَالتَّزْوِيجِ فِي شَوَّالٍ وَاسْتِحْبَابِ الدُّخُولِ فِيهِ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: It is recommended to get married and arrange marriages in Shawwal, and it is recommended to consummate the marriage in that month

titles.arabic: باب نَدْبِ النَّظَرِ إِلَى وَجْهِ الْمَرْأَةِ وَكَفَّيْهَا لِمَنْ يُرِيدُ تَزَوُّجَهَا ‏
titles.english: Chapter: It is recommended for the one who wants to marry a woman to look at her face and hands before proposing marriage to her

titles.arabic: باب الصَّدَاقِ وَجَوَازِ كَوْنِهِ تَعْلِيمَ قُرْآنٍ وَخَاتَمَ حَدِيدٍ وَغَيْرَ ذَلِكَ مِنْ قَلِيلٍ وَكَثِيرٍ وَاسْتِحْبَابِ كَوْنِهِ خَمْسَمِائَةِ دِرْهَمٍ لِمَنْ لاَ يُجْحَفُ بِهِ
titles.english: Chapter: The Dowry. It is permissible for the dowry to be teaching Quran, a ring of iron or anything else, a small or large amount, And it is recommended for it to be Five Hundred Dirham

titles.arabic: باب فَضِيلَةِ إِعْتَاقِهِ أَمَتَهُ ثُمَّ يَتَزَوَّجُهَا ‏
titles.english: Chapter: The virute of manumitting one's slave girl, then marrying her

titles.arabic: باب زَوَاجِ زَيْنَبَ بِنْتِ جَحْشٍ وَنُزُولِ الْحِجَابِ وَإِثْبَاتِ وَلِيمَةِ الْعُرْسِ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Marriage of Zainab Bint Jahsh, The Revelation of (the verse of) Hijab, and confirmation of the importance of the wedding feast.

titles.arabic: باب الأَمْرِ بِإِجَابَةِ الدَّاعِي إِلَى دَعْوَةٍ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: The command to accept invitations

titles.arabic: باب لاَ تَحِلُّ الْمُطَلَّقَةُ ثَلاَثًا لِمُطَلِّقِهَا حَتَّى تَنْكِحَ زَوْجًا غَيْرَهُ وَيَطَأَهَا ثُمَّ يُفَارِقَهَا وَتَنْقَضِي عِدَّتُهَا
titles.english: Chapter: It is not permissible for a woman who has been thrice-divorced to return to the one who divorced her until she marries another husband who has intercourse with her, then divorces her, and she completes the 'Iddah

titles.arabic: باب مَا يُسْتَحَبُّ أَنْ يَقُولَهُ عِنْدَ الْجِمَاعِ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: What it is recommended to say when having intercourse

titles.arabic: باب جَوَازِ جِمَاعِهِ امْرَأَتَهُ فِي قُبُلِهَا مِنْ قُدَّامِهَا وَمِنْ وَرَائِهَا مِنْ غَيْرِ تَعَرُّضٍ لِلدُّبُرِ
titles.english: Chapter: It is permissible for a man to have intercourse with his wife from the front or from the back, without entering the behind

titles.arabic: باب تَحْرِيمِ امْتِنَاعِهَا مِنْ فِرَاشِ زَوْجِهَا ‏
titles.english: Chapter: It is unlawful for the wife to refuse to come to her husband's bed

titles.arabic: باب تَحْرِيمِ إِفْشَاءِ سِرِّ الْمَرْأَةِ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: The prohibition of disclosing a woman's secrets

titles.arabic: باب حُكْمِ الْعَزْلِ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: The ruling on coitus interrupts ('Azl)

titles.arabic: باب تَحْرِيمِ وَطْءِ الْحَامِلِ الْمَسْبِيَّةِ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: The prohibition of intercourse with a pregnant captive woman

titles.arabic: باب جَوَازِ الْغِيلَةِ وَهِيَ وَطْءُ الْمُرْضِعِ وَكَرَاهَةِ الْعَزْلِ
titles.english: Chapter: It is permissible to have intercourse with a breastfeeding woman (Ghilah), and 'Azl is disliked

titles.arabic: باب يَحْرُمُ مِنَ الرَّضَاعَةِ مَا يَحْرُمُ مِنَ الْوِلاَدَةِ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: "Breastfeeding Makes Unlawful What Birth Makes Unlawful."

titles.arabic: باب تَحْرِيمِ الرَّضَاعَةِ مِنْ مَاءِ الْفَحْلِ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: The prohibition that results from breastfeeding is related to the issue of the male

titles.arabic: باب تَحْرِيمِ ابْنَةِ الأَخِ مِنَ الرَّضَاعَةِ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: The daughter of one's brother through breastfeeding is forbidden in marriage

titles.arabic: باب تَحْرِيمِ الرَّبِيبَةِ وَأُخْتِ الْمَرْأَةِ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: The prohibition of marriage to one's stepdaughter and the sister of one's wife

titles.arabic: باب فِي الْمَصَّةِ وَالْمَصَّتَيْنِ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: One or Two sucks

titles.arabic: باب التَّحْرِيمِ بِخَمْسِ رَضَعَاتٍ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: Becoming Mahram is established by Five Breastfeedings

titles.arabic: باب رَضَاعَةِ الْكَبِيرِ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: Breastfeeding an adult

titles.arabic: باب إِنَّمَا الرَّضَاعَةُ مِنَ الْمَجَاعَةِ
