titles.english: Chapter: Breastfeeding is because of Hunger (meaning, during infancy)

titles.arabic: باب جَوَازِ وَطْءِ الْمَسْبِيَّةِ بَعْدَ الاِسْتِبْرَاءِ وَإِنْ كَانَ لَهَا زَوْجٌ انْفَسَخَ نِكَاحُهَا بِالسَّبْي
titles.english: Chapter: It is permissible to have intercourse with a female captive after it is established that she is not pregnant, and if she has a husband, then her marriage is annulled when she is captured

titles.arabic: باب الْوَلَدِ لِلْفِرَاشِ وَتَوَقِّي الشُّبُهَاتِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The child is for the bed and suspicion must be avoided

titles.arabic: باب الْعَمَلِ بِإِلْحَاقِ الْقَائِفِ الْوَلَدَ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Detecting relationships from physical features

titles.arabic: باب قَدْرِ مَا تَسْتَحِقُّهُ الْبِكْرُ وَالثَّيِّبُ مِنْ إِقَامَةِ الزَّوْجِ عِنْدَهَا عَقِبَ الزِّفَافِ
titles.english: Chapter: How long a virgin and a previously-married woman are entitled to have the husband stay with them after marriage

titles.arabic: باب الْقَسْمِ بَيْنَ الزَّوْجَاتِ وَبَيَانِ أَنَّ السُّنَّةَ أَنْ تَكُونَ لِكُلِّ وَاحِدَةٍ لَيْلَةٌ مَعَ يَوْمِهَا
titles.english: Chapter: Dividing one's time among co-wives; The Sunnah is for each one to have one night and one day

titles.arabic: باب جَوَازِ هِبَتِهَا نَوْبَتَهَا لِضَرَّتِهَا ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: It is permissible for a wife to give her turn to a co-wife

titles.arabic: باب اسْتِحْبَابِ نِكَاحِ ذَاتِ الدِّينِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: It is recommended to marry one who is religiously committed

titles.arabic: باب اسْتِحْبَابِ نِكَاحِ الْبِكْرِ
titles.english: Chapter: It is recommended to marry virgins

titles.arabic: باب خَيْرُ مَتَاعِ الدُّنْيَا الْمَرْأَةُ الصَّالِحَةُ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The best temporary joy of this world is a righteous woman

titles.arabic: باب الْوَصِيَّةِ بِالنِّسَاءِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Advice with regard to women

titles.arabic: باب لَوْلاَ حَوَّاءُ لَمْ تَخُنْ أُنْثَى زَوْجَهَا الدَّهْرَ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Were it not for Hawa', no female would ever betray her husband

titles.arabic: باب تَحْرِيمِ طَلاَقِ الْحَائِضِ بِغَيْرِ رِضَاهَا وَأَنَّهُ لَوْ خَالَفَ وَقَعَ الطَّلاَقُ وَيُؤْمَرُ بِجْعَتِهَا
titles.english: Chapter: The prohibition of divorcing a menstruating woman without her consent; If a man breaks this rule, it still counts as a divorce, and he should be ordered to take her back

titles.arabic: باب طَلاَقِ الثَّلاَثِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Threefold Divorce

titles.arabic: باب وُجُوبِ الْكَفَّارَةِ عَلَى مَنْ حَرَّمَ امْرَأَتَهُ وَلَمْ يَنْوِ الطَّلاَقَ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Expiation must be offered by one who declares his wife to be unlawful for him but does not intend divorce thereby

titles.arabic: باب بَيَانِ أَنَّ تَخْيِيرَ امْرَأَتِهِ لاَ يَكُونُ طَلاَقًا إِلاَّ بِالنِّيَّةِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Giving one's wife the choice does not count as a divorce, unless it is intended as such

titles.arabic: باب فِي الإِيلاَءِ وَاعْتِزَالِ النِّسَاءِ وَتَخْيِيرِهِنَّ وَقَوْلِهِ تَعَالَى: {وَإِنْ تَظَاهَرَا عَلَيْهِ}
titles.english: Chapter: Ila', Keeping away from one's wives and giving them the choice, And the saying of Allah, The Most High: "But if you help one another against him

titles.arabic: باب الْمُطَلَّقَةُ ثَلاَثًا لاَ نَفَقَةَ لَهَا ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The woman who has been irrevocably divorced is not entitled to spending

titles.arabic: باب جَوَازِ خُرُوجِ الْمُعْتَدَّةِ الْبَائِنِ وَالْمُتَوَفَّى عَنْهَا زَوْجُهَا فِي النَّهَارِ لِحَاجَتِهَا
titles.english: Chapter: It is permissible for a woman who is observing 'Iddah after an irrevocable divorce or the death of her husband to go out during the day if she needs to

titles.arabic: باب انْقِضَاءِ عِدَّةِ الْمُتَوَفَّى عَنْهَا زَوْجُهَا وَغَيْرِهَا بِوَضْعِ الْحَمْلِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The 'Iddah of a woman whose husband had died, and the like, ends when she gives birth.

titles.arabic: باب وُجُوبِ الإِحْدَادِ فِي عِدَّةِ الْوَفَاةِ وَتَحْرِيمِهِ فِي غَيْرِ ذَلِكَ إِلاَّ ثَلاَثَةَ أَيَّامٍ
titles.english: Chapter: The Obligation to mourn during the 'Iddah following the death of one's husband, but it is forbidden to mourn for more than three days in other cases

titles.arabic: باب ‏
باب فَضْلِ الْوُضُوءِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The virtue of wudu’

titles.arabic: باب وُجُوبِ الطَّهَارَةِ لِلصَّلاَةِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The obligation of purifying oneself for the salat

titles.arabic: باب صِفَةِ الْوُضُوءِ وَكَمَالِهِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The description of wudu’ and its perfection

titles.arabic: باب فَضْلِ الْوُضُوءِ وَالصَّلاَةِ عَقِبَهُ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The virtue of performing wudu’ and salat

titles.arabic: باب الصَّلَوَاتُ الْخَمْسُ وَالْجُمُعَةُ إِلَى الْجُمُعَةِ وَرَمَضَانُ إِلَى رَمَضَانَ مُكَفِّرَاتٌ لِمَا بَيْنَهُنَّ مَا اجْتُنِبَتِ الْكَبَائِرُ.
titles.english: Chapter: The five daily prayers, from one Jumu`ah to the next, and from one Ramadan to the next, are an expiation for whatever (sins) come in between, so long as one avoids major sins

titles.arabic: باب الذِّكْرِ الْمُسْتَحَبِّ عَقِبَ الْوُضُوءِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Adh-Dhikr (the remembrance) which is recommended following wudu’

titles.arabic: باب فِي وُضُوءِ النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Another description of wudu’

titles.arabic: باب الإِيتَارِ فِي الاِسْتِنْثَارِ وَالاِسْتِجْمَارِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Odd numbers when rinsing the nose and cleaning oneself with pebbles (istijmar)

titles.arabic: باب وُجُوبِ غَسْلِ الرِّجْلَيْنِ بِكَمَالِهِمَا ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The obligation of washing the feet completely

titles.arabic: باب وُجُوبِ اسْتِيعَابِ جَمِيعِ أَجْزَاءِ مَحَلِّ الطَّهَارَةِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The obligation of completely washing all the parts to be washed when purifying oneself

titles.arabic: باب خُرُوجِ الْخَطَايَا مَعَ مَاءِ الْوُضُوءِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Sins exit with the water of wudu’

titles.arabic: باب اسْتِحْبَابِ إِطَالَةِ الْغُرَّةِ وَالتَّحْجِيلِ فِي الْوُضُوءِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The recommendation to increase the area washed for the forehead, arms, and legs well when performing wudu’

titles.arabic: باب تَبْلُغُ الْحِلْيَةُ حَيْث يَبْلُغُ الْوَضُوءُ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Adornment (in the hereafter) will reach as far as the wudu’ reached

titles.arabic: باب فَضْلِ إِسْبَاغِ الْوُضُوءِ عَلَى الْمَكَارِهِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The virtue of isbaghil-wudu’ (performing wudu’ properly) during times when it is difficult to do so

titles.arabic: باب السِّوَاكِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Siwak (tooth-stick)

titles.arabic: باب خِصَالِ الْفِطْرَةِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The characteristics of the fitrah

titles.arabic: باب الاِسْتِطَابَةِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Cleaning oneself after relieving oneself

titles.arabic: باب النَّهْىِ عَنْ الاِسْتِنْجَاءِ، بِالْيَمِينِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The prohibition of cleaning oneself with the right hand

titles.arabic: باب التَّيَمُّنِ فِي الطُّهُورِ وَغَيْرِهِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Starting on the right when purifying oneself and in other matters

titles.arabic: باب النَّهْىِ عَنِ التَّخَلِّي، فِي الطُّرُقِ وَالظِّلاَلِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The prohibition of relieving oneself in the street or in the shade

titles.arabic: باب الاِسْتِنْجَاءِ بِالْمَاءِ مِنَ التَّبَرُّزِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Cleaning oneself with water after defecating

titles.arabic: باب الْمَسْحِ عَلَى الْخُفَّيْنِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Wiping over the khuff (leather socks)

titles.arabic: باب الْمَسْحِ عَلَى النَّاصِيَةِ وَالْعِمَامَةِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Wiping over the forehead and the imamah

titles.arabic: باب التَّوْقِيتِ فِي الْمَسْحِ عَلَى الْخُفَّيْنِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Time-limit for wiping over the khuff

titles.arabic: باب جَوَازِ الصَّلَوَاتِ كُلِّهَا بِوُضُوءٍ وَاحِدٍ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The permissibility of performing all the prayers with one wudu’

titles.arabic: باب كَرَاهَةِ غَمْسِ الْمُتَوَضِّئِ وَغَيْرِهِ يَدَهُ الْمَشْكُوكَ فِي نَجَاسَتِهَا فِي الإِنَاءِ قَبْلَ غَسْلِهَا ثَلاَثًا
titles.english: Chapter: It is disliked for the person who wants to perform wudu’, and others, to put his hand in the vessel (containing water) before washing it three times, if he is not sure whether something impure is on his hands or not

titles.arabic: باب حُكْمِ وُلُوغِ الْكَلْبِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Rulings on what was licked by a dog

titles.arabic: باب النَّهْىِ عَنِ الْبَوْلِ، فِي الْمَاءِ الرَّاكِدِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The prohibition of urinating into standing water

titles.arabic: باب النَّهْىِ عَنْ الاِغْتِسَالِ، فِي الْمَاءِ الرَّاكِدِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Prohibition of performing ghusl in standing water

titles.arabic: باب وُجُوبِ غَسْلِ الْبَوْلِ وَغَيْرِهِ مِنَ النَّجَاسَاتِ إِذَا حَصُلَتْ فِي الْمَسْجِدِ وَأَنَّ الأَرْضَ تَطْهُرُ بِالْمَاءِ مِنْ غَيْرِ حَاجَةٍ إِلَى حَفْرِهَا
titles.english: Chapter: The obligation to wash away urine and other impurities if they result in the Masjid, and the ground may be purified with water with no need to scrub it

titles.arabic: باب حُكْمِ بَوْلِ الطِّفْلِ الرَّضِيعِ وَكَيْفِيَّةِ غَسْلِهِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The ruling on the urine of a nursing infant and how to wash it

titles.arabic: باب حكْمِ الْمَنِيِّ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: The ruling on semen

titles.arabic: باب نَجَاسَةِ الدَّمِ وَكَيْفِيَّةِ غَسْلِهِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The impurity of blood and how to wash it

titles.arabic: باب الدَّلِيلِ عَلَى نَجَاسَةِ الْبَوْلِ وَوُجُوبِ الاِسْتِبْرَاءِ مِنْهُ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The evidence that urine is impure and the obligation to take precautions concerning it

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ أَعْتَقَ شِرْكًا لَهُ فِي عَبْدٍ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: One who frees his share of a slave

titles.arabic: باب ذِكْرِ سِعَايَةِ الْعَبْدِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: A slave working to pay off the other half

titles.arabic: باب إِنَّمَا الْوَلاَءُ لِمَنْ أَعْتَقَ
titles.english: Chapter: Al-Wala' (Right of inheritance) belongs to the one who manumits the slave

titles.arabic: باب النَّهْىِ عَنْ بَيْعِ الْوَلاَءِ، وَهِبَتِهِ، ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The prohibition of selling or giving away the wala'

titles.arabic: باب تَحْرِيمِ تَوَلِّي الْعَتِيقِ غَيْرَ مَوَالِيهِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The prohibition of a manumitted slave taking anyone as a Mawla except the one who manumitted him

titles.arabic: باب فَضْلِ الْعِتْقِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The virtue of manumitting slaves

titles.arabic: باب فَضْلِ عِتْقِ الْوَالِدِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The virtue of manumitting one's father

titles.arabic: باب إِبْطَالِ بَيْعِ الْمُلاَمَسَةِ وَالْمُنَابَذَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: The invalidity of Mulamasah and Munabadhah transactions

titles.arabic: باب بُطْلاَنِ بَيْعِ الْحَصَاةِ وَالْبَيْعِ الَّذِي فِيهِ غَرَرٌ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The invalidity of Hasah transactions and transactions involving ambiguity

titles.arabic: باب تَحْرِيمِ بَيْعِ حَبَلِ الْحَبَلَةِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The prohibition of selling Habl Al-Habalah

titles.arabic: باب تَحْرِيمِ بَيْعِ الرَّجُلِ عَلَى بَيْعِ أَخِيهِ وَسَوْمِهِ عَلَى سَوْمِهِ وَتَحْرِيمِ النَّجْشِ وَتَحْرِيمِ التَّصْرِيَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: The prohibition of urging a buyer to cancel a purchase in order to sell him one's own goods; And urging a seller to cancel a sale already agreed upon so that one can buy the goods oneself; And the prohibition of artificially inflating prices; And the prohibition of letting milk accumulate in the udder in order to deceive the purchaser

titles.arabic: باب تَحْرِيمِ تَلَقِّي الْجَلَبِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The prohibition of intercepting traders

titles.arabic: باب تَحْرِيمِ بَيْعِ الْحَاضِرِ لِلْبَادِي ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The prohibition of the town-dweller selling on behalf of a bedouin

titles.arabic: باب حُكْمِ بَيْعِ الْمُصَرَّاةِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Ruling on selling Al-Musarrah (An animal in whose udder milk has been allowed to accumulate)

titles.arabic: باب بُطْلاَنِ بَيْعِ الْمَبِيعِ قَبْلَ الْقَبْضِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: It is invalid to sell goods before taking possession of them

titles.arabic: باب تَحْرِيمِ بَيْعِ صُبْرَةِ التَّمْرِ الْمَجْهُولَةِ الْقَدْرِ بِتَمْرٍ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The prohibition of selling a heap of dates the weight of which is unknown

titles.arabic: باب ثُبُوتِ خِيَارِ الْمَجْلِسِ لِلْمُتَبَايِعَيْنِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Affirming that both parties to a transaction have the option (of canceling it) while they are still together

titles.arabic: باب الصِّدْقِ فِي الْبَيْعِ وَالْبَيَانِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Honesty in selling and disclosure of defects

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ يُخْدَعُ فِي الْبَيْعِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: One who is deceived in transactions

titles.arabic: باب النَّهْىِ عَنْ بَيْعِ الثِّمَارِ، قَبْلَ بُدُوِّ صَلاَحِهَا بِغَيْرِ شَرْطِ الْقَطْعِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The prohibition of selling produce before its goodness appears

titles.arabic: باب تَحْرِيمِ بَيْعِ الرُّطَبِ بِالتَّمْرِ إِلاَّ فِي الْعَرَايَا ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The prohibition of selling fresh dates in exchange for dry dates except in the case of 'Araya

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ بَاعَ نَخْلاً عَلَيْهَا ثَمَرٌ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: One who sells date palms on which there are dates

titles.arabic: باب النَّهْيِ عَنِ الْمُحَاقَلَةِ وَالْمُزَابَنَةِ وَعَنِ الْمُخَابَرَةِ وَبَيْعِ الثَّمَرَةِ قَبْلَ بُدُوِّ صَلاَحِهَا وَعَنْ بَيْعِ الْمُعَاوَمَةِ وَهُوَ بَيْعُ السِّنِينَ
titles.english: Chapter: The prohibition of Muhaqalah and Muzabanah and Mukhabarah: and selling produce before its goodness appears, and Mu'awamah: which is selling years in advance

titles.arabic: باب كِرَاءِ الأَرْضِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Kira (leasing Land)

titles.arabic: باب كِرَاءِ الأَرْضِ بِالطَّعَامِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Leasing out Land (Kira) in return for food

titles.arabic: باب كِرَاءِ الأَرْضِ بِالذَّهَبِ وَالْوَرِقِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Leasing out Land (Kira) for gold and silver

titles.arabic: باب فِي الْمُزَارَعَةِ وَالْمُؤَاجَرَةِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Muzura'ah (Sharecropping) and Mu'ajarah

titles.arabic: باب الأَرْضِ تُمْنَحُ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Lending Land

titles.arabic: باب الْمُسَاقَاةِ وَالْمُعَامَلَةِ بِجُزْءٍ مِنَ الثَّمَرِ وَالزَّرْعِ
titles.english: Chapter: Musaqah And Mu'amalah in return for a share of the fruit and crops

titles.arabic: باب فَضْلِ الْغَرْسِ وَالزَّرْعِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Virtue of Planting and Cultivating

titles.arabic: باب وَضْعِ الْجَوَائِحِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Waiving Payment in the case of Blight

titles.arabic: باب اسْتِحْبَابِ الْوَضْعِ مِنَ الدَّيْنِ
titles.english: Chapter: It is recommended to waive debts

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ أَدْرَكَ مَا بَاعَهُ عِنْدَ الْمُشْتَرِي وَقَدْ أَفْلَسَ فَلَهُ الرُّجُوعُ فِيهِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: If a man finds what he sold with the purchaser, who has become bankrupt, then he has the right to take it back

titles.arabic: باب فَضْلِ إِنْظَارِ الْمُعْسِرِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The virute of giving more time to one who is suffering difficulty, and letting those go who are suffering difficulty and those who are well off

titles.arabic: بَاب تَحْرِيمِ مَطْلِ الْغَنِيِّ وَصِحَّةِ الْحَوَالَةِ وَاسْتِحْبَابِ قَبُولِهَا إِذَا أُحِيلَ عَلَى مَلِيٍّ
titles.english: Chapter: The prohibition of a rich man delaying repayment. The validity of Hawalah (Transferal of Debts) and it is recommended to accept transferal of a debt if it is transferred to a rich man

titles.arabic: بَاب تَحْرِيمِ بَيْعِ فَضْلِ الْمَاءِ الَّذِي يَكُونُ بِالْفَلَاةِ وَيُحْتَاجُ إِلَيْهِ لِرَعْيِ الْكَلَأِ وَتَحْرِيمِ مَنْعِ بَذْلِهِ وَتَحْرِيمِ بَيْعِ ضِرَابِ الْفَحْلِ
titles.english: Chapter: The prohibition of selling surplus water which is in the wilderness and is needed to take care of the pasture. The prohibition of not allowing others to use it. The prohibition of Stud fees

titles.arabic: باب تَحْرِيمِ ثَمَنِ الْكَلْبِ وَحُلْوَانِ الْكَاهِنِ وَمَهْرِ الْبَغِيِّ وَالنَّهْىِ عَنْ بَيْعِ السِّنّ
titles.english: Chapter: The prohibition of the price of a dog, the fee of a fortuneteller and the payment of a prostitute, and the prohibition of selling cats

titles.arabic: بَاب الْأَمْرِ بِقَتْلِ الْكِلَابِ وَبَيَانِ نَسْخِهِ وَبَيَانِ تَحْرِيمِ اقْتِنَائِهَا إِلَّا لِصَيْدٍ أَوْ زَرْعٍ أَوْ مَاشِيَةٍ وَنَحْوِ ذَلِكَ
titles.english: Chapter: The command to kill dogs, and its abrogation. The prohibition of keeping dogs, except for hunting, farming, (herding) livestock and the like

titles.arabic: باب حِلِّ أُجْرَةِ الْحِجَامَةِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The permissibility of a cupper's earnings

titles.arabic: باب تَحْرِيمِ بَيْعِ الْخَمْرِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The prohibition of selling wine

titles.arabic: باب تَحْرِيمِ بَيْعِ الْخَمْرِ وَالْمَيْتَةِ وَالْخِنْزِيرِ وَالأَصْنَامِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The prohibition of selling wine, dead meat, pork and idols

titles.arabic: باب الرِّبَا ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Riba (Usury, Interest)

titles.arabic: باب الصَّرْفِ وَبَيْعِ الذَّهَبِ بِالْوَرِقِ نَقْدًا ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Exchange and Selling Gold for Silver on the spot

titles.arabic: باب النَّهْىِ عَنْ بَيْعِ الْوَرِقِ، بِالذَّهَبِ دَيْنًا ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Prohibition of selling silver for gold to be paid at a later date

titles.arabic: باب بَيْعِ الْقِلاَدَةِ فِيهَا خَرَزٌ وَذَهَبٌ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Selling a necklace in which there are pearls and gold

titles.arabic: باب بَيْعِ الطَّعَامِ مِثْلاً بِمِثْلٍ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Selling Food Like for Like

titles.arabic: باب لَعْنِ آكِلِ الرِّبَا وَمُؤْكِلِهِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Cursing the one who consumes Riba and the one who pays it

titles.arabic: باب أَخْذِ الْحَلاَلِ وَتَرْكِ الشُّبُهَاتِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Taking that which is lawful and leaving that which is unclear

titles.arabic: باب بَيْعِ الْبَعِيرِ وَاسْتِثْنَاءِ رُكُوبِهِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Selling Camels and Stipulating that one may ride them

titles.arabic: باب مَنِ اسْتَسْلَفَ شَيْئًا فَقَضَى خَيْرًا مِنْهُ وَ ‏"‏ خَيْرُكُمْ أَحْسَنُكُمْ قَضَاءً ‏"‏ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: It is permissible to lend animals and it is recommended to pay in full, giving something better than that which ts owed

titles.arabic: باب جَوَازِ بَيْعِ الْحَيَوَانِ بِالْحَيَوَانِ مِنْ جِنْسِهِ مُتَفَاضِلاً ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The permissibility of selling animals for animals of the same kind and of different quality

titles.arabic: باب الرَّهْنِ وَجَوَازِهِ فِي الْحَضَرِ وَالسَّفَرِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Pawning (Rahn) and its permissibility whether one is travelling or not

titles.arabic: باب السَّلَمِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Salam (Payment in Advance)

titles.arabic: باب تَحْرِيمِ الاِحْتِكَارِ فِي الأَقْوَاتِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The prohibition of hoarding staple foods

titles.arabic: باب النَّهْىِ عَنِ الْحَلِفِ، فِي الْبَيْعِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The prohibition of swearing oaths when selling

titles.arabic: باب الشُّفْعَةِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Pre-emption

titles.arabic: باب غَرْزِ الْخَشَبِ فِي جِدَارِ الْجَارِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Fixing a piece of wood to a neighbor's wall

titles.arabic: باب تَحْرِيمِ الظُّلْمِ وَغَصْبِ الأَرْضِ وَغَيْرِهَا ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The prohibition of wrongdoing, seizing land unlawfully etc

titles.arabic: باب قَدْرِ الطَّرِيقِ إِذَا اخْتَلَفُوا فِيهِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The width of the road if there is a dispute about it

titles.arabic: باب أَلْحِقُوا الْفَرَائِضَ بِأَهْلِهَا فَمَا بَقِيَ فَلأَوْلَى رَجُلٍ ذَكَرٍ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Give The Shares Of Inheritance To Those Who Are Entitled To Them, And Whatever Is Left Goes To The Closest Male Relative

titles.arabic: باب مِيرَاثِ الْكَلاَلَةِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Inheritance Of The Kalalah

titles.arabic: باب آخِرِ آيَةٍ أُنْزِلَتْ آيَةُ الْكَلاَلَةِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Last Verse To Be Revealed Was The Verse Of Kalalah

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ تَرَكَ مَالاً فَلِوَرَثَتِهِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Whoever Leaves Behind Wealth, It Is For His Heirs

titles.arabic: باب كَرَاهَةِ شِرَاءِ الإِنْسَانِ مَا تَصَدَّقَ بِهِ مِمَّنْ تَصَدَّقَ عَلَيْهِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: It Is Disliked For A Man To Buy What He Gave In Charity From The One To Whom He Gave It

titles.arabic: بَاب تَحْرِيمِ الرُّجُوعِ فِي الصَّدَقَةِ وَالْهِبَةِ بَعْدَ الْقَبْضِ إِلَّا مَا وَهَبَهُ لِوَلَدِهِ وَإِنْ سَفَلَ
titles.english: Chapter: The Prohibition Of Taking Back One's Charity After It Has Been Accepted, Except In The Case Of What A Father Gives To A Son Or Grandson

titles.arabic: باب كَرَاهَةِ تَفْضِيلِ بَعْضِ الأَوْلاَدِ فِي الْهِبَةِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: It Is Disliked To Favor Some Of One's Children Over Others In Gift-Giving

titles.arabic: باب الْعُمْرَى ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The 'Umra (Lifelong Gift)

titles.arabic: باب الْوَصِيَّةِ بِالثُّلُثِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Bequeathing One-Third

titles.arabic: باب وُصُولِ ثَوَابِ الصَّدَقَاتِ إِلَى الْمَيِّتِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Reward For Charity Reaches The Deceased

titles.arabic: باب مَا يَلْحَقُ الإِنْسَانَ مِنَ الثَّوَابِ بَعْدَ وَفَاتِهِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: What Reward Reaches A Man After His Death

titles.arabic: باب الْوَقْفِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Waqf (Endowment)

titles.arabic: باب تَرْكِ الْوَصِيَّةِ لِمَنْ لَيْسَ لَهُ شَىْءٌ يُوصِي فِيهِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Not Making A Will For One Who Has Nothing To Be Bequeathed

titles.arabic: باب الأَمْرِ بِقَضَاءِ النَّذْرِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Command To Fulfill Vows

titles.arabic: باب النَّهْىِ عَنِ النَّذْرِ، وَأَنَّهُ، لاَ يَرُدُّ شَيْئًا ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: he Prohibition Of Vows, And Confirmation That They Do Not Avert Anything

titles.arabic: باب لاَ وَفَاءَ لِنَذْرٍ فِي مَعْصِيَةِ اللَّهِ وَلاَ فِيمَا لاَ يَمْلِكُ الْعَبْدُ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: There is no fulfillment of a vow that involves disobedience towards Allah, or a vow concerning that which a person does not own

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ نَذَرَ أَنْ يَمْشِيَ إِلَى الْكَعْبَةِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: One Who Vows To Walk To The Ka'bah

titles.arabic: باب فِي كَفَّارَةِ النَّذْرِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Expiation For Breaking A Vow

titles.arabic: باب النَّهْىِ عَنِ الْحَلِفِ بِغَيْرِ اللَّهِ تَعَالَى ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The prohibition of swearing by something other than Allah

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ حَلَفَ بِاللاَّتِ وَالْعُزَّى فَلْيَقُلْ لاَ إِلَهَ إِلاَّ اللَّهُ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Whoever swears by Al-Lat and Al-Uzza, let him say La Ilaha Illallah

titles.arabic: باب نَدْبِ مَنْ حَلَفَ يَمِينًا فَرَأَى غَيْرَهَا خَيْرًا مِنْهَا أَنْ يَأْتِيَ الَّذِي هُوَ خَيْرٌ وَيُكَفِّرَ عَنْ يَمِينِهِ
titles.english: Chapter: It is recommended for the one who swears an oath then sees that something else is better than it; To do that which is better and offer expiation for his oath

titles.arabic: باب يَمِينِ الْحَالِفِ عَلَى نِيَّةِ الْمُسْتَحْلِفِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: An oath is judged on the intention of the one who asks for it to be sworn.

titles.arabic: باب الاِسْتِثْنَاءِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Saying: "If Allah wills" when swearing oaths and at other times

titles.arabic: باب النَّهْىِ عَنِ الإِصْرَارِ، عَلَى الْيَمِينِ فِيمَا يَتَأَذَّى بِهِ أَهْلُ الْحَالِفِ مِمَّا لَيْسَ بِحَرَامٍ
titles.english: Chapter: The prohibition of persisting in an oath that will harm the family of the one who swears it, so long as not persisting in it does not involve anything unlawful

titles.arabic: باب نَذْرِ الْكَافِرِ وَمَا يَفْعَلُ فِيهِ إِذَا أَسْلَمَ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The vow of a disbeliever, and what he should do about it if he becomes a muslim

titles.arabic: باب صُحْبَةِ الْمَمَالِيكِ وَكَفَّارَةِ مَنْ لَطَمَ عَبْدَهُ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Treatment of slaves, and the expiation of one who slaps his slave

titles.arabic: باب التَّغْلِيظِ عَلَى مَنْ قَذَفَ مَمْلُوكَهُ بِالزِّنَا ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Stern warning against accusing a slave of fornication

titles.arabic: باب إِطْعَامِ الْمَمْلُوكِ مِمَّا يَأْكُلُ وَإِلْبَاسِهِ مَمَّا يَلْبَسُ وَلاَ يُكَلِّفُهُ مَا يَغْلِبُهُ
titles.english: Chapter: Feeding a slave what one eats and clothing him as one clothes oneself, and not burdening him with more than he bear

titles.arabic: باب ثَوَابِ الْعَبْدِ وَأَجْرِهِ إِذَا نَصَحَ لِسَيِّدِهِ وَأَحْسَنَ عِبَادَةَ اللَّهِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The reward of a slave who is sincere towards his master and worships Allah properly

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ أَعْتَقَ شِرْكًا لَهُ فِي عَبْدٍ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: One who frees his share in a slave

titles.arabic: باب جَوَازِ بَيْعِ الْمُدَبَّرِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Permissibility of selling a Mudabbar

titles.arabic: باب الْقَسَامَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: Qasamah (Oaths)

titles.arabic: باب حُكْمِ الْمُحَارِبِينَ وَالْمُرْتَدِّينَ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The ruling on Muharibin and Apostates

titles.arabic: باب ثُبُوتِ الْقِصَاصِ فِي الْقَتْلِ بِالْحَجَرِ وَغَيْرِهِ مِنَ الْمُحَدَّدَاتِ وَالْمُثَقَّلاَتِ وَقَتْلِ الرَّجُلِ بِالْمَرْأَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: Confirmation of Qisas in the case of killing with a rock and other sharp or heavy objects, and the killing of a man for a woman

titles.arabic: باب الصَّائِلُ عَلَى نَفْسِ الإِنْسَانِ أَوْ عُضْوِهِ إِذَا دَفَعَهُ الْمَصُولُ عَلَيْهِ فَأَتْلَفَ نَفْسَهُ أَوْ عُضْوَهَ لاَ ضَمَانَ عَلَيْهِ
titles.english: Chapter: If a person attacks another person's life and limb, and the other defends himself and kills him or injures him, there is no penalty on him

titles.arabic: باب إِثْبَاتِ الْقِصَاصِ فِي الأَسْنَانِ وَمَا فِي مَعْنَاهَا ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The validity of Qisas for teeth and the like

titles.arabic: باب مَا يُبَاحُ بِهِ دَمُ الْمُسْلِمِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: When it is permissible to shed the blood of a muslim

titles.arabic: باب بَيَانِ إِثْمِ مَنْ سَنَّ الْقَتْلَ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The sin of the one who set the precedent of killing

titles.arabic: باب الْمُجَازَاةِ بِالدِّمَاءِ فِي الآخِرَةِ وَأَنَّهَا أَوَّلُ مَا يُقْضَى فِيهِ بَيْنَ النَّاسِ يَوْمَ الْقِيَامَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: The punishment for bloodshed in the hereafter, and bloodshed will be the first thing concerning which judgement is passed among the people on the Day of Resurrection

titles.arabic: باب تَغْلِيظِ تَحْرِيمِ الدِّمَاءِ وَالأَعْرَاضِ وَالأَمْوَالِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Emphasis on the sanctity of Blood, Honor and Wealth

titles.arabic: باب صِحَّةِ الإِقْرَارِ بِالْقَتْلِ وَتَمْكِينِ وَلِيِّ الْقَتِيلِ مِنَ الْقِصَاصِ وَاسْتِحْبَابِ طَلَبِ الْعَفْوِ مِنْهُ
titles.english: Chapter: A confession to murder is valid and the heir of the victim is entitled to Qisas, but it is recommended to ask him to let him go

titles.arabic: باب دِيَةِ الْجَنِينِ وَوُجُوبِ الدِّيَةِ فِي قَتْلِ الْخَطَإِ وَشِبْهِ الْعَمْدِ عَلَى عَاقِلَةِ الْجَانِي
titles.english: Chapter: The Diyah for a fetus; and the Diyah for accidental killing and the ambiguous killing must be paid by the shahiqilah of the killer

titles.arabic: باب حَدِّ السَّرِقَةِ وَنِصَابِهَا ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Hadd for stealing and the minimum threshold

titles.arabic: باب قَطْعِ السَّارِقِ الشَّرِيفِ وَغَيْرِهِ وَالنَّهْىِ عَنِ الشَّفَاعَةِ فِي الْحُدُودِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Cutting off the hand of a thief from the nobility and others; the prohibition of interceding with regard to Hudud punishments

titles.arabic: باب حَدِّ الزِّنَا ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Hadd punishment for Zina (fornication, adultery)

titles.arabic: باب رَجْمِ الثَّيِّبِ فِي الزِّنَا ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Stoning of a married person for Zina

titles.arabic: باب مَنِ اعْتَرَفَ عَلَى نَفْسِهِ بِالزِّنَا ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: One who confesses to Zina

titles.arabic: باب رَجْمِ الْيَهُودِ أَهْلِ الذِّمَّةِ فِي الزِّنَا ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Stoning Jews and Ahl Adh-Dhimmah for Zina

titles.arabic: باب تَأْخِيرِ الْحَدِّ عَنِ النُّفَسَاءِ، ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Delaying the Hadd punishment in the case of women who have just given birth

titles.arabic: باب حَدِّ الْخَمْرِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Hadd punishment for drinking alcohol

titles.arabic: باب قَدْرِ أَسْوَاطِ التَّعْزِيرِ
titles.english: Chapter: Number of lashes in the case of ta'zeer

titles.arabic: باب الْحُدُودُ كَفَّارَاتٌ لأَهْلِهَا ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Hadd punishments are an expiation for those on whom they are carried out

titles.arabic: باب جَرْحُ الْعَجْمَاءِ وَالْمَعْدِنِ وَالْبِئْرِ جُبَارٌ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: There is no Diyah for injuries caused by animals or by falling into a mine or well

titles.arabic: باب مُبَاشَرَةِ الْحَائِضِ فَوْقَ الإِزَارِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Touching a menstruating woman above the izar (waist wrapper)

titles.arabic: باب الاِضْطِجَاعِ مَعَ الْحَائِضِ فِي لِحَافٍ وَاحِدٍ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Lying down with a menstruating woman under a single cover

titles.arabic: باب جَوَازِ غَسلِ الْحَائِضِ رَأْسَ زَوْجِهَا وَتَرْجِيلِهِ وَطَهَارَةِ سُؤْرِهَا وَالاِتِّكَاءِ فِي حِجْرِهَا وَقِرَاءَةِ الْقُرْآنِ فِيهِ
titles.english: Chapter: It is permissible for a menstruating woman to wash her husband’s head, and comb his hair; her leftovers are pure (tahir); and regarding reclining in her lap and reciting Qur’an

titles.arabic: باب الْمَذْىِ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: Madhi (prostatic fluid)

titles.arabic: باب غَسْلِ الْوَجْهِ وَالْيَدَيْنِ إِذَا اسْتَيْقَظَ مِنَ النَّوْمِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Washing the face and hands when waking from sleep

titles.arabic: باب جَوَازِ نَوْمِ الْجُنُبِ وَاسْتِحْبَابِ الْوُضُوءِ لَهُ وَغَسْلِ الْفَرْجِ إِذَا أَرَادَ أَنْ يَأْكُلَ أَوْ يَشْرَبَ أَوْ يَنَامَ أَوْ يُجَامِعَل
titles.english: Chapter: It is permissible for one who is junub to sleep, but it is recommended for him to perform wudu’, and wash his private parts if he wants to eat, drink, sleep, or have intercourse

titles.arabic: باب وُجُوبِ الْغُسْلِ عَلَى الْمَرْأَةِ بِخُرُوجِ الْمَنِيِّ مِنْهَا ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Women are obliged to perform ghusl if they emit fluid

titles.arabic: باب بَيَانِ صِفَةِ مَنِيِّ الرَّجُلِ وَالْمَرْأَةِ وَأَنَّ الْوَلَدَ مَخْلُوقٌ مِنْ مَائِهِمَا ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Description of the (fluid) of the man and the woman; the child is created from the water of both of them

titles.arabic: باب صِفَةِ غُسْلِ الْجَنَابَةِ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: Description of ghusl in the case of janabah (sexual impurity)

titles.arabic: باب الْقَدْرِ الْمُسْتَحَبِّ مِنَ الْمَاءِ فِي غُسْلِ الْجَنَابَةِ وَغُسْلِ الرَّجُلِ وَالْمَرْأَةِ فِي إِنَاءٍ وَاحِدٍ فِي حَالَةٍ وَاحِدَةٍ وَغُسْلِ أَحَدِهِمَا بِفَضْلِ الآخَرِ
titles.english: Chapter: The amount of water with which it is recommended to perform ghusl in the case of janabah; a man and woman washing from a single vessel; one of them washing with the left-over water of the other

titles.arabic: باب اسْتِحْبَابِ إِفَاضَةِ الْمَاءِ عَلَى الرَّأْسِ وَغَيْرِهِ ثَلاَثًا ‏
titles.english: Chapter: It is recommended to pour water over the head, and elsewhere, three times

titles.arabic: باب حُكْمِ ضَفَائِرِ الْمُغْتَسِلَةِ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: Ruling on the braids of a woman who is doing ghusl

titles.arabic: باب اسْتِحْبَابِ اسْتِعْمَالِ الْمُغْتَسِلَةِ مِنَ الْحَيْضِ فِرْصَةً مِنْ مِسْكٍ فِي مَوْضِعِ الدَّمِ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: It is recommended for the woman who is performing ghusl following menses to apply a piece of cloth scented with musk to the site of the bleeding

titles.arabic: باب الْمُسْتَحَاضَةِ وَغُسْلِهَا وَصَلاَتِهَا ‏
titles.english: Chapter: The ghusl and the prayer of a woman who is suffering prolonged vaginal bleeding (istihadah)

titles.arabic: باب وُجُوبِ قَضَاءِ الصَّوْمِ عَلَى الْحَائِضِ دُونَ الصَّلاَةِ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: A menstruating woman is obliged to make up missed fasts but not prayers

titles.arabic: باب تَسَتُّرِ الْمُغْتَسِلِ بِثَوْبٍ وَنَحْوِهِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Covering oneself with a garment and the like while performing ghusl

titles.arabic: باب تَحْرِيمِ النَّظَرِ إِلَى الْعَوْرَاتِ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: The prohibition of looking at `awrah

titles.arabic: باب جَوَازِ الاِغْتِسَالِ عُرْيَانًا فِي الْخَلْوَةِ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: It is permissible to bathe naked when one is alone

titles.arabic: باب الاِعْتِنَاءِ بِحِفْظِ الْعَوْرَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: Taking care to conceal one’s `awrah

titles.arabic: باب مَا يُسْتَتَرُ بِهِ لِقَضَاءِ الْحَاجَةِ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: Screening oneself when urinating

titles.arabic: باب إِنَّمَا الْمَاءُ مِنَ الْمَاءِ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: At the beginning of Islam, intercourse did not necessitate ghusl unless semen was emitted, then that was abrogated and ghusl becomes obligatory for intercourse

titles.arabic: باب نَسْخِ ‏"‏ الْمَاءُ مِنَ الْمَاءِ ‏"‏ ‏وَوُجُوبِ الْغُسْلِ بِالْتِقَاءِ الْخِتَانَيْنِ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: Abrogation of “water is for water”, and that it is obligatory to perform ghusl when the two circumcised parts meet

titles.arabic: باب الْوُضُوءِ مِمَّا مَسَّتِ النَّارُ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: Performing wudu’ after eating something that has been touched by fire

titles.arabic: باب نَسْخِ ‏"‏ الْوُضُوءِ مِمَّا مَسَّتِ النَّارُ ‏"‏ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: Abrogation of wudu’ for that which has been touched by fire

titles.arabic: باب الْوُضُوءِ مِنْ لُحُومِ الإِبِلِ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: (Performing) wudu’ after eating camel meat

titles.arabic: باب الدَّلِيلِ عَلَى أَنَّ مَنْ تَيَقَّنَ الطَّهَارَةَ ثُمَّ شَكَّ فِي الْحَدَثِ فَلَهُ أَنْ يُصَلِّيَ بِطَهَارَتِهِ تِلْكَ
titles.english: Chapter: Evidence that if a person is certain that he is in a state of purity, then he doubts whether he has committed hadith (broken his wudu’), then he prays with his purity like that

titles.arabic: باب طَهَارَةِ جُلُودِ الْمَيْتَةِ بِالدِّبَاغِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Hides of dead animals are purified by tanning

titles.arabic: باب التَّيَمُّمِ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: Tayammum

titles.arabic: باب الدَّلِيلِ عَلَى أَنَّ الْمُسْلِمَ لاَ يَنْجُسُ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Evidence that the Muslim does not become impure

titles.arabic: باب ذِكْرِ اللَّهِ تَعَالَى فِي حَالِ الْجَنَابَةِ وَغَيْرِهَا ‏
titles.english: Chapter: Remembering Allah, the Most High, when one is sexually impure, and at other times

titles.arabic: باب جَوَازِ أَكْلِ الْمُحْدِثِ الطَّعَامَ وَأَنَّهُ لاَ كَرَاهَةَ فِي ذَلِكَ وَأَنَّ الْوُضُوءَ لَيْسَ عَلَى الْفَوْرِ
titles.english: Chapter: It is permissible for one who has broken his wudu’ to eat, and there is nothing disliked about doing so, and wudu’ need not be done immediately

titles.arabic: باب مَا يَقُولُ إِذَا أَرَادَ دُخُولَ الْخَلاَءِ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: What should be said when entering the area in which one relieves himself

titles.arabic: باب الدَّلِيلِ عَلَى أَنَّ نَوْمَ الْجَالِسِ لاَ يَنْقُضُ الْوُضُوءَ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: Evidence that sleeping while sitting does not invalidate wudu’

titles.arabic: باب الْيَمِينُ عَلَى الْمُدَّعَى عَلَيْهِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Oath should be sworn by the defendant

titles.arabic: باب الْقَضَاءِ بِالْيَمِينِ وَالشَّاهِدِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The obligation of judging on the basis of a witness and an oath

titles.arabic: باب الْحُكْمِ بِالظَّاهِرِ وَاللَّحْنِ بِالْحُجَّةِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: So the judgement of the judge does not change what happened

titles.arabic: باب قَضِيَّةِ هِنْدٍ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The case of Hind

titles.arabic: باب النَّهْيِ عَنْ كَثْرَةِ الْمَسَائِلِ مِنْ غَيْرِ حَاجَةٍ وَالنَّهْيِ عَنْ مَنْعٍ وَهَاتٍ وَهُوَ الاِمْتِنَاعُ مِنْ أَدَاءِ حَقٍّ لَزِمَهُ أَوْ طَلَبُ مَا لاَ يَسْتَحِقُّهُ
titles.english: Chapter: The prohibition of asking too much with no need. The prohibition of withholding the rights of others and asking of them, which means refusing to give others their rights and asking for that to which one is not entitles

titles.arabic: باب بَيَانِ أَجْرِ الْحَاكِمِ إِذَا اجْتَهَدَ فَأَصَابَ أَوْ أَخْطَأَ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The reward of the judge if he strives to reach a decision, whether he gets it right or wrong

titles.arabic: باب كَرَاهَةِ قَضَاءِ الْقَاضِي وَهُوَ غَضْبَانُ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: It is disliked for a judge to pass a judgement when he is angry

titles.arabic: باب نَقْضِ الأَحْكَامِ الْبَاطِلَةِ وَرَدِّ مُحْدَثَاتِ الأُمُورِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Rejection of wrong rulings and of newly-invented matters

titles.arabic: باب بَيَانِ خَيْرِ الشُّهُودِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The best of witnesses

titles.arabic: باب بَيَانِ اخْتِلاَفِ الْمُجْتَهِدِينَ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Differences between mujtahids

titles.arabic: باب اسْتِحْبَابِ إِصْلاَحِ الْحَاكِمِ بَيْنَ الْخَصْمَيْنِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: It is recommended for a judge to reconcile between disputants
Chapter: Picking up property lost by a pilgrim

titles.arabic: باب فِي لُقَطَةِ الْحَاجِّ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Milking animals is unlawful if the owner has not given permission

titles.arabic: باب تَحْرِيمِ حَلْبِ الْمَاشِيَةِ بِغَيْرِ إِذْنِ مَالِكِهَا ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Hospitality etc

titles.arabic: باب الضِّيَافَةِ وَنَحْوِهَا ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: It is recommended to spend surplus wealth

titles.arabic: باب اسْتِحْبَابِ الْمُؤَاسَاةِ بِفُضُولِ الْمَالِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: It is recommended to mix provisions if they are few, and to share them out

titles.arabic: باب اسْتِحْبَابِ خَلْطِ الأَزْوَادِ إِذَا قَلَّتْ وَالْمُؤَاسَاةِ فِيهَا ‏‏
باب جَوَازِ الإِغَارَةِ عَلَى الْكُفَّارِ الَّذِينَ بَلَغَتْهُمْ دَعْوَةُ الإِسْلاَمِ مِنْ غَيْرِ تَقَدُّمِ الإِعْلاَمِ بِالإِغَارَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: Permissibility of raiding the Kuffar, who have been reached with the call of Islam, without giving prior warning

titles.arabic: باب تَأْمِيرِ الإِمَامِ الأُمَرَاءَ عَلَى الْبُعُوثِ وَوَصِيَّتِهِ إِيَّاهُمْ بِآدَابِ الْغَزْوِ وَغَيْرِهَا
titles.english: Chapter: Ruler appointing leaders of expeditions and advising them of the etiquette of war, etc.

titles.arabic: باب فِي الأَمْرِ بِالتَّيْسِيرِ وَتَرْكِ التَّنْفِيرِ
titles.english: Chapter: The command to show leniency and avoid causing aversion (towards Islam)

titles.arabic: باب تَحْرِيمِ الْغَدْرِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The prohibition of betrayal

titles.arabic: باب جَوَازِ الْخِدَاعِ فِي الْحَرْبِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Permissibility of deceit in war

titles.arabic: باب كَرَاهَةِ تَمَنِّي لِقَاءِ الْعَدُوِّ وَالأَمْرِ بِالصَّبْرِ عِنْدَ اللِّقَاءِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: It is disliked to wish to meet the enemy, and the command to be steadfast when meeting the enemy

titles.arabic: باب اسْتِحْبَابِ الدُّعَاءِ بِالنَّصْرِ عِنْدَ لِقَاءِ الْعَدُوِّ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: It is recommended to pray for victory when meeting the enemy

titles.arabic: باب تَحْرِيمِ قَتْلِ النِّسَاءِ وَالصِّبْيَانِ فِي الْحَرْبِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The prohibition of killing women and children in war

titles.arabic: باب جَوَازِ قَتْلِ النِّسَاءِ وَالصِّبْيَانِ فِي الْبَيَاتِ مِنْ غَيْرِ تَعَمُّدٍ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Permissibility of killing women and children in night raids, so long as it is not done deliberately

titles.arabic: باب جَوَازِ قَطْعِ أَشْجَارِ الْكُفَّارِ وَتَحْرِيقِهَا ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Permissibility of cutting down the trees of the Kuffar and burning them

titles.arabic: باب تَحْلِيلِ الْغَنَائِمِ لِهَذِهِ الأُمَّةِ خَاصَّةً ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: War booty has been made permissible for this Ummah only

titles.arabic: باب الأَنْفَالِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Spoils of War

titles.arabic: باب اسْتِحْقَاقِ الْقَاتِلِ سَلَبَ الْقَتِيلِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The killer is entitled to the belongings of the one who is killed

titles.arabic: باب التَّنْفِيلِ وَفِدَاءِ الْمُسْلِمِينَ بِالأَسَارَى ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Additional rewards, and ransoming muslims in return for prisoners

titles.arabic: باب حُكْمِ الْفَىْءِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Ruling on Fai' (Booty acquired without fighting)

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِ النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم ‏"‏ لاَ نُورَثُ مَا تَرَكْنَا فَهُوَ صَدَقَةٌ ‏"‏ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The words of the Prophet (saws): "We (Prophets) have no heirs and whatever we leave behind is charity."

titles.arabic: باب كَيْفِيَّةِ قِسْمَةِ الْغَنِيمَةِ بَيْنَ الْحَاضِرِينَ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: How booty is to be shared among the fighters

titles.arabic: باب الإِمْدَادِ بِالْمَلاَئِكَةِ فِي غَزْوَةِ بَدْرٍ وَإِبَاحَةِ الْغَنَائِمِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The support of the angels during the Battle of Badr, and the permissibility of the spoils

titles.arabic: باب رَبْطِ الأَسِيرِ وَحَبْسِهِ وَجَوَازِ الْمَنِّ عَلَيْهِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Tying up and detaining captives, and the permissibility of releasing them without a ransom

titles.arabic: باب إِجْلاَءِ الْيَهُودِ مِنَ الْحِجَازِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Expulsion of the Jews from the Hijaz

titles.arabic: باب إِخْرَاجِ الْيَهُودِ وَالنَّصَارَى مِنْ جَزِيرَةِ الْعَرَبِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Expulsion of Jews and Christians from the Arabian Peninsula

titles.arabic: باب جَوَازِ قِتَالِ مَنْ نَقَضَ الْعَهْدَ وَجَوَازِ إِنْزَالِ أَهْلِ الْحِصْنِ عَلَى حُكْمِ حَاكِمٍ عَدْلٍ أَهْلٍ لِلْحُكْمِ
titles.english: Chapter: Permissibility of fighting those who break a treaty; Permissibility of letting besieged people surrender, subject to the judgement of a just person who is qualified to pass judgement

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ لَزِمَهُ أَمْرٌ فَدَخَلَ عَلَيْهِ أَمْرٌ آخَرُ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Hastening to fight, and giving precedence to the more urgent of two tasks when a choice must be made

titles.arabic: باب رَدِّ الْمُهَاجِرِينَ إِلَى الأَنْصَارِ مَنَائِحَهُمْ مِنَ الشَّجَرِ وَالثَّمَرِ حِينَ اسْتَغْنَوْا عَنْهَا بِالْفُتُوحِ
titles.english: Chapter: The Muhajirun returned to the Ansar the gifts of trees and fruits when they became independent of means through the conquests

titles.arabic: باب أَخْذِ الطَّعَامِ مِنْ أَرْضِ الْعَدُوِّ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Permissibility of eating food seized as booty in Dar Al-Harb

titles.arabic: باب كِتَابِ النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم إِلَى هِرَقْلَ يَدْعُوهُ إِلَى الإِسْلاَمِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Prophet (saws) wrote to Heraclius, the ruler of Syria, inviting him to Islam

titles.arabic: باب كُتُبِ النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم إِلَى مُلُوكِ الْكُفَّارِ يَدْعُوهُمْ إِلَى اللَّهِ عَزَّ وَجَلَّ
titles.english: Chapter: The Prophet (saws) wrote to the Kings of the Kuffar, inviting them to Islam

titles.arabic: باب فِي غَزْوَةِ حُنَيْنٍ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Battle of Hunain

titles.arabic: باب غَزْوَةِ الطَّائِفِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Battle of At-Ta'if

titles.arabic: باب غَزْوَةِ بَدْرٍ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Battle of Badr

titles.arabic: باب فَتْحِ مَكَّةَ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The conquest of Makkah

titles.arabic: باب إِزَالَةِ الأَصْنَامِ مِنْ حَوْلِ الْكَعْبَةِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Removal of Idols from around the Ka'bah

titles.arabic: باب لاَ يُقْتَلُ قُرَشِيٌّ صَبْرًا بَعْدَ الْفَتْحِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: No man if Quraish is to be captured then killed, after the conquest

titles.arabic: باب صُلْحِ الْحُدَيْبِيَةِ فِي الْحُدَيْبِيَةِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The truce of Al-Hudaybiyah

titles.arabic: باب الْوَفَاءِ بِالْعَهْدِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Upholding Covenants

titles.arabic: باب غَزْوَةِ الأَحْزَابِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Battle of Al-Ahzab (The Confederates)

titles.arabic: باب غَزْوَةِ أُحُدٍ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Battle of Uhud

titles.arabic: باب اشْتِدَادِ غَضَبِ اللَّهِ عَلَى مَنْ قَتَلَهُ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ صلى الله عليه وسلم ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The intense wrath of Allah towards the one who was killed by the messenger of Allah (saws)

titles.arabic: باب مَا لَقِيَ النَّبِيُّ صلى الله عليه وسلم مِنْ أَذَى الْمُشْرِكِينَ وَالْمُنَافِقِينَ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The persecution suffered by the prophet (saws) at the hands of the idolaters and hypocrites

titles.arabic: باب فِي دُعَاءِ النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم إِلَى اللَّهِ وَصَبْرِهِ عَلَى أَذَى الْمُنَافِقِينَ
titles.english: Chapter: The supplication of the Prophet (saws) and his steadfastness in the face of the hypocrites' persecution

titles.arabic: باب قَتْلِ أَبِي جَهْلٍ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The slaying of Abu Jahl

titles.arabic: باب قَتْلِ كَعْبِ بْنِ الأَشْرَفِ طَاغُوتِ الْيَهُودِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The slaying of Ka'b Bin Al-Ashraf, the Tagut of the Jews

titles.arabic: باب غَزْوَةِ خَيْبَرَ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Battle of Khaibar

titles.arabic: باب غَزْوَةِ الأَحْزَابِ وَهِيَ الْخَنْدَقُ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Battle of Al-Ahzab (The Confederates), also known as Al-Khandaq (The Ditch)

titles.arabic: باب غَزْوَةِ ذِي قَرَدٍ وَغَيْرِهَا ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Battle of Dhu Qarad and other battles

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِ اللَّهِ تَعَالَى: {وَهُوَ الَّذِي كَفَّ أَيْدِيَهُمْ عَنْكُمْ} الآيَةَ:
titles.english: Chapter: The words of Allah, the Most High: "And He it is who has withheld their hands from you"

titles.arabic: باب غَزْوَةِ النِّسَاءِ مَعَ الرِّجَالِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Women participating in military expeditions with the men

titles.arabic: باب النِّسَاءُ الْغَازِيَاتُ يُرْضَخُ لَهُنَّ وَلاَ يُسْهَمُ وَالنَّهْىُ عَنْ قَتْلِ صِبْيَانِ أَهْلِ الْحَرْبِ
titles.english: Chapter: Women who take part in military expeditions are to be given a reward but not a regular share; And the prohibition of killing children of the enemy

titles.arabic: باب عَدَدِ غَزَوَاتِ النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم
titles.english: Chapter: The number of campaigns of the Prophet (saws)

titles.arabic: باب غَزْوَةِ ذَاتِ الرِّقَاعِ
titles.english: Chapter: The campaign of Dhat Ar-Riqa

titles.arabic: باب كَرَاهَةِ الاِسْتِعَانَةِ فِي الْغَزْوِ بِكَافِرٍ
titles.english: Chapter: It is disliked to seek the help of a disbeliever in wars (except in cases of necessity, or if he thinks well of the Muslims)

titles.arabic: باب النَّاسُ تَبَعٌ لِقُرَيْشٍ وَالْخِلاَفَةُ فِي قُرَيْشٍ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The people follow the Quraish and the Caliphate belongs to the Quraish

titles.arabic: باب الاِسْتِخْلاَفِ وَتَرْكِهِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Appointing a successor or not doing so

titles.arabic: باب النَّهْىِ عَنْ طَلَبِ الإِمَارَةِ، وَالْحِرْصِ، عَلَيْهَا ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The prohibition of seeking or desiring a position of authority

titles.arabic: باب كَرَاهَةِ الإِمَارَةِ بِغَيْرِ ضَرُورَةٍ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: It is disliked to be appointed to a position of authority unnecessarily

titles.arabic: باب فَضِيلَةِ الإِمَامِ الْعَادِلِ وَعُقُوبَةِ الْجَائِرِ وَالْحَثِّ عَلَى الرِّفْقِ بِالرَّعِيَّةِ وَالنَّهْيِ عَنْ إِدْخَالِ الْمَشَقَّةِ عَلَيْهِمْ
titles.english: Chapter: The virtue of a just ruler and the punishment of a tyrant; Encouragement to treat those under one's authority with kindness and the prohibition against causing them hardship

titles.arabic: باب غِلَظِ تَحْرِيمِ الْغُلُولِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Emphatic prohibition against stealing from the spoils of war (Ghulul)

titles.arabic: باب تَحْرِيمِ هَدَايَا الْعُمَّالِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The prohibition of giving gifts to agents

titles.arabic: باب وُجُوبِ طَاعَةِ الأُمَرَاءِ فِي غَيْرِ مَعْصِيَةٍ وَتَحْرِيمِهَا فِي الْمَعْصِيَةِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The obligation of obeying leaders in matters that do not involve sin, but it is forbidden to obey them in sinful matters

titles.arabic: باب فِي الإِمَامِ إِذَا أَمَرَ بِتَقْوَى اللَّهِ وَعَدَلَ كَانَ لَهُ أَجْرٌ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The ruler is a shield from behind whom they fight and by whom they are protected

titles.arabic: باب الْوَفَاءِ بِبَيْعَةِ الْخُلَفَاءِ الأَوَّلِ فَالأَوَّلِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The obligation of fulfilling oaths of allegiance is owed to the first of two Caliphs

titles.arabic: باب الأَمْرِ بِالصَّبْرِ عِنْدَ ظُلْمِ الْوُلاَةِ وَاسْتِئْثَارِهِمْ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The command to be patient in the face of oppressive rulers and their selfishness

titles.arabic: باب فِي طَاعَةِ الأُمَرَاءِ وَإِنْ مَنَعُوا الْحُقُوقَ
titles.english: Chapter: Obeying Rulers even if they withhold the people's rights

titles.arabic: باب الأَمْرِ بِلُزُومِ الْجَمَاعَةِ عِنْدَ ظُهُورِ الْفِتَنِ وَتَحْذِيرِ الدُّعَاةِ إِلَى الْكُفْرِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The obligation of staying with the Jama'ah (main body) of the muslims when Fitn (tribulations) appear, and in all circumstances. The prohibition of refusing to obey and on splitting away from the Jama'ah

titles.arabic: باب حُكْمِ مَنْ فَرَّقَ أَمْرَ الْمُسْلِمِينَ وَهُوَ مُجْتَمِعٌ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The ruling on one who seeks to divide the muslims when they are united

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا بُويِعَ لِخَلِيفَتَيْنِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: When allegiance has been sworn to two caliphs

titles.arabic: باب وُجُوبِ الإِنْكَارِ عَلَى الأُمَرَاءِ فِيمَا يُخَالِفُ الشَّرْعَ وَتَرْكِ قِتَالِهِمْ مَا صَلَّوْا وَنَحْوِ ذَلِكَ
titles.english: Chapter: The obligation to denounce rulers for that in which they go against Shari'ah, but they should not be fought so long as they pray regularly, etc

titles.arabic: باب خِيَارِ الأَئِمَّةِ وَشِرَارِهِمْ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The best and worst of rulers

titles.arabic: باب اسْتِحْبَابِ مُبَايَعَةِ الإِمَامِ الْجَيْشَ عِنْدَ إِرَادَةِ الْقِتَالِ وَبَيَانِ بَيْعَةِ الرِّضْوَانِ تَحْتَ الشَّجَرَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: It is recommended for the army to swear allegiance to the ruler when intending to fight, and an account of Bay'at Ar-Ridwan beneath the tree

titles.arabic: باب تَحْرِيمِ رُجُوعِ الْمُهَاجِرِ إِلَى اسْتِيطَانِ وَطَنِهِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The prohibition against a Muhajir returning to settle in his former homeland

titles.arabic: باب الْمُبَايَعَةِ بَعْدَ فَتْحِ مَكَّةَ عَلَى الإِسْلاَمِ وَالْجِهَادِ وَالْخَيْرِ وَبَيَانِ مَعْنَى: «لاَ هِجْرَةَ بَعْدَ الْفَتْحِ»
titles.english: Chapter: Swearing Allegiance and Pledging to adhere to Islam, to engage in Jihad and to do Good, after the conquest of Makkah, and the meaning of the phrase: "There is No Hijrah (migration) after the Conquest."

titles.arabic: باب كَيْفِيَّةِ بَيْعَةِ النِّسَاءِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: How women gave their oath of allegiance

titles.arabic: باب الْبَيْعَةِ عَلَى السَّمْعِ وَالطَّاعَةِ فِيمَا اسْتَطَاعَ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Oath of allegiance pledging to hear and obey as much as possible

titles.arabic: باب بَيَانِ سِنِّ الْبُلُوغِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The age of responsibility

titles.arabic: باب النَّهْىِ أَنْ يُسَافَرَ بِالْمُصْحَفِ إِلَى أَرْضِ الْكُفَّارِ إِذَا خِيفَ وُقُوعُهُ بِأَيْدِيهِمْ
titles.english: Chapter: The prohibition of travelling with the Mushaf to the land of the disbelievers if there is the fear that it may fall into their hands.

titles.arabic: باب الْمُسَابَقَةِ بَيْنَ الْخَيْلِ وَتَضْمِيرِهَا ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Horse Races and Training Horses for Racing

titles.arabic: باب الْخَيْلُ فِي نَوَاصِيهَا الْخَيْرُ إِلَى يَوْمِ الْقِيَامَةِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The virtue of horses; "Goodness is tied to their Forelocks."

titles.arabic: باب مَا يُكْرَهُ مِنْ صِفَاتِ الْخَيْلِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Disliked qualities in Horses

titles.arabic: باب فَضْلِ الْجِهَادِ وَالْخُرُوجِ فِي سَبِيلِ اللَّهِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The virtue of Jihad and going out (to fight) in the cause of Allah

titles.arabic: باب فَضْلِ الشَّهَادَةِ فِي سَبِيلِ اللَّهِ تَعَالَى ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The virtue of Martyrdom in the cause of Allah

titles.arabic: باب فَضْلِ الْغَدْوَةِ وَالرَّوْحَةِ فِي سَبِيلِ اللَّهِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The virtue of going out in the morning or the evening in the cause of Allah

titles.arabic: باب بَيَانِ مَا أَعَدَّهُ اللَّهُ تَعَالَى لِلْمُجَاهِدِ فِي الْجَنَّةِ مِنَ الدَّرَجَاتِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The High Positions that Allah has prepared for the Mujahid in Paradise

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ قُتِلَ فِي سَبِيلِ اللَّهِ كُفِّرَتْ خَطَايَاهُ إِلاَّ الدَّيْنَ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: If a person is killed in the cause of Allah, all his sins will be expiated except debt

titles.arabic: باب فِي بَيَانِ أَنَّ أَرْوَاحَ الشُّهَدَاءِ فِي الْجَنَّةِ وَأَنَّهُمْ أَحْيَاءٌ عِنْدَ رَبِّهِمْ يُرْزَقُونَ
titles.english: Chapter: The souls of the martyrs are in Paradise, and they are alive with their Lord and they have provision

titles.arabic: باب فَضْلِ الْجِهَادِ وَالرِّبَاطِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The virtue of Jihad and keeping watch over the frontier

titles.arabic: باب بَيَانِ الرَّجُلَيْنِ يَقْتُلُ أَحَدُهُمَا الآخَرَ يَدْخُلاَنِ الْجَنَّةَ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Two Men, one of whom kills the other, and both will enter Paradise

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ قَتَلَ كَافِرًا ثُمَّ سَدَّدَ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: One who kills a disbeliever then keeps to the right path

titles.arabic: باب فَضْلِ الصَّدَقَةِ فِي سَبِيلِ اللَّهِ وَتَضْعِيفِهَا ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The virtue of Charity in the Cause of Allah, and its Manifold reward

titles.arabic: باب فَضْلِ إِعَانَةِ الْغَازِي فِي سَبِيلِ اللَّهِ بِمَرْكُوبٍ وَغَيْرِهِ وَخِلاَفَتِهِ فِي أَهْلِهِ بِخَيْرٍ
titles.english: Chapter: The virtue of helping the warrior who is fighting in the cause of Allah with mounts etc., and looking after his family in his absence

titles.arabic: باب حُرْمَةِ نِسَاءِ الْمُجَاهِدِينَ وَإِثْمِ مَنْ خَانَهُمْ فِيهِنَّ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The sanctity of the wives of the Mujahidin, and the sin of the one who betrays them with regard to them

titles.arabic: باب سُقُوطِ فَرْضِ الْجِهَادِ عَنِ الْمَعْذُورِينَ، ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The duty of Jihad is waived for those who have excuses

titles.arabic: باب ثُبُوتِ الْجَنَّةِ لِلشَّهِيدِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Affirmation of Paradise for the Martyr

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ قَاتَلَ لِتَكُونَ كَلِمَةُ اللَّهِ هِيَ الْعُلْيَا فَهُوَ فِي سَبِيلِ اللَّهِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: One who fights so that the word of Allah will be supreme is fighting in the cause of Allah

titles.arabic: باب مَنَ قَاتَلَ لِلرِّيَاءِ وَالسُّمْعَةِ اسْتَحَقَّ النَّارَ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: One who fights to show off and gain a reputation deserves Hell

titles.arabic: باب بَيَانِ قَدْرِ ثَوَابِ مَنْ غَزَا فَغَنِمَ وَمَنْ لَمْ يَغْنَمْ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The reward of those who fought and acquired spoils of war and those who did not acquire spoils of war

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ صلى الله عليه وسلم ‏"‏ إِنَّمَا الأَعْمَالُ بِالنِّيَّةِ.‏"‏ وَأَنَّهُ يَدْخُلُ فِيهِ الْغَزْوُ وَغَيْرُهُ مِنَ الأَعْمَالِ
titles.english: Chapter: The words of the prophets saws: "Deeds are but with intentions" which includes fighting and other deeds

titles.arabic: باب اسْتِحْبَابِ طَلَبِ الشَّهَادَةِ فِي سَبِيلِ اللَّهِ تَعَالَى ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: It is recommended to seek Martyrdom in the Cause of Allah, Exalted is He.

titles.arabic: باب ذَمِّ مَنْ مَاتَ وَلَمْ يَغْزُ وَلَمْ يُحَدِّثْ نَفْسَهُ بِالْغَزْوِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Criticism of one who dies without having fought (in Jihad) or having thought of fighting

titles.arabic: باب ثَوَابِ مَنْ حَبَسَهُ عَنِ الْغَزْوِ، مَرَضٌ أَوْ عُذْرٌ آخَرُ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The reward of one who is kept from fighting by sickness or any other excuse

titles.arabic: باب فَضْلِ الْغَزْوِ فِي الْبَحْرِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The virtue of campaigning by sea

titles.arabic: باب فَضْلِ الرِّبَاطِ فِي سَبِيلِ اللَّهِ عَزَّ وَجَلَّ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The virtue of guarding the frontier in the cause of Allah (Glorified and Exalted is He)

titles.arabic: باب بَيَانِ الشُّهَدَاءِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: About the Martyrs

titles.arabic: باب فَضْلِ الرَّمْىِ وَالْحَثِّ عَلَيْهِ وَذَمِّ مَنْ عَلِمَهُ ثُمَّ نَسِيَهُ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The virtue of Shooting and Encouragement to learn it, and criticism of the one who learns it and then forgets it

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ: «لاَ تَزَالُ طَائِفَةٌ مِنْ أُمَّتِي ظَاهِرِينَ عَلَى الْحَقِّ لاَ يَضُرُّهُمْ مَنْ خَالَفَهُمْ»
titles.english: Chapter: The words of the prophet saws: "A Group of my Ummah will continue to Prevail on the basis of the Truth, and They will not be Harmed by those who oppose them."

titles.arabic: باب مُرَاعَاةِ مَصْلَحَةِ الدَّوَابِّ فِي السَّيْرِ وَالنَّهْىِ عَنِ التَّعْرِيسِ فِي الطَّرِيقِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Keeping animals' well being in mind when traveling, and the prohibition of halting in the road at the end of the night.

titles.arabic: باب السَّفَرِ قِطْعَةٌ مِنَ الْعَذَابِ وَاسْتِحْبَابِ تَعْجِيلِ الْمُسَافِرِ إِلَى أَهْلِهِ بَعْدَ قَضَاءِ شُغْلِهِ
titles.english: Chapter: Travel is a kind of torment, and it is recommended for the traveler to hasten back to his family after finishing his business

titles.arabic: باب كَرَاهَةِ الطُّرُوقِ وَهُوَ الدُّخُولُ لَيْلاً لِمَنْ وَرَدَ مِنْ سَفَرٍ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: It is disliked to enter at night when coming home from a journey

titles.arabic: باب الصَّيْدِ بِالْكِلاَبِ الْمُعَلَّمَةِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Hunting with trained dogs and arrows

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا غَابَ عَنْهُ الصَّيْدُ ثُمَّ وَجَدَهُ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: If the game disappears, then is found afterwards

titles.arabic: باب تَحْرِيمِ أَكْلِ كُلِّ ذِي نَابٍ مِنَ السِّبَاعِ وَكُلِّ ذِي مِخْلَبٍ مِنَ الطَّيْرِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The prohibition of eating any wild animal with Fangs and any bird with Talons

titles.arabic: باب إِبَاحَةِ مَيْتَاتِ الْبَحْرِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Permissibility of dead animals from the sea

titles.arabic: باب تَحْرِيمِ أَكْلِ لَحْمِ الْحُمُرِ الإِنْسِيَّةِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The prohibition of eating the meat of domesticated donkeys

titles.arabic: باب فِي أَكْلِ لُحُومِ الْخَيْلِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The permissibility of eating horse meat

titles.arabic: باب إِبَاحَةِ الضَّبِّ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The permissibility of eating the Dabb (mastigure)

titles.arabic: باب إِبَاحَةِ الْجَرَادِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The permissibility of eating Locusts

titles.arabic: باب إِبَاحَةِ الأَرْنَبِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The permissibility of eating Rabbit

titles.arabic: باب إِبَاحَةِ مَا يُسْتَعَانُ بِهِ عَلَى الاِصْطِيَادِ وَالْعَدُوِّ وَكَرَاهَةِ الْخَذْفِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The permissibility of using things that help in hunting and pursuing the enemy, but throwing small pebbles is disliked

titles.arabic: باب الأَمْرِ بِإِحْسَانِ الذَّبْحِ وَالْقَتْلِ وَتَحْدِيدِ الشَّفْرَةِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The command to be proficient in slaughtering and killing, and to sharpen the blade

titles.arabic: باب النَّهْىِ عَنْ صَبْرِ الْبَهَائِمِ، ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The prohibition of cornering animals in order to kill them (for sport)

titles.arabic: باب وَقْتِهَا ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The time for sacrifice

titles.arabic: باب سِنِّ الأُضْحِيَةِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The age of sacrificial animals

titles.arabic: باب اسْتِحْبَابِ الضَّحِيَّةِ وَذَبْحِهَا مُبَاشَرَةً بِلاَ تَوْكِيلٍ وَالتَّسْمِيَةِ وَالتَّكْبِيرِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: It is recommended to select a good animal for the sacrifice and to slaughter it oneself, not delegating it to anyone else, and to say the name of Allah, and to say the Takbir

titles.arabic: باب جَوَازِ الذَّبْحِ بِكُلِّ مَا أَنْهَرَ الدَّمَ إِلاَّ السِّنَّ وَالظُّفُرَ وَسَائِرَ الْعِظَامِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The permissibility of slaughtering with anything that makes the blood flow, except teeth and other bones

titles.arabic: باب بَيَانِ مَا كَانَ مِنَ النَّهْىِ عَنْ أَكْلِ لُحُومِ الأَضَاحِيِّ بَعْدَ ثَلاَثٍ فِي أَوَّلِ الإِسْلاَمِ وَبَيَانِ نَسْخِهِ وَإِبَاحَتِهِ إِلَى مَتَى شَاءَ
titles.english: Chapter: The prohibition of eating sacrificial meat for more than three days, which applied at the beginning of Islam but was then abrogated, and now it is permissible to eat it as long as one wants.

titles.arabic: باب الْفَرَعِ وَالْعَتِيرَةِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Fara' and 'Atirah

titles.arabic: باب نَهْيِ مَنْ دَخَلَ عَلَيْهِ عَشْرُ ذِي الْحِجَّةِ وَهُوَ مُرِيدُ التَّضْحِيَةِ أَنْ يَأْخُذَ مِنْ شَعْرِهِ أَوْ أَظْفَارِهِ شَيْئًا
titles.english: Chapter: When the first ten days of Dhul-Hijjah begin, it is forbidden for the one who wants to offer a sacrifice to remove anything from his hair, nails or skin

titles.arabic: باب تَحْرِيمِ الذَّبْحِ لِغَيْرِ اللَّهِ تَعَالَى وَلَعْنِ فَاعِلِهِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The prohibition of slaughtering a sacrifice for anything other than Allah, and the one who does that is cursed

titles.arabic: باب تَحْرِيمِ الْخَمْرِ وَبَيَانِ أَنَّهَا تَكُونُ مِنْ عَصِيرِ الْعِنَبِ وَمِنَ التَّمْرِ وَالْبُسْرِ وَالزَّبِيبِ وَغَيْرِهَا مِمَّا يُسْكِرُ
titles.english: Chapter: The prohibition of Khamr, which may be made from the juice of grapes, dried dates, unripe dates, raisins and other things that intoxicate

titles.arabic: باب تَحْرِيمِ تَخْلِيلِ الْخَمْرِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The prohibition of making vinegar from wine

titles.arabic: باب تَحْرِيمِ التَّدَاوِي بِالْخَمْرِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The prohibition of using Khamr as a remedy; It is not a remedy

titles.arabic: باب بَيَانِ أَنَّ جَمِيعَ مَا يُنْبَذُ مِمَّا يُتَّخَذُ مِنَ النَّخْلِ وَالْعِنَبِ يُسَمَّى خَمْرًا ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Everything that is taken from the date palm or grape vine and steeped is called Khamr

titles.arabic: باب كَرَاهَةِ انْتِبَاذِ التَّمْرِ وَالزَّبِيبِ مَخْلُوطَيْنِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: It is disliked to make Nabidh by mixing dried dates and raisins

titles.arabic: باب النَّهْيِ عَنْ الاِنْتِبَاذِ فِي الْمُزَفَّتِ وَالدُّبَّاءِ وَالْحَنْتَمِ وَالنَّقِيرِ وَبَيَانِ أَنَّهُ مَنْسُوخٌ وَأَنَّهُ الْيَوْمَ حَلاَلٌ مَا لَمْ يَصِرْ مُسْكِرًا
titles.english: Chapter: The prohibition of making Nabidh in Al-Muzaffat, Ad-Dubba' (Gourds), Al-Hantam and An-Naqir; This has been abrogated and now it is permitted, so long as it does not become intoxicating

titles.arabic: باب بَيَانِ أَنَّ كُلَّ مُسْكِرٍ خَمْرٌ وَأَنَّ كُلَّ خَمْرٍ حَرَامٌ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Every intoxicant is Khamr and all Khamr is Haram

titles.arabic: باب عُقُوبَةِ مَنْ شَرِبَ الْخَمْرَ إِذَا لَمْ يَتُبْ مِنْهَا بِمَنْعِهِ إِيَّاهَا فِي الآخِرَةِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The punishment of one who drinks Khamr if he does not repent from it: he will be denied it in the hereafter

titles.arabic: باب إِبَاحَةِ النَّبِيذِ الَّذِي لَمْ يَشْتَدَّ وَلَمْ يَصِرْ مُسْكِرًا ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The permissibility of Nabidh so long as it has not become strong and has not become intoxicating

titles.arabic: باب جَوَازِ شُرْبِ اللَّبَنِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The permissibility of drinking milk

titles.arabic: باب فِي شُرْبِ النَّبِيذِ وَتَخْمِيرِ الإِنَاءِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Drinking Nabidh and covering vessels

titles.arabic: باب الأَمْرِ بِتَغْطِيَةِ الإِنَاءِ وَإِيكَاءِ السِّقَاءِ وَإِغْلاَقِ الأَبْوَابِ وَذِكْرِ اسْمِ اللَّهِ عَلَيْهَا وَإِطْفَاءِ السِّرَاجِ وَالنَّارِ عِنْدَ النَّوْمِ وَكَفِّ الصِّبْيَانِ وَالْمَوَاشِي بَعْدَ الْمَغْرِبِ
titles.english: Chapter: It is recommended to cover vessels, tie up waterskins, close doors and mention the name of Allah over them, extinguish lamps and fires when going to sleep, and keep children and animals in after maghrib

titles.arabic: باب آدَابِ الطَّعَامِ وَالشَّرَابِ وَأَحْكَامِهِمَا ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The etiquette of eating and drinking, and rulings thereon

titles.arabic: باب كَرَاهِيَةِ الشُّرْبِ قَائِمًا ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Drinking while standing

titles.arabic: باب فِي الشُّرْبِ مِنْ زَمْزَمَ قَائِمًا ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Drinking zamzam water while standing

titles.arabic: باب كَرَاهَةِ التَّنَفُّسِ فِي نَفْسِ الإِنَاءِ وَاسْتِحْبَابِ التَّنَفُّسِ ثَلاَثًا خَارِجَ الإِنَاءِ
titles.english: Chapter: It is disliked to breathe into the vessel, and it is recommended to take three breaths, outside the vessel

titles.arabic: باب اسْتِحْبَابِ إِدَارَةِ الْمَاءِ وَاللَّبَنِ وَنَحْوِهِمَا عَنْ يَمِينِ الْمُبْتَدِئِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: It is recommended to pass water and milk etc., to the right of the one who drinks first

titles.arabic: باب اسْتِحْبَابِ لَعْقِ الأَصَابِعِ وَالْقَصْعَةِ وَأَكْلِ اللُّقْمَةِ السَّاقِطَةِ بَعْدَ مَسْحِ مَا يُصِيبُهَا مِنْ أَذًى وَكَرَاهَةِ مَسْحِ الْيَدِ قَبْلَ لَعْقِهَا
titles.english: Chapter: It is recommended to lick one's fingers and wipe the bowl, and to eat a piece of food that is dropped after removing any dirt on it. It is disliked to wipe one's hand before licking it, because of the possibility that the blessing of the food may be in that remaining part. The Sunnah is to eat with three fingers

titles.arabic: باب مَا يَفْعَلُ الضَّيْفُ إِذَا تَبِعَهُ غَيْرُ مَنْ دَعَاهُ صَاحِبُ الطَّعَامِ وَاسْتِحْبَابُ إِذْنِ صَاحِبِ الطَّعَامِ لِلتَّابِعِ
titles.english: Chapter: What the guest should do if he is accompanied by someone who was not invited by the host; it is recommended for the host to give permission to the one who has accompanied the guest

titles.arabic: باب جَوَازِ اسْتِتْبَاعِهِ غَيْرَهُ إِلَى دَارِ مَنْ يَثِقُ بِرِضَاهُ بِذَلِكَ وَيَتَحَقَّقُهُ تَحَقُّقًا تَامًّا وَاسْتِحْبَابِ الاِجْتِمَاعِ عَلَى الطَّعَامِ
titles.english: Chapter: It is permissible to take someone else to the house of one who you are certain will approve of that and will not mind. It is recommended to gather to eat

titles.arabic: باب جَوَازِ أَكْلِ الْمَرَقِ وَاسْتِحْبَابِ أَكْلِ الْيَقْطِينِ وَإِيثَارِ أَهْلِ الْمَائِدَةِ بَعْضِهِمْ بَعْضًا وَإِنْ كَانُوا ضِيفَانًا إِذَا لَمْ يَكْرَهْ ذَلِكَ صَاحِبُ الطَّعَامِ
titles.english: Chapter: It is permissible to eat soup, and it is recommended to eat squash, And for the people eating together to show preference to one another even if they are guests, so long as the host does not object to that

titles.arabic: باب اسْتِحْبَابِ وَضْعِ النَّوَى خَارِجَ التَّمْرِ وَاسْتِحْبَابِ دُعَاءِ الضَّيْفِ لأَهْلِ الطَّعَامِ وَطَلَبِ الدُّعَاءِ مِنَ الضَّيْفِ الصَّالِحِ وَإِجَابَتِهِ لِذَلِكَ
titles.english: Chapter: It is recommended to take the stones out of dates, and it is recommended for the guest to pray for the host and to ask a righteous guest to supplicate, and he should respond to that request

titles.arabic: باب أَكْلِ الْقِثَّاءِ بِالرُّطَبِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Eating cucumbers with fresh dates

titles.arabic: باب اسْتِحْبَابِ تَوَاضُعِ الآكِلِ وَصِفَةِ قُعُودِهِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: It is recommended to be humble when eating, and how to sit

titles.arabic: باب نَهْيِ الآكِلِ مَعَ جَمَاعَةٍ عَنْ قِرَانِ تَمْرَتَيْنِ وَنَحْوِهِمَا فِي لُقْمَةٍ إِلاَّ بِإِذْنِ أَصْحَابِهِ
titles.english: Chapter: The prohibition of eating two dates etc., at a time when eating with a group, except with the permission of one's companions

titles.arabic: باب فِي ادْخَالِ التَّمْرِ وَنَحْوِهِ مِنَ الأَقْوَاتِ لِلْعِيَالِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Storing dates and other provisions for one's children

titles.arabic: باب فَضْلِ تَمْرِ الْمَدِينَةِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The virtue of the dates of Al-Madinah

titles.arabic: باب فَضْلِ الْكَمْأَةِ وَمُدَاوَاةِ الْعَيْنِ بِهَا ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The virtue of truffles, and treating the eyes with them

titles.arabic: باب فَضِيلَةِ الأَسْوَدِ مِنَ الْكَبَاثِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The virtue of the black fruit from the Arak tree

titles.arabic: باب فَضِيلَةِ الْخَلِّ وَالتَّأَدُّمِ بِهِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The virtue of vinegar and using it as a condiment

titles.arabic: باب إِبَاحَةِ أَكْلِ الثُّومِ وَأَنَّهُ يَنْبَغِي لِمَنْ أَرَادَ خِطَابِ الْكِبَارِ تَرْكُهُ وَكَذَا مَا فِي مَعْنَاهُ
titles.english: Chapter: It is permissible to eat garlic, but the one who is going to address prominent people should refrain from eating it, and the same applies to other, similar foods

titles.arabic: باب إِكْرَامِ الضَّيْفِ وَفَضْلِ إِيثَارِهِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Honoring guests and the virtue of showing preference to one's guest

titles.arabic: باب فَضِيلَةِ الْمُوَاسَاةِ فِي الطَّعَامِ الْقَلِيلِ وَأَنَّ طَعَامَ الاِثْنَيْنِ يَكْفِي الثَّلاَثَةَ وَنَحْوِ ذَلِكَ
titles.english: Chapter: The virtue of sharing a small amount of food, and the food of two is sufficient for three, and so on.

titles.arabic: باب الْمُؤْمِنُ يَأْكُلُ فِي مِعًى وَاحِدٍ وَالْكَافِرُ يَأْكُلُ فِي سَبْعَةِ أَمْعَاءٍ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The believer eats in one intestine and the disbeliever eats in seven intestines.

titles.arabic: باب لاَ يَعِيبُ الطَّعَامَ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Do not criticize food

titles.arabic: باب تَحْرِيمِ أَوَانِي الذَّهَبِ وَالْفِضَّةِ فِي الشُّرْبِ وَغَيْرِهِ عَلَى الرِّجَالِ وَالنِّسَاءِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Prohibition Of Using Vessels Of Gold And Silver For Drinking Etc., For Men And Women

titles.arabic: باب تَحْرِيمِ اسْتِعْمَالِ إِنَاءِ الذَّهَبِ وَالْفِضَّةِ عَلَى الرِّجَالِ وَالنِّسَاءِ وَخَاتَمِ الذَّهَبِ وَالْحَرِيرِ عَلَى الرَّجُلِ وَإِبَاحَتِهِ لِلنِّسَاءِ وَإِبَاحَةِ الْعَلَمِ وَنَحْوِهِ لِلرَّجُلِ مَا لَمْ يَزِدْ عَلَى أَرْبَعِ أَصَابِعَ
titles.english: Chapter: The Prohibition Of Using Vessels Of Gold And Silver For Men And Women, And Gold Rings And Silk For Men, But They Are Permissible For Women. Permissibility Of Silken Borders On Garments For Men, But It Should Not Be More Than Four Fingers Wide

titles.arabic: باب إِبَاحَةِ لُبْسِ الْحَرِيرِ لِلرَّجُلِ إِذَا كَانَ بِهِ حِكَّةٌ أَوْ نَحْوُهَا ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Permissibility Of Wearing Silk For Men, If A Man Has A Skin Disease Or Similar Problem

titles.arabic: باب النَّهْىِ عَنْ لُبْسِ الرَّجُلِ الثَّوْبَ الْمُعَصْفَرَ، ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Prohibition Of A Man Wearing A Garment Dyed With Safflower

titles.arabic: باب فَضْلِ لِبَاسِ ثِيَابِ الْحِبَرَةِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Virtue Of Wearing The Hibarah

titles.arabic: بَاب التَّوَاضُعِ فِي اللِّبَاسِ وَالِاقْتِصَارِ عَلَى الْغَلِيظِ مِنْهُ وَالْيَسِيرِ فِي اللِّبَاسِ وَالْفِرَاشِ وَغَيْرِهِمَا
titles.english: Chapter: Humility In Dress And Sticking To Coarse And Simple Clothes, Furnishings Etc., Permissibility Of Wearing Clothes Made From Camel Hair And Those On Which There Are Markings

titles.arabic: باب جَوَازِ اتِّخَاذِ الأَنْمَاطِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Permissibility Of Using Blankets

titles.arabic: باب كَرَاهَةِ مَا زَادَ عَلَى الْحَاجَةِ مِنَ الْفِرَاشِ وَاللِّبَاسِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: It Is Disliked To Have More Furniture And Bedding Than One Needs

titles.arabic: باب تَحْرِيمِ جَرِّ الثَّوْبِ خُيَلاَءَ وَبَيَانِ حَدِّ مَا يَجُوزُ إِرْخَاؤُهُ إِلَيْهِ وَمَا يُسْتَحَبّ
titles.english: Chapter: The Prohibition Of Letting One's Garment Drag Out Of Pride, And The Extent To Which It Is Permissible To Let It Hang Down And The Extent To Which It Is Recommended

titles.arabic: باب تَحْرِيمِ التَّبَخْتُرِ فِي الْمَشْىِ مَعَ إِعْجَابِهِ بِثِيَابِهِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Prohibition Against Strutting With Pride, And Being Amazed With One's Clothes

titles.arabic: بَاب تَحْرِيمِ خَاتَمِ الذَّهَبِ عَلَى الرِّجَالِ وَنَسْخِ مَا كَانَ مِنْ إِبَاحَتِهِ فِي أَوَّلِ الْإِسْلَامِ
titles.english: Chapter: The Prohibition Of Gold Rings For Men, And Abrogation Of Their Allowance After The Beginning Of Islam

titles.arabic: بَاب لُبْسِ النَّبِيِّ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ خَاتَمًا مِنْ وَرِقٍ نَقْشُهُ مُحَمَّدٌ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ وَلُبْسِ الْخُلَفَاءِ لَهُ مِنْ بَعْدِهِ
titles.english: Chapter: The Prophet (SAW) Wore A Ring Of Silver On Which Was Inscribed The Words Muhammad Rasul Allah (Muhammad the Messenger of Allah), And The Caliphs Wore It After He Died

titles.arabic: باب فِي اتِّخَاذِ النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم خَاتَمًا لَمَّا أَرَادَ أَنْ يَكْتُبَ إِلَى الْعَجَمِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Prophet (SAW) Acquired A Ring When He Wanted To Send Letters To The Non-Arabs

titles.arabic: باب فِي طَرْحِ الْخَوَاتِمِ ‏.‏
titles.english: Chapter: Discarding Rings

titles.arabic: باب فِي خَاتَمِ الْوَرِقِ فَصُّهُ حَبَشِيٌّ ‏.‏
titles.english: Chapter: Silver Ring With An Abyssinian Stone

titles.arabic: باب فِي لُبْسِ الْخَاتَمِ فِي الْخِنْصَرِ مِنَ الْيَدِ ‏.‏
titles.english: Chapter: Wearing Rings On The Little Finger

titles.arabic: باب النَّهْىِ عَنِ التَّخَتُّمِ، فِي الْوُسْطَى وَالَّتِي تَلِيهَا ‏.‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Prohibition Of Wearing Rings On The Middle Finger And The One That Is Next To It

titles.arabic: بَاب اسْتِحْبَابِ لُبْسِ النِّعَالِ وَمَا فِي مَعْنَاهَا
titles.english: Chapter: It Is Recommended To Wear Sandals et

titles.arabic: بَاب اسْتِحْبَابِ لُبْسِ النَّعْلِ فِي الْيُمْنَى أَوَّلًا وَالْخَلْعِ مِنْ الْيُسْرَى أَوَّلًا وَكَرَاهَةِ الْمَشْيِ فِي نَعْلٍ وَاحِدَةٍ
titles.english: Chapter: It Is Recommended To Put Shoes On The Right Foot First, And To Take Them Off From The Left Foot First, And It Is Disliked To Walk In One Shoe

titles.arabic: باب النَّهْىِ عَنِ اشْتِمَالِ الصَّمَّاءِ، وَالاِحْتِبَاءِ، فِي ثَوْبٍ وَاحِدٍ ‏.‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Prohibition Of Ishtimal As-Samma' (Wrapping Oneself Up Entirely In One's Garment With No Room For The Arms To Emerge), And Al-Ihtiba' (Wrapping Oneself Up) In A Single Garment With The Legs Drawn Up To The Belly Exposing Part Of The 'Awrah

titles.arabic: باب فِي مَنْعِ الاِسْتِلْقَاءِ عَلَى الظَّهْرِ وَوَضْعِ إِحْدَى الرِّجْلَيْنِ عَلَى الأُخْرَى ‏.‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Ruling On Lying On Ones Back With One Leg On Top Of The Other

titles.arabic: باب فِي إِبَاحَةِ الاِسْتِلْقَاءِ وَوَضْعِ إِحْدَى الرِّجْلَيْنِ عَلَى الأُخْرَى ‏.‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Permissibility Of Lying Down And Placing One Leg On Top Of The Other

titles.arabic: بَاب نَهْيِ الرَّجُلِ عَنْ التَّزَعْفُرِ
titles.english: Chapter: The Prohibition Of A Man Dyeing From With Saffron

titles.arabic: بَاب اسْتِحْبَابِ خِضَابِ الشَّيْبِ بِصُفْرَةٍ أَوْ حُمْرَةٍ وَتَحْرِيمِهِ بِالسَّوَادِ
titles.english: Chapter: It Is Recommended To Dye White Hair With Yellow Or Red Dye, But Black Dye Is Haram

titles.arabic: باب فِي مُخَالَفَةِ الْيَهُودِ فِي الصَّبْغِ ‏.‏
titles.english: Chapter: Differing From The Jews With Regard To Dyeing

titles.arabic: بَاب تَحْرِيمِ تَصْوِيرِ صُورَةِ الْحَيَوَانِ وَتَحْرِيمِ اتِّخَاذِ مَا فِيهِ صُورَةٌ غَيْرُ مُمْتَهَنَةٍ بِالْفَرْشِ وَنَحْوِهِ
titles.english: Chapter: The Prohibition Of Making Images Of Living Beings, And The Prohibition Of Using Images That Are Not Subjected To Disrespect In Furnishings And The Like; The Angels (Peace Be Upon Them) Do Not Enter A House In Which There Is An Image Or A Dog

titles.arabic: باب كَرَاهَةِ الْكَلْبِ وَالْجَرَسِ فِي السَّفَرِ ‏.‏
titles.english: Chapter: It Is Disliked To Take Dogs And Bells On A Journey

titles.arabic: باب كَرَاهَةِ قِلاَدَةِ الْوَتَرِ فِي رَقَبَةِ الْبَعِيرِ ‏.‏
titles.english: Chapter: It Is Disliked To Hang Garlands On The Necks Of Camels

titles.arabic: باب النَّهْىِ عَنْ ضَرْبِ الْحَيَوَانِ، فِي وَجْهِهِ وَوَسْمِهِ فِيهِ ‏.‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Prohibition Of Striking Or Branding Animals On The Face

titles.arabic: بَاب جَوَازِ وَسْمِ الْحَيَوَانِ غَيْرِ الْآدَمِيِّ فِي غَيْرِ الْوَجْهِ وَنَدْبِهِ فِي نَعَمْ الزَّكَاةِ وَالْجِزْيَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: The Permissibility Of Branding Animals Anywhere But On The Face, And This Is Recommended In The Case Of Animals Given As Zakat Ot Jizyah

titles.arabic: باب كَرَاهَةِ الْقَزَعِ ‏.‏
titles.english: Chapter: It Is Disliked To Shave Part Of The Head And Leave Part

titles.arabic: باب النَّهْىِ عَنِ الْجُلُوسِ، فِي الطُّرُقَاتِ وَإِعْطَاءِ الطَّرِيقِ حَقَّهُ ‏.‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Prohibition Of Sitting In The Street; And Giving The Street Its Rights

titles.arabic: بَاب تَحْرِيمِ فِعْلِ الْوَاصِلَةِ وَالْمُسْتَوْصِلَةِ وَالْوَاشِمَةِ وَالْمُسْتَوْشِمَةِ وَالنَّامِصَةِ وَالْمُتَنَمِّصَةِ وَالْمُتَفَلِّجَاتِ وَالْمُغَيِّرَاتِ خَلْقِ اللَّهِ
titles.english: Chapter: The Prohibition Adding Hair Extensions, Having Them Added, Tattooing, Being Tattooed, An-Namisah, Al-Mutanamisah, Separating Teeth, And Changing The Creation Of Allah

titles.arabic: باب النِّسَاءِ الْكَاسِيَاتِ الْعَارِيَاتِ الْمَائِلاَتِ الْمُمِيلاَتِ ‏.‏
titles.english: Chapter: Women Who Are Clothed Yet Naked, Turning Away From Righteousness And Leading Others Astray

titles.arabic: باب النَّهْىِ عَنِ التَّزْوِيرِ، فِي اللِّبَاسِ وَغَيْرِهِ وَالتَّشَبُّعِ بِمَا لَمْ يُعْطَ ‏.‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Prohibition Of Wearing A Garment Of Falsehood Etc., And Pretending To Have That Which Has Not Been Given To One

titles.arabic: باب النَّهْىِ عَنِ التَّكَنِّي، بِأَبِي الْقَاسِمِ وَبَيَانِ مَا يُسْتَحَبُّ مِنَ الأَسْمَاءِ ‏.‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Prohibition Of Taking The Kunyah Abul-Qasim, And The Names Which Are Recommended

titles.arabic: باب كَرَاهَةِ التَّسْمِيَةِ بِالأَسْمَاءِ الْقَبِيحَةِ وَبِنَافِعٍ وَنَحْوِهِ ‏.‏
titles.english: Chapter: It Is Disliked To Use Objectionable Names And Names Such As Nafi' (Beneficial) Etc

titles.arabic: بَاب اسْتِحْبَابِ تَغْيِيرِ الِاسْمِ الْقَبِيحِ إِلَى حَسَنٍ وَتَغْيِيرِ اسْمِ بَرَّةَ إِلَى زَيْنَبَ وَجُوَيْرِيَةَ وَنَحْوِهِمَا
titles.english: Chapter: It Is Recommended To Change Bad Names To Good Names, And To Change The Name Barrah To Zainab, Juwayriyah And The Like

titles.arabic: باب تَحْرِيمِ التَّسَمِّي بِمَلِكِ الأَمْلاَكِ وَبِمَلِكِ الْمُلُوكِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Prohibition Of The Names Malik Al-Amlak Or Malik Al-Muluk "King Of Kings"

titles.arabic: بَاب اسْتِحْبَابِ تَحْنِيكِ الْمَوْلُودِ عِنْدَ وِلَادَتِهِ وَحَمْلِهِ إِلَى صَالِحٍ يُحَنِّكُهُ وَجَوَازِ تَسْمِيَتِهِ يَوْمَ وِلَادَتِهِ وَاسْتِحْبَابِ التَّسْمِيَةِ بِعَبْدِ اللَّهِ وَإِبْرَاهِيمَ وَسَائِرِ أَسْمَاءِ الْأَنْبِيَاءِ عَلَيْهِمْ السَّلَام
titles.english: Chapter: It Is Recommended To Perform Tahnik For The Newborn When He Is Born And To Take Him To A Righteous Man To Perform Tahnik For Him; It Is Permissible To Name Him On The Day He Is Born, And It Is Recommended To Use The Names 'Abdullah, Ibrahim, And The Names Of All Other Prophets, Peace Be Upon Them

titles.arabic: باب جَوَازِ قَوْلِهِ لِغَيْرِ ابْنِهِ يَا بُنَىَّ وَاسْتِحْبَابِهِ لِلْمُلاَطَفَةِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: It Is Permissible To Say: "O My Son" To Someone Other Than One's Son, And It Is Recommended To Speak Kindly

titles.arabic: باب الاِسْتِئْذَانِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Seeking Permission To Enter A House

titles.arabic: باب كَرَاهَةِ قَوْلِ الْمُسْتَأْذِنِ أَنَا ‏إِذَا قِيلَ مَنْ هَذَا ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: It Is Disliked For The Person Who Is Seeking Permission To Say "Me" When Asked "Who Is It?"

titles.arabic: باب تَحْرِيمِ النَّظَرِ فِي بَيْتِ غَيْرِهِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Prohibition Of Looking Into A House

titles.arabic: باب نَظَرِ الْفَجْأَةِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: An Accidental Glance

titles.arabic: باب يُسَلِّمُ الرَّاكِبُ عَلَى الْمَاشِي وَالْقَلِيلُ عَلَى الْكَثِيرِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The One Who Is Riding Should Greet The One Who Is Walking, And The Smaller Group Should Greet The Larger Group

titles.arabic: باب مِنْ حَقِّ الْجُلُوسِ عَلَى الطَّرِيقِ رَدُّ السَّلاَمِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: One Of The Duties Of Sitting In The Street Is To Return Salam

titles.arabic: باب مِنْ حَقِّ الْمُسْلِمِ لِلْمُسْلِمِ رَدُّ السَّلاَمِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: One Of The Rights Of One Muslim Over Another Is (The Greeting Of) Salam

titles.arabic: باب النَّهْىِ عَنِ ابْتِدَاءِ، أَهْلِ الْكِتَابِ بِالسَّلاَمِ وَكَيْفَ يَرُدُّ عَلَيْهِمْ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Prohibition Of Initiating The Greeting With The People Of The Book, And How To Respond To Them

titles.arabic: باب اسْتِحْبَابِ السَّلاَمِ عَلَى الصِّبْيَانِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: It Is Recommended To Greet Children With Salam

titles.arabic: باب جَوَازِ جَعْلِ الإِذْنِ رَفْعَ حِجَابٍ أَوْ نَحْوَهُ مِنَ الْعَلاَمَاتِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: It Is Permissible To Give Permission To Enter By Raising The Curtain Or Giving Some Other Sign

titles.arabic: باب إِبَاحَةُ الْخُرُوجِ لِلنِّسَاءِ لِقَضَاءِ حَاجَةِ الإِنْسَانِ ‏‏
