titles.english: Chapter: The Permissibility Of Women Going Out To Relieve Themselves

titles.arabic: باب تَحْرِيمِ الْخَلْوَةِ بِالأَجْنَبِيَّةِ وَالدُّخُولِ عَلَيْهَا ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Prohibition Of Being Alone With A Non-Mahram Woman Or Entering Upon Her

titles.arabic: باب بَيَانِ أَنَّهُ يُسْتَحَبُّ لِمَنْ رُئِيَ خَالِيًا بِامْرَأَةٍ وَكَانَتْ زَوْجَةً أَوْ مَحْرَمًا لَهُ
titles.english: Chapter: It Is Recommended For The One Who Is Seen Alone With A Woman Who Is His Wife Or Mahram, To Say; "This Is So-And-So,' To Ward off Suspicion

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ أَتَى مَجْلِسًا فَوَجَدَ فُرْجَةً فَجَلَسَ فِيهَا وَإِلاَّ وَرَاءَهُمْ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: If A Man Comes To A Gathering And Finds A Space. Let Him Sit There, Otherwise Let Him Sit Behind Them

titles.arabic: باب تَحْرِيمِ إِقَامَةِ الإِنْسَانِ مِنْ مَوْضِعِهِ الْمُبَاحِ الَّذِي سَبَقَ إِلَيْهِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Prohibition Of Making A Man Get Up From A Place That He Reached First

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا قَامَ مِنْ مَجْلِسِهِ ثُمَّ عَادَ فَهُوَ أَحَقُّ بِهِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: If A Man Gets Up From His Spot Then Comes Back To It, He Has More Right To It

titles.arabic: باب مَنْعِ الْمُخَنَّثِ مِنَ الدُّخُولِ عَلَى النِّسَاءِ الأَجَانِبِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Forbidding A Hermaphrodite From Entering Upon Non-Mahram Women

titles.arabic: باب جَوَازِ إِرْدَافِ الْمَرْأَةِ الأَجْنَبِيَّةِ إِذَا أَعْيَتْ فِي الطَّرِيقِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: It Is Permissible To Seat A Non-Mahram Woman Behind One (On A Mount) If She Is Exhausted On The Road

titles.arabic: باب تَحْرِيمِ مُنَاجَاةِ الاِثْنَيْنِ دُونَ الثَّالِثِ بِغَيْرِ رِضَاهُ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Prohibition Of Two People Conversing Privately To The Exclusion Of A Third Without His Consent

titles.arabic: باب الطِّبِّ وَالْمَرَضِ وَالرُّقَى ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Medicine, Sickness And Ruqyah

titles.arabic: باب السِّحْرِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Witchcraft

titles.arabic: باب السَّمِّ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Poison

titles.arabic: باب اسْتِحْبَابِ رُقْيَةِ الْمَرِيضِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: It Is Recommended To Recite Ruqyah For One Who Is Sick

titles.arabic: باب رُقْيَةِ الْمَرِيضِ بِالْمُعَوِّذَاتِ وَالنَّفْثِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Reciting Al-Mu'awwidhat As Ruqyah For The Sick, And Blowing Over Them

titles.arabic: باب اسْتِحْبَابِ الرُّقْيَةِ مِنَ الْعَيْنِ وَالنَّمْلَةِ وَالْحُمَةِ وَالنَّظْرَةِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: It Is Recommended To Recite Ruqyah For The Evil Eye, Pustules, And Stings

titles.arabic: باب لاَ بَأْسَ بِالرُّقَى مَا لَمْ يَكُنْ فِيهِ شِرْكٌ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: There Is Nothing Wrong With Ruqyah That Does Not Involve Shirk

titles.arabic: باب جَوَازِ أَخْذِ الأُجْرَةِ عَلَى الرُّقْيَةِ بِالْقُرْآنِ وَالأَذْكَارِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Permissibility Of Accepting A Reward For Reciting Ruqyah With Qur'an And Supplications

titles.arabic: باب اسْتِحْبَابِ وَضْعِ يَدِهِ عَلَى مَوْضِعِ الأَلَمِ مَعَ الدُّعَاءِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: It Is Recommended To Put Ones Hand On The Site Of The Pain When Supplicating

titles.arabic: باب التَّعَوُّذِ مِنْ شَيْطَانِ الْوَسْوَسَةِ فِي الصَّلاَةِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Seeking Refuge With Allah From The Devil Who Whispers During Prayer

titles.arabic: باب لِكُلِّ دَاءٍ دَوَاءٌ وَاسْتِحْبَابُ التَّدَاوِي ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: For Every Disease There Is A Remedy, And It Is Recommended To Treat Disease

titles.arabic: باب كَرَاهَةِ التَّدَاوِي بِاللَّدُودِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: It Is Disliked To Administer Medicine In The Side Of The Mouth Forcibly

titles.arabic: باب التَّدَاوِي بِالْعُودِ الْهِنْدِيِّ وَهُوَ الْكُسْتُ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Treatment With Indian Aloeswood, Which Is Costmary

titles.arabic: باب التَّدَاوِي بِالْحَبَّةِ السَّوْدَاءِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Healing Sickness With The Black Seed

titles.arabic: باب التَّلْبِينَةُ مَجَمَّةٌ لِفُؤَادِ الْمَرِيضِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Talbinah Gives Comfort To The Sick Person

titles.arabic: باب التَّدَاوِي بِسَقْىِ الْعَسَلِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Treating Sickness With A Drink Of Honey

titles.arabic: باب الطَّاعُونِ وَالطِّيَرَةِ وَالْكَهَانَةِ وَنَحْوِهَا ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Plague, Ill Omens, Soothsaying And The Like

titles.arabic: باب لاَ عَدْوَى وَلاَ طِيَرَةَ وَلاَ هَامَةَ وَلاَ صَفَرَ
titles.english: Chapter: There Is No 'Adwa, No Tiyarah (Evil Omens), No Hamah. No Safar, No Nawa', And No Ghoul, And No Sick Camel Should Be Brought To A Healthy Camel

titles.arabic: باب الطِّيَرَةِ وَالْفَأْلِ وَمَا يَكُونُ فِيهِ الشُّؤْمُ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: (Evil) Omens And Al-Fa'l, And That Which May Be Regarded As Inauspicious

titles.arabic: باب تَحْرِيمِ الْكِهَانَةِ وَإِتْيَانِ الْكُهَّانِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Prohibition Of Soothsaying And Going To Soothsayers

titles.arabic: باب اجْتِنَابِ الْمَجْذُومِ وَنَحْوِهِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Avoiding Lepers Etc.

titles.arabic: باب قَتْلِ الْحَيَّاتِ وَغَيْرِهَا ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Killing Snakes Etc.

titles.arabic: باب اسْتِحْبَابِ قَتْلِ الْوَزَغِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: It Is Recommended To Kill Geckos

titles.arabic: باب النَّهْىِ عَنْ قَتْلِ النَّمْلِ، ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Prohibition Of Killing Ants

titles.arabic: باب تَحْرِيمِ قَتْلِ الْهِرَّةِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Prohibition Of Killing Cats

titles.arabic: باب فَضْلِ سَاقِي الْبَهَائِمِ الْمُحْتَرَمَةِ وَإِطْعَامِهَا ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Virtue Of Giving Food And Water To Animals Which Are Unlawful To Eat

titles.arabic: باب بَدْءِ الأَذَانِ
titles.english: Chapter: The Beginning Of The Adhan

titles.arabic: باب الأَمْرِ بِشَفْعِ الأَذَانِ وَإِيتَارِ الإِقَامَةِ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Command to say the phrases of the Adhan twice and the phrases of the iqamah once, except the phrase, "Prayer is about to begin," which is to be said twice

titles.arabic: باب صِفَةِ الأَذَانِ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: Description Of The Adhan

titles.arabic: باب اسْتِحْبَابِ اتِّخَاذِ مُؤَذِّنَيْنِ لِلْمَسْجِدِ الْوَاحِدِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: It Is Recommended To Have Two Mu'adhdhin In A Single Masjid

titles.arabic: باب جَوَازِ أَذَانِ الأَعْمَى إِذَا كَانَ مَعَهُ بَصِيرٌ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: It Is Permissible For A Blind Man To Call The Adhan So long As There Is A Man With Him Who Sees

titles.arabic: باب الإِمْسَاكِ عَنِ الإِغَارَةِ، عَلَى قَوْمٍ فِي دَارِ الْكُفْرِ إِذَا سُمِعَ فِيهِمُ الأَذَانُ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: Refraining From Attacking People In Dar Al-Kufr (Non-Muslim Lands) If The Adhan Is Heard Among Them

titles.arabic: باب اسْتِحْبَابِ الْقَوْلِ مِثْلَ قَوْلِ الْمُؤَذِّنِ لِمَنْ سَمِعَهُ ثُمَّ يُصَلِّي عَلَى النَّبِيِّ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ ثُمَّ يَسْأَلُ اللَّهَ لَهُ الْوَسِيلَةَ
titles.english: Chapter: It Is Recommended For The One Who Hears The Mu'adhdhin To Repeat His Words, Then To Send Salat Upon The Prophet (saws) And Ask Allah To Grant Him Al-Wasilah

titles.arabic: باب فَضْلِ الأَذَانِ وَهَرَبِ الشَّيْطَانِ عِنْدَ سَمَاعِهِ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Virtue Of the Adhan, And The Shaitan Flees When He Hears It

titles.arabic: باب اسْتِحْبَابِ رَفْعِ الْيَدَيْنِ حَذْوَ الْمَنْكِبَيْنِ مَعَ تَكْبِيرَةِ الإِحْرَامِ وَالرُّكُوعِ وَفِي الرَّفْعِ مِنَ الرُّكُوعِ وَأَنَّهُ لاَ يَفْعَلُهُ إِذَا رَفَعَ مِنَ السُّجُودِ
titles.english: Chapter: It Is Recommended To Raise The Hands Level With The Shoulders When Saying The Opening Takbir, When Bowing And When Rising From Bowing. But That Is Not To Be Done When Rising From The Prostration

titles.arabic: باب إِثْبَاتِ التَّكْبِيرِ فِي كُلِّ خَفْضٍ وَرَفْعٍ فِي الصَّلاَةِ إِلاَّ رَفْعَهُ مِنَ الرُّكُوعِ فَيَقُولُ فِيهِ سَمِعَ اللَّهُ لِمَنْ حَمِدَهُ
titles.english: Chapter: Affirming The Takbir For Every Movement Up Or Down In The Prayer, Except When Rising From Ruku' When One Should Say: Sami'aAllahu Liman Hamidah (Allah Hears Those Who Praise Him)

titles.arabic: باب وُجُوبِ قِرَاءَةِ الْفَاتِحَةِ فِي كُلِّ رَكْعَةٍ وَإِنَّهُ إِذَا لَمْ يُحْسِنِ الْفَاتِحَةَ وَلاَ أَمْكَنَهُ تَعَلُّمُهَا قَرَأَ مَا تَيَسَّرَ لَهُ مِنْ غَيْرِهَا
titles.english: Chapter: It Is Obligatory To Recite Al-Fatihah In Every Rak'ah; If A Person Cannot Recite Al-Fatihah Or Cannot Learn It, Then He Should Recite Whatever Else He Can Manage

titles.arabic: باب نَهْىِ الْمَأْمُومِ عَنْ جَهْرِهِ، بِالْقِرَاءَةِ خَلْفَ إِمَامِهِ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: Prohibiting The Follower From Reciting Aloud Behind An Imam

titles.arabic: باب حُجَّةِ مَنْ قَالَ لاَ يَجْهَرُ بِالْبَسْمَلَةِ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Proof Of Those Who Say That The Basmalah Should Not Be Recited Aloud

titles.arabic: باب حُجَّةِ مَنْ قَالَ الْبَسْمَلَةُ آيَةٌ مِنْ أَوَّلِ كُلِّ سُورَةٍ سِوَى بَرَاءَةَ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Proof Of Those Who Say That The Bismillah Is A Verse At The Beginning Of Every Surah, Except Bara'ah (At-Tawbah)

titles.arabic: باب وَضْعِ يَدِهِ الْيُمْنَى عَلَى الْيُسْرَى بَعْدَ تَكْبِيرَةِ الإِحْرَامِ تَحْتَ صَدْرِهِ فَوْقَ سُرَّتِهِ وَوَضْعِهِمَا فِي السُّجُودِ عَلَى الأَرْضِ حَذْوَ مَنْكِبَيْهِ
titles.english: Chapter: The Placing Of The Right Hand Over The Left Hand After The First Takbir In Prayer (takbir-i-tahrima) Below The Chest And Above The Navel And Then Placing Them Apposite The Shoulders In Prostration

titles.arabic: باب التَّشَهُّدِ فِي الصَّلاَةِ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Tashah-hud In The Prayer

titles.arabic: باب الصَّلاَةِ عَلَى النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم بَعْدَ التَّشَهُّدِ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: Sending Salat Upon The Prophet (saws) After The Tashah-hud

titles.arabic: باب التَّسْمِيعِ وَالتَّحْمِيدِ وَالتَّأْمِينِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Saying "Sami'a Allahu liman Hamidah," Rabbana wa lakal-hamd," and "Amin"

titles.arabic: باب ائْتِمَامِ الْمَأْمُومِ بِالإِمَامِ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: Following The Imam

titles.arabic: باب النَّهْىِ عَنْ مُبَادَرَةِ الإِمَامِ، بِالتَّكْبِيرِ وَغَيْرِهِ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Prohibition Of Preceding The Imam In Saying The Takbir Or Anything Else

titles.arabic: باب اسْتِخْلاَفِ الإِمَامِ إِذَا عَرَضَ لَهُ عُذْرٌ مِنْ مَرَضٍ وَسَفَرٍ وَغَيْرِهِمَا مَنْ يُصَلِّي بِالنَّاسِ وَأَنَّ مَنْ صَلَّى خَلْفَ إِمَامٍ جَالِسٍ لِعَجْزِهِ عَنِ الْقِيَامِ لَزِمَهُ الْقِيَامُ إِذَا قَدَرَ عَلَيْهِ وَنَسْخِ الْقُعُودِ خَلْفَ الْقَاعِدِ فِي حَقِّ مَنْ قَدَرَ عَلَى الْقِيَامِ
titles.english: Chapter: If The Imam Experiences An Excuse, From Illness, Or Travelling, Etc. He May Appoint Someone Else To Lead The People In Prayer; The One Who Offers Prayer Behind The Imam Sitting Because He Is Unable To Stand Must Stand If He Is Able To Do So; And The Abrogation Of Sitting Behind A Sitting Imam For Those Who Are Able To Stand

titles.arabic: باب تَقْدِيمِ الْجَمَاعَةِ مَنْ يُصَلِّي بِهِمْ إِذَا تَأَخَّرَ الإِمَامُ وَلَمْ يَخَافُوا مَفْسَدَةً بِالتَّقْدِيمِ
titles.english: Chapter: The Congregation Appointing Someone To Lead Them If The Imam Is Delayed And If There Is No Fear Of Negative Repercussions

titles.arabic: باب تَسْبِيحِ الرَّجُلِ وَتَصْفِيقِ الْمَرْأَةِ إِذَا نَابَهُمَا شَىْءٌ فِي الصَّلاَةِ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: Men Saying The Tasbih And Women Clapping If They Notice Anything During The Prayer

titles.arabic: باب الأَمْرِ بِتَحْسِينِ الصَّلاَةِ وَإِتْمَامِهَا وَالْخُشُوعِ فِيهَا ‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Command To Perform The Prayer Properly, To Complete It, And To Have Khushu' In It

titles.arabic: باب النَّهْىِ عَنْ سَبْقِ الإِمَامِ، بِرُكُوعٍ أَوْ سُجُودٍ وَنَحْوِهِمَا ‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Prohibition Of Preceding The Imam While Bowing, Prostrating And So On

titles.arabic: باب النَّهْىِ عَنْ رَفْعِ الْبَصَرِ، إِلَى السَّمَاءِ فِي الصَّلاَةِ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Prohibition On Lifting Ones Gaze To The Heavens When in Salat

titles.arabic: باب الأَمْرِ بَالسُّكُونِ فِي الصَّلاَةِ وَالنَّهْيِ عَنِ الإِشَارَةِ بِالْيَدِ وَرَفْعِهَا عِنْدَ السَّلاَمِ وَإِتْمَامِ الصُّفُوفِ الأُوَلِ وَالتَّرَاصِّ فِيهَا وَالأَمْرِ بِالاِجْتِمَاعِ
titles.english: Chapter: The Command To Be Calm During The Prayer And The Prohibition Of Gesturing With One's Hand And Raising It When Saying The Salam; And Completing The First Rows, Aligning In Them, And The Command To Come Together

titles.arabic: باب تَسْوِيَةِ الصُّفُوفِ وَإِقَامَتِهَا وَفَضْلِ الأَوَّلِ فَالأَوَّلِ مِنْهَا وَالاِزْدِحَامِ عَلَى الصَّفِّ الأَوَّلِ وَالْمُسَابَقَةِ إِلَيْهَا وَتَقْدِيمِ أُولِي الْفَضْلِ وَتَقْرِيبِهِمْ مِنَ الإِمَامِ
titles.english: Chapter: Straightening The Rows; The Virtue Of The Front Row And Then The Next; Competing With One Another For The Front Row; The People Of Virtue Should Take Precedence And Be Closest To The Imam

titles.arabic: باب أَمْرِ النِّسَاءِ الْمُصَلِّيَاتِ وَرَاءَ الرِّجَالِ أَنْ لاَ يَرْفَعْنَ رُءُوسَهُنَّ مِنَ السُّجُودِ حَتَّى يَرْفَعَ الرِّجَالُ
titles.english: Chapter: The Command To Women Who Are Praying Behind Men Not To Raise Their Heads From Prostration Before The Men Have Done So

titles.arabic: باب خُرُوجِ النِّسَاءِ إِلَى الْمَسَاجِدِ إِذَا لَمْ يَتَرَتَّبْ عَلَيْهِ فِتْنَةٌ وَأَنَّهَا لاَ تَخْرُجُ مُطَيَّبَةً
titles.english: Chapter: Women Going Out To The Masjid So Long As No Fitnah Results From That; and They Should Not Go Out Wearing Perfume

titles.arabic: باب التَّوَسُّطِ فِي الْقِرَاءَةِ فِي الصَّلاَةِ الْجَهْرِيَّةِ بَيْنَ الْجَهْرِ وَالإِسْرَارِ إِذَا خَافَ مِنَ الْجَهْرِ مَفْسَدَةً
titles.english: Chapter: Moderation When Reciting Qur'an In A Prayer When It Is To Be Recited Out Loud, And Making it Neither Too Loud Nor Too Soft, And When There Is The Fear Of Negative Consequences If It Is Recited Out Loud

titles.arabic: باب الاِسْتِمَاعِ لِلْقِرَاءَةِ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: Listening to the Recitation

titles.arabic: باب الْجَهْرِ بِالْقِرَاءَةِ فِي الصُّبْحِ وَالْقِرَاءَةِ عَلَى الْجِنِّ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: Reciting Out Aloud In As-Subh And Reciting To The Jinn

titles.arabic: باب الْقِرَاءَةِ فِي الظُّهْرِ وَالْعَصْرِ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Recitation For Zuhr And 'Asr

titles.arabic: باب الْقِرَاءَةِ فِي الصُّبْحِ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: Recitation in As-Subh

titles.arabic: باب الْقِرَاءَةِ فِي الْعِشَاءِ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: Recitation During 'Isha

titles.arabic: باب أَمْرِ الأَئِمَّةِ بِتَخْفِيفِ الصَّلاَةِ فِي تَمَامٍ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Command To The Imam To Make The Prayer Brief But Complete

titles.arabic: باب اعْتِدَالِ أَرْكَانِ الصَّلاَةِ وَتَخْفِيفِهَا فِي تَمَامٍ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: Moderation In All Pillars Of The Prayer, And Making It Brief Yet Complete

titles.arabic: باب مُتَابَعَةِ الإِمَامِ وَالْعَمَلِ بَعْدَهُ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: Following The Imam And Acting After Him

titles.arabic: باب مَا يَقُولُ إِذَا رَفَعَ رَأْسَهُ مِنَ الرُّكُوعِ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: What Is To Be Said When Raising One's Head From Bowing

titles.arabic: باب النَّهْىِ عَنْ قِرَاءَةِ الْقُرْآنِ، فِي الرُّكُوعِ وَالسُّجُودِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Prohibition Of Reciting The Quran While Bowing And Prostrating

titles.arabic: باب مَا يُقَالُ فِي الرُّكُوعِ وَالسُّجُودِ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: What Is To Be Said While Bowing And Prostrating

titles.arabic: باب فَضْلِ السُّجُودِ وَالْحَثِّ عَلَيْهِ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Virtue Of Prostration And Encouragement To Do So

titles.arabic: باب أَعْضَاءِ السُّجُودِ وَالنَّهْىِ عَنْ كَفِّ الشَّعْرِ، وَالثَّوْبِ، وَعَقْصِ الرَّأْسِ، فِي الصَّلاَة
titles.english: Chapter: The Limbs Of Prostration And The Prohibition Of Tucking Up One's Hair And Garment Or Having Ones Hair In A Braid When Praying

titles.arabic: باب الاِعْتِدَالِ فِي السُّجُودِ وَوَضْعِ الْكَفَّيْنِ عَلَى الأَرْضِ وَرَفْعِ الْمِرْفَقَيْنِ عَنِ الْجَنْبَيْنِ وَرَفْعِ الْبَطْنِ عَنِ الْفَخِذَيْنِ فِي السُّجُودِ
titles.english: Chapter: Moderation In Prostration; Placing The Hands On The Ground, Keeping The Elbows Up, Away From The Sides, And Lifting The Belly Up Off The Thighs When Prostrating

titles.arabic: باب مَا يَجْمَعُ صِفَةَ الصَّلاَةِ وَمَا يُفْتَتَحُ بِهِ وَيُخْتَمُ بِهِ وَصِفَةَ الرُّكُوعِ وَالاِعْتِدَالِ مِنْهُ وَالسُّجُودِ وَالاِعْتِدَالِ مِنْهُ وَالتَّشَهُّدِ بَعْدَ كُلِّ رَكْعَتَيْنِ مِنَ الرُّبَاعِيَّةِ وَصِفَةَ الْجُلُوسِ بَيْنَ السَّجْدَتَيْنِ وَفِي التَّشَهُّدِ الأَوَّلِ
titles.english: Chapter: The Description Of The Prayer, With What It Begins And Ends. The Description Of Bowing And Moderation Therein, And Of Prostration And Moderation Therein. Tashah-hud After Each Two Rak'ah Of Four Rak'ah Prayers. Description Ol Sitting Between The Two Prostrations, And In The First Tashah-hud

titles.arabic: باب سُتْرَةِ الْمُصَلِّي ‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Sutrah (Screen) For One Who Is Praying, And The Recommendation To Pray Facing A Sutrah. The Ruling On Passing In Front Of One Who Is Praying, And Preventing One Who Wants To Pass In Front. It Is Permissible To Lie Down In Front Of One Who Is Praying, Praying Towards One's Mount. The Command To Stand Close To The Sutrah. The Height Of The Suirah, And Related Matters

titles.arabic: باب مَنْعِ الْمَارِّ بَيْنَ يَدَىِ الْمُصَلِّي ‏
titles.english: Chapter: Preventing One Who Wants To Pass In Front Of A Praying Person

titles.arabic: باب دُنُوِّ الْمُصَلِّي مِنَ السُّتْرَةِ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Praying Person Standing Close To The Sutrah

titles.arabic: باب قَدْرِ مَا يَسْتُرُ الْمُصَلِّيَ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Height Of That Which Serves As A Sutrah For The One Who Is Praying

titles.arabic: باب الاِعْتِرَاضِ بَيْنَ يَدَىِ الْمُصَلِّي ‏
titles.english: Chapter: Lying In Front Of One Who Is Praying

titles.arabic: باب الصَّلاَةِ فِي ثَوْبٍ وَاحِدٍ وَصِفَةِ لُبْسِهِ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: Praying In A Single Garment, And How It Should Be Worn

titles.arabic: باب النَّهْىِ عَنْ سَبِّ الدَّهْرِ، ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Prohibition Of Cursing Time

titles.arabic: باب كَرَاهَةِ تَسْمِيَةِ الْعِنَبِ كَرْمًا ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: It Is Disliked To Call Grapes Karm

titles.arabic: باب حُكْمِ إِطْلاَقِ لَفْظَةِ الْعَبْدِ وَالأَمَةِ وَالْمَوْلَى وَالسَّيِّدِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Ruling On Using The Words 'Abd And Amah (For Slaves) And Mawla And Sayyid (For Masters)

titles.arabic: باب كَرَاهَةِ قَوْلِ الإِنْسَانِ خَبُثَتْ نَفْسِي ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: It Is Disliked For A Man To Say: "Khabuthat Nafsi" (I Feel Bad)

titles.arabic: باب اسْتِعْمَالِ الْمِسْكِ وَأَنَّهُ أَطْيَبُ الطِّيبِ وَكَرَاهَةِ رَدِّ الرَّيْحَانِ وَالطِّيبِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Using Musk, Which Is The Best Of Perfume. It Is Disliked To Refuse A Gift Of Scent Or Perfume

titles.arabic: باب ‏‏
باب تَحْرِيمِ اللَّعِبِ بِالنَّرْدَشِيرِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Prohibition Of Playing Nardashir

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِ النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم ‏"‏ مَنْ رَآنِي فِي الْمَنَامِ فَقَدْ رَآنِي ‏"‏ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Words Of The Prophet (SAW): "Whoever Sees Me In A Dream Has Indeed Seen Me."

titles.arabic: باب لاَ يُخْبِرُ بِتَلَعُّبِ الشَّيْطَانِ بِهِ فِي الْمَنَامِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: No One Should Speak Of How The Shaitan Toyed With Him In His Sleep

titles.arabic: باب فِي تَأْوِيلِ الرُّؤْيَا ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Interpretation Of Dreams

titles.arabic: باب رُؤْيَا النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Dreams Of The Prophet (SAW)

titles.arabic: باب فَضْلِ نَسَبِ النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم وَتَسْلِيمِ الْحَجَرِ عَلَيْهِ قَبْلَ النُّبُوَّةِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Superiority Of The Prophet's Lineage, And The Stone That Greeted Him Before His Prophethood

titles.arabic: باب تَفْضِيلِ نَبِيِّنَا صلى الله عليه وسلم عَلَى جَمِيعِ الْخَلاَئِقِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Superiority Of Our Prophet (SAW) Over All Of Creation

titles.arabic: باب فِي مُعْجِزَاتِ النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Miracles Of The Prophet (SAW)

titles.arabic: باب تَوَكُّلِهِ عَلَى اللَّهِ وَعِصْمَةِ اللَّهِ تَعَالَى لَهُ مِنَ النَّاسِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: He Put His Trust In Allah And Allah Protected Him From The People

titles.arabic: باب بَيَانِ مَثَلِ مَا بُعِثَ بِهِ النَّبِيُّ صلى الله عليه وسلم مِنَ الْهُدَى وَالْعِلْمِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Likeness Of The Guidance And Knowledge With Which The Prophet (SAW) Was Sent

titles.arabic: باب شَفَقَتِهِ صلى الله عليه وسلم عَلَى أُمَّتِهِ وَمُبَالَغَتِهِ فِي تَحْذِيرِهِمْ مِمَّا يَضُرُّهُمْ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: His Compassion Towards His Ummah, And His Intense Concern To Warn Them Against That Which May Harm Them

titles.arabic: باب ذِكْرِ كَوْنِهِ صلى الله عليه وسلم خَاتَمَ النَّبِيِّينَ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: He (SAW) Was The Seal Of The Prophets

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا أَرَادَ اللَّهُ تَعَالَى رَحْمَةَ أُمَّةٍ قَبَضَ نَبِيَّهَا قَبْلَهَا ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: When Allah Wants To Show Mercy To A Nation, He takes Their Prophet Before Them

titles.arabic: باب إِثْبَاتِ حَوْضِ نَبِيِّنَا صلى الله عليه وسلم وَصِفَاتِهِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Cistern Of Our Prophet (SAW) And Its Attributes

titles.arabic: باب فِي قِتَالِ جِبْرِيلَ وَمِيكَائِيلَ عَنِ النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم يَوْمَ أُحُدٍ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Angels Fought Alongside Him (SAW)

titles.arabic: باب فِي شَجَاعَةِ النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم وَتَقَدُّمِهِ لِلْحَرْبِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: His Courage

titles.arabic: باب كَانَ النَّبِيُّ صلى الله عليه وسلم أَجْوَدَ النَّاسِ بِالْخَيْرِ مِنَ الرِّيحِ الْمُرْسَلَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: His Generosity

titles.arabic: باب كَانَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ صلى الله عليه وسلم أَحْسَنَ النَّاسِ خُلُقًا ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: His Good Manners

titles.arabic: باب مَا سُئِلَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ صلى الله عليه وسلم شَيْئًا قَطُّ فَقَالَ لاَ ‏ وَكَثْرَةِ عَطَائِهِ
titles.english: Chapter: His Generosity

titles.arabic: باب رَحْمَتِهِ صلى الله عليه وسلم الصِّبْيَانَ وَالْعِيَالَ وَتَوَاضُعِهِ وَفَضْلِ ذَلِكَ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: His Compassion Towards Children And His Humbleness, And The Virtue Of That

titles.arabic: باب كَثْرَةِ حَيَائِهِ صلى الله عليه وسلم ‏.‏
titles.english: Chapter: His Great Modesty

titles.arabic: باب تَبَسُّمِهِ صلى الله عليه وسلم وَحُسْنِ عِشْرَتِهِ ‏.‏
titles.english: Chapter: His Smile And Easy Going Attitude

titles.arabic: باب فِي رَحْمَةِ النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم لِلنِّسَاءِ وَأَمْرِ السُّوَّاقِ مَطَايَاهُنَّ بِالرِّفْقِ
titles.english: Chapter: His Compassion Towards Women And His Command To Treat Them Kindly

titles.arabic: باب قُرْبِ النَّبِيِّ عَلَيْهِ السَّلاَمُ مِنَ النَّاسِ وَتَبَرُّكِهِمْ بِهِ ‏.‏
titles.english: Chapter: His Closeness To The People, Their Seeking Blessing From Him And His Humility Towards Them

titles.arabic: باب مُبَاعَدَتِهِ صلى الله عليه وسلم لِلآثَامِ وَاخْتِيَارِهِ مِنَ الْمُبَاحِ أَسْهَلَهُ وَانْتِقَامِهِ ل
titles.english: Chapter: His Avoidance Of Sin, His Choosing The Easier Of Permissible Things, And His Vengeance For The Sake Of Allah If His Sacred Limits Were Transgressed

titles.arabic: باب طِيبِ رَائِحَةِ النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم وَلِينِ مَسِّهِ وَالتَّبَرُّكِ بِمَسْحِهِ ‏.‏
titles.english: Chapter: His Good Fragrance And Soft Touch, And Seeking Blessing From His Touch

titles.arabic: باب طِيبِ عَرَقِ النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم وَالتَّبَرُّكِ بِهِ ‏.‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Fragrance Of His Sweat, And Seeking Blessing Therefrom

titles.arabic: باب عَرَقِ النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم فِي الْبَرْدِ وَحِينَ يَأْتِيهِ الْوَحْىُ ‏.‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Prophet (SAW) Sweated When It Was Cold, And When The Revelation Came To Him

titles.arabic: باب فِي سَدْلِ النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم شَعْرَهُ وَفَرْقِهِ ‏.‏
titles.english: Chapter: Description Of His Hair, Attributes And Appearance

titles.arabic: باب فِي صِفَةِ النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم وَأَنَّهُ كَانَ أَحْسَنَ النَّاسِ وَجْهًا ‏.‏
titles.english: Chapter: Description Of The Prophet (SAW); He Was The Most Handsome Of People

titles.arabic: باب صِفَةِ شَعْرِ النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم ‏.‏
titles.english: Chapter: Description Of His Hair

titles.arabic: باب فِي صِفَةِ فَمِ النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم وَعَيْنَيْهِ وَعَقِبَيْهِ ‏.‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Mouth, Eyes And Heels Of The Prophet (SAW)

titles.arabic: باب كَانَ النَّبِيُّ صلى الله عليه وسلم أَبْيَضَ مَلِيحَ الْوَجْهِ ‏.‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Prophet (SAW) Was White With An Elegant Face

titles.arabic: باب شَيْبِهِ صلى الله عليه وسلم ‏.‏
titles.english: Chapter: His Grey Hairs

titles.arabic: باب إِثْبَاتِ خَاتَمِ النُّبُوَّةِ وَصِفَتِهِ وَمَحِلِّهِ مِنْ جَسَدِهِ صلى الله عليه وسلم ‏.‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Seal Of Prophethood, Its Attributes And Its Location On The Body Of The Prophet (SAW)

titles.arabic: باب فِي صِفَةِ النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم وَمَبْعَثِهِ وَسِنِّهِ ‏.‏
titles.english: Chapter: How Long He (SAW) Lived, And How Long He Stayed In Makkah And Al-Madinah

titles.arabic: باب كَمْ سِنُّ النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم يَوْمَ قُبِضَ ‏.‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Age Of The Prophet (SAW) When He Died

titles.arabic: باب كَمْ أَقَامَ النَّبِيُّ صلى الله عليه وسلم بِمَكَّةَ وَالْمَدِينَةِ ‏.‏
titles.english: Chapter: How Long Did The Prophet ft Stay In Makkah And Al-Madinah?

titles.arabic: باب فِي أَسْمَائِهِ صلى الله عليه وسلم ‏.‏
titles.english: Chapter: His Names

titles.arabic: باب عِلْمِهِ صلى الله عليه وسلم بِاللَّهِ تَعَالَى وَشِدَّةِ خَشْيَتِهِ ‏.‏
titles.english: Chapter: His Knowledge Of Allah And His Great Fear Of Him

titles.arabic: باب وُجُوبِ اتِّبَاعِهِ صلى الله عليه وسلم ‏.‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Obligation To Follow Him (SAW)

titles.arabic: باب تَوْقِيرِهِ صلى الله عليه وسلم وَتَرْكِ إِكْثَارِ سُؤَالِهِ عَمَّا لاَ ضَرُورَةَ إِلَيْهِ أَوْ لاَ يَت
titles.english: Chapter: Respecting Him And Not Asking Him Unnecessary Questions

titles.arabic: باب وُجُوبِ امْتِثَالِ مَا قَالَهُ شَرْعًا دُونَ مَا ذَكَرَهُ صلى الله عليه وسلم مِنْ مَعَايِشِ الدُّنْيَا
titles.english: Chapter: The Obligation To Obey What He Says With Regard To Matters Of Religion, But Not What He Says With Regard To Worldly Matters

titles.arabic: باب فَضْلِ النَّظَرِ إِلَيْهِ صلى الله عليه وسلم وَتَمَنِّيهِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Virtue Of Looking At Him And Longing To See Him

titles.arabic: باب فَضَائِلِ عِيسَى عَلَيْهِ السَّلاَمُ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Virtues Of Eisa, Peace Be Upon Him

titles.arabic: باب مِنْ فَضَائِلِ إِبْرَاهِيمَ الْخَلِيلِ صلى الله عليه وسلم ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Virtues Of Ibrahim, Peace Be Upon Him

titles.arabic: باب مِنْ فَضَائِلِ مُوسَى صلى الله عليه وسلم ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Virtues Of Musa, Peace Be Upon Him

titles.arabic: باب فِي ذِكْرِ يُونُسَ عَلَيْهِ السَّلاَمُ وَقَوْلِ النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم ‏"‏ لاَ يَنْبَغِي لِعَبْ
titles.english: Chapter: Yunus, Peace Be Upon Him, And The Words Of The Prophet (SAW): "No One Should Say: I Am Better Than Yunus Bin Matta."

titles.arabic: باب مِنْ فَضَائِلِ يُوسُفَ عَلَيْهِ السَّلاَمُ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Virtues Of Yusuf, Peace Be Upon Him

titles.arabic: باب مِنْ فَضَائِلِ زَكَرِيَّاءَ عَلَيْهِ السَّلاَمُ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Virtues Of Zakariyya, Peace Be Upon Him

titles.arabic: باب مِنْ فَضَائِلِ الْخَضِرِ عَلَيْهِ السَّلاَمُ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Virtues Of Al-Khadir, Peace Be Upon Him

titles.arabic: باب مِنْ فَضَائِلِ أَبِي بَكْرٍ الصِّدِّيقِ رضى الله عنه ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Virtues Of Abu Bakr As-Siddiq (RA)

titles.arabic: باب مِنْ فَضَائِلِ عُمَرَ رضى الله تعالى عنه ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Virtues Of 'Umar (RA)

titles.arabic: باب مِنْ فَضَائِلِ عُثْمَانَ بْنِ عَفَّانَ رضى الله عنه ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Virtues Of 'Uthman Bin 'Affan (RA)

titles.arabic: باب مِنْ فَضَائِلِ عَلِيِّ بْنِ أَبِي طَالِبٍ رضى الله عنه ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Virtues Of 'Ali Bin Abi Talib (RA)

titles.arabic: باب فِي فَضْلِ سَعْدِ بْنِ أَبِي وَقَّاصٍ رضى الله عنه ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Virtues Of Sa'd Bin Abi Waqqas (RA)

titles.arabic: باب مِنْ فَضَائِلِ طَلْحَةَ وَالزُّبَيْرِ رضى الله عنهما ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Virtues Of Talhah And Az-Zubair (RA)

titles.arabic: باب فَضَائِلِ أَبِي عُبَيْدَةَ بْنِ الْجَرَّاحِ رضى الله تعالى عنه ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Virtues Of Abu 'Ubaidah Bin Al-Jarrah (RA)

titles.arabic: باب فَضَائِلِ الْحَسَنِ وَالْحُسَيْنِ رضى الله عنهما ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Virtues Of Al-Hasan And Al-Husain (RA)

titles.arabic: باب فَضَائِلِ أَهْلِ بَيْتِ النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Virtues Of The Household Of The Prophet (SAW)

titles.arabic: باب فَضَائِلِ زَيْدِ بْنِ حَارِثَةَ وَأُسَامَةَ بْنِ زَيْدٍ رَضِيَ اللَّهُ عَنْهُمَا ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Virtues Of Zaid Bin Harithah And His Son Usamah (RA)

titles.arabic: باب فَضَائِلِ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ جَعْفَرٍ رضى الله عنهما ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Virtues Of Abdullah Bin Ja'far (RA)

titles.arabic: باب فَضَائِلِ خَدِيجَةَ أُمِّ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ رضى الله تعالى عنها ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Virtues Of Khadijah, The Mother Of The Believers (RA)

titles.arabic: باب فِي فَضْلِ عَائِشَةَ رضى الله تعالى عنها ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Virtues Of 'Aishah, The Mother Of The Believers (RA)

titles.arabic: باب ذِكْرِ حَدِيثِ أُمِّ زَرْعٍ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Hadith Of Umm Zar

titles.arabic: باب فَضَائِلِ فَاطِمَةَ بِنْتِ النَّبِيِّ عَلَيْهَا الصَّلاَةُ وَالسَّلاَمُ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Virtues Of Fatimah (RA), The Daughter Of The Prophet (SAW)

titles.arabic: باب مِنْ فَضَائِلِ أُمِّ سَلَمَةَ أُمِّ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ رضى الله عنها ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Virtues Of Umm Salamah, The Mother Of The Believers (RA)

titles.arabic: باب مِنْ فَضَائِلِ زَيْنَبَ أُمِّ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ رضى الله عنها ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Virtues Of Zainab, The Mother Of The Believers (RA)

titles.arabic: باب مِنْ فَضَائِلِ أُمِّ أَيْمَنَ رضى الله عنها ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Virtues Of Umm Ayman (RA)

titles.arabic: باب مِنْ فَضَائِلِ أُمِّ سُلَيْمٍ أُمِّ أَنَسِ بْنِ مَالِكٍ وَبِلاَلٍ رضى الله عنهما ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Virtues Of Umm Sulaim, The Mother Of Anas Bin Malik, And Bilal (RA)

titles.arabic: باب مِنْ فَضَائِلِ أَبِي طَلْحَةَ الأَنْصَارِيِّ رضى الله تعالى عنه ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Virtues Of Abu Talhah Al-Ansari (RA)

titles.arabic: باب مِنْ فَضَائِلِ بِلاَلٍ رضى الله عنه ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Virtues Of Bilal (RA)

titles.arabic: باب مِنْ فَضَائِلِ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ مَسْعُودٍ وَأُمِّهِ رَضِيَ اللَّهُ تَعَالَى عَنْهُمَا ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Virtues Of 'Abdullah Bin Mas'ud And His Mother (RA)

titles.arabic: باب مِنْ فَضَائِلِ أُبَىِّ بْنِ كَعْبٍ وَجَمَاعَةٍ مِنَ الأَنْصَارِ رَضِيَ اللَّهُ تَعَالَى عَنْهُمْ ‏.‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Virtues Of Ubayy Bin Ka'b And A Group Of The Ansar (RA)

titles.arabic: باب مِنْ فَضَائِلِ سَعْدِ بْنِ مُعَاذٍ رضى الله عنه ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Virtues Of Sa'd Bin Mu'adh (RA)

titles.arabic: باب مِنْ فَضَائِلِ أَبِي دُجَانَةَ سِمَاكِ بْنِ خَرَشَةَ رضى الله تعالى عنه ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Virtues Of Abu Dujanah Simak Bin Kharashah (RA)

titles.arabic: باب مِنْ فَضَائِلِ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ عَمْرِو بْنِ حَرَامٍ وَالِدِ جَابِرٍ رضى الله تعالى عنهما
titles.english: Chapter: The Virtues Of 'Abdullah Bin 'Amr Bin Haram, The Father Of Jabir (RA)

titles.arabic: باب مِنْ فَضَائِلِ جُلَيْبِيبٍ رضى الله عنه ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Virtues Of Julaibib (RA)

titles.arabic: باب مِنْ فَضَائِلِ أَبِي ذَرٍّ رضى الله عنه ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Virtues Of Abu Dharr (RA)

titles.arabic: باب مِنْ فَضَائِلِ جَرِيرِ بْنِ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ رضى الله تعالى عنه ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Virtues Of Jarir Bin 'Abdullah (RA)

titles.arabic: باب فَضَائِلِ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ عَبَّاسٍ رضى الله عنهما ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Virtues Of 'Abdullah Bin 'Abbas (RA)

titles.arabic: باب مِنْ فَضَائِلِ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ عُمَرَ رضى الله عنهما ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Virtues Of 'Abdullah Bin 'Umar (RA)

titles.arabic: باب مِنْ فَضَائِلِ أَنَسِ بْنِ مَالِكٍ رضى الله عنه ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Virtues Of Anas bin Malik (RA)

titles.arabic: باب مِنْ فَضَائِلِ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ سَلاَمٍ رضى الله عنه ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Virtues Of Abdullah Bin Salam (RA)

titles.arabic: باب فَضَائِلِ حَسَّانَ بْنِ ثَابِتٍ رضى الله عنه ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Virtues Of Hassan Bin Thabit (RA)

titles.arabic: باب مِنْ فَضَائِلِ أَبِي هُرَيْرَةَ الدَّوْسِيِّ رضى الله عنه ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Virtues Of Abu Hurairah [Ad-Dawsi] (RA)

titles.arabic: باب مِنْ فَضَائِلِ أَهْلِ بَدْرٍ رضى الله عنهم وَقِصَّةِ حَاطِبِ بْنِ أَبِي بَلْتَعَةَ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Virtues Of Habib Bin Abi Balta'ah And The People Of Badr (RA)

titles.arabic: باب مِنْ فَضَائِلِ أَصْحَابِ الشَّجَرَةِ أَهْلِ بَيْعَةِ الرِّضْوَانِ رضى الله عنهم ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Virtues Of The Companions Of The Tree, Those Who Gave Their Oath Of Allegiance Bay'at Ar-Ridwan (RA)

titles.arabic: باب مِنْ فَضَائِلِ أَبِي مُوسَى وَأَبِي عَامِرٍ الأَشْعَرِيَّيْنِ رَضِيَ اللَّهُ عَنْهُمَا ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Virtues Of The Two Ash'aris; Abu Musa And Abu 'Amir (RA)

titles.arabic: باب مِنْ فَضَائِلِ الأَشْعَرِيِّينَ رضى الله عنهم ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Virtues Of The Ash'aris (RA)

titles.arabic: باب مِنْ فَضَائِلِ أَبِي سُفْيَانَ بْنِ حَرْبٍ رضى الله عنه ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Virtues Of Abu Sufyan Sakhr bin Harb (RA)

titles.arabic: باب مِنْ فَضَائِلِ جَعْفَرِ بْنِ أَبِي طَالِبٍ وَأَسْمَاءَ بِنْتِ عُمَيْسٍ وَأَهْلِ سَفِينَتِهِمْ رضى
titles.english: Chapter: The Virtues Of Ja'far Bin Abi Talib And Asma' Bint Umais, And The People Of Their Ship (RA)

titles.arabic: باب مِنْ فَضَائِلِ سَلْمَانَ وَصُهَيْبٍ وَبِلاَلٍ رضى الله تعالى عنهم ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Virtues Of Salman, Bilal And Suhaib (RA)

titles.arabic: باب مِنْ فَضَائِلِ الأَنْصَارِ رضى الله تعالى عنهم ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Virtues Of The Ansar (RA)

titles.arabic: باب فِي خَيْرِ دُورِ الأَنْصَارِ رضى الله عنهم ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Best Clans Of The Ansar

titles.arabic: باب فِي حُسْنِ صُحْبَةِ الأَنْصَارِ رضى الله عنهم ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Keeping Good Company With The Ansar (RA)

titles.arabic: باب دُعَاءِ النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم لِغِفَارَ وَأَسْلَمَ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Supplication Of The Prophet (SAW) For Ghifar And Aslam

titles.arabic: باب مِنْ فَضَائِلِ غِفَارَ وَأَسْلَمَ وُجُهَيْنَةَ وَأَشْجَعَ وَمُزَيْنَةَ وَتَمِيمٍ وَدَوْسٍ وَطَيِّئٍ
titles.english: Chapter: The Virtues Of Ghifar, Aslam, Juhainah, Ashja', Muzainah, Tamim, Daws and Tayy'

titles.arabic: باب خِيَارِ النَّاسِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Best Of People

titles.arabic: باب مِنْ فَضَائِلِ نِسَاءِ قُرَيْشٍ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Virtues Of The Women Of The Quraish

titles.arabic: باب مُؤَاخَاةِ النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم بَيْنَ أَصْحَابِهِ رضى الله تعالى عنهم
titles.english: Chapter: The Prophet (SAW) Established Bonds Of Brotherhood Among His Companions (RA)

titles.arabic: باب بَيَانِ أَنَّ بَقَاءَ النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم أَمَانٌ لأَصْحَابِهِ وَبَقَاءَ أَصْحَابِهِ أَمَانٌ
titles.english: Chapter: The Presence Of The Prophet (SAW) Is A Source Of Security For His Companions And The Presence Of His Companions Is A Source Of Security For The Ummah

titles.arabic: باب فَضْلِ الصَّحَابَةِ ثُمَّ الَّذِينَ يَلُونَهُمْ ثُمَّ الَّذِينَ يَلُونَهُمْ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Virtues Of the Sahabah, Then Those Who Come After Them, Then Those Who Come After Them

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ صلى الله عليه وسلم ‏"‏ لاَ تَأْتِي مِائَةُ سَنَةٍ وَعَلَى الأَرْضِ نَفْسٌ مَنْفُوسَةٌ الْيَوْ
titles.english: Chapter: The Meaning Of The Words Of The Prophet (SAW): "After One Hundred Years There Will Be No Soul Left Alive That Is Living Now"

titles.arabic: باب تَحْرِيمِ سَبِّ الصَّحَابَةِ رضى الله عنهم ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Prohibition Of Reviling The Companions (RA)

titles.arabic: باب مِنْ فَضَائِلِ أُوَيْسٍ الْقَرَنِيِّ رضى الله عنه ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Virtues Of Uwais Al-Qarani (RA)

titles.arabic: باب وَصِيَّةِ النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم بِأَهْلِ مِصْرَ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Advice Of The Prophet (SAW) Concerning The People Of Egypt

titles.arabic: باب فَضْلِ أَهْلِ عُمَانَ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Virtues Of The People Of Oman

titles.arabic: باب ذِكْرِ كَذَّابِ ثَقِيفٍ وَمُبِيرِهَا ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Liar And Great Slaughterer Of Thaqif

titles.arabic: باب فَضْلِ فَارِسَ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Virtues Of The Persians

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ صلى الله عليه وسلم ‏"‏ النَّاسُ كَإِبِلٍ مِائَةٍ لاَ تَجِدُ فِيهَا رَاحِلَةً ‏"‏ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Words Of The Prophet (SAW): "People Are Like A Hundred Camels Among Whom You Cannot Find One That Is Fit For Riding"

titles.arabic: باب بِرِّ الْوَالِدَيْنِ وَأَنَّهُمَا أَحَقُّ بِهِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Being Dutiful To One's Parents, And Which Of Them Is More Entitled To It

titles.arabic: باب تَقْدِيمِ بِرِّ الْوَالِدَيْنِ عَلَى التَّطَوُّعِ بِالصَّلاَةِ وَغَيْرِهَا ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Being Dutiful To One's Parents Takes Precedence Over Voluntary Prayer, Etc.

titles.arabic: باب رَغِمَ أَنْفُ مَنْ أَدْرَكَ أَبَوَيْهِ أَوْ أَحَدَهُمَا عِنْدَ الْكِبَرِ فَلَمْ يَدْخُلِ الْجَنَّةَ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Disgrace Of One Whose Parents, One Or Both Of Them, Reach Old Age During His Lifetime, And He Does Not Enter Paradise

titles.arabic: باب فَضْلِ صِلَةِ أَصْدِقَاءِ الأَبِ وَالأُمِّ وَنَحْوِهِمَا ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Virtue Of Maintaining Ties With The Friends Of One's Father And Mother, Etc.

titles.arabic: باب تَفْسِيرِ الْبِرِّ وَالإِثْمِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Meaning Of Righteousness And Sin

titles.arabic: باب صِلَةِ الرَّحِمِ وَتَحْرِيمِ قَطِيعَتِهَا ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Upholding Ties Of Kinship, And The Prohibition Of Severing Them

titles.arabic: باب النَّهْىِ عَنِ التَّحَاسُدِ، وَالتَّبَاغُضِ، وَالتَّدَابُرِ، ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Prohibition Of Mutual Jealousy And Hatred, And Turning Away From One Another

titles.arabic: باب تَحْرِيمِ الْهَجْرِ فَوْقَ ثَلاَثٍ بِلاَ عُذْرٍ شَرْعِيٍّ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Prohibition Of Forsaking Someone For More Than Three Days For No Legitimate Reason

titles.arabic: باب تَحْرِيمِ الظَّنِّ وَالتَّجَسُّسِ وَالتَّنَافُسِ وَالتَّنَاجُشِ وَنَحْوِهَا ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Prohibition Of Suspicion, Spying, Competition, Artificial Inflation Of Prices, And So On

titles.arabic: باب تَحْرِيمِ ظُلْمِ الْمُسْلِمِ وَخَذْلِهِ وَاحْتِقَارِهِ وَدَمِهِ وَعِرْضِهِ وَمَالِهِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Prohibition Of Wronging, Forsaking, Or Despising A Muslim And The Inviolability Of His Blood, Honor And Wealth

titles.arabic: باب النَّهْىِ عَنِ الشَّحْنَاءِ، وَالتَّهَاجُرِ، ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Prohibition Of Holding Grudges

titles.arabic: باب فِي فَضْلِ الْحُبِّ فِي اللَّهِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Virtue Of Love For The Sake Of Allah, May He Be Exalted

titles.arabic: باب فَضْلِ عِيَادَةِ الْمَرِيضِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Virtue Of Visiting The Sick

titles.arabic: باب ثَوَابِ الْمُؤْمِنِ فِيمَا يُصِيبُهُ مِنْ مَرَضٍ أَوْ حُزْنٍ أَوْ نَحْوِ ذَلِكَ حَتَّى الشَّوْكَةِ يُش
titles.english: Chapter: The Reward Of The Believer For Whatever Befalls Him Of Sickness, Grief And The Like, Even A Thorn That Pricks Him

titles.arabic: باب تَحْرِيمِ الظُّلْمِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Prohibition Of Oppression

titles.arabic: باب نَصْرِ الأَخِ ظَالِمًا أَوْ مَظْلُومًا ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Supporting One's Brother Whether He Is Doing Wrong Or Being Wronged

titles.arabic: باب تَرَاحُمِ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ وَتَعَاطُفِهِمْ وَتَعَاضُدِهِمْ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Mutual Mercy, Compassion And Support Of The Believers

titles.arabic: باب النَّهْىِ عَنِ السِّبَابِ، ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Prohibition Of Reviling

titles.arabic: باب اسْتِحْبَابِ الْعَفْوِ وَالتَّوَاضُعِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: It Is Recommended To Forgive And Be Humble

titles.arabic: باب تَحْرِيمِ الْغِيبَةِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Prohibition Of Backbiting

titles.arabic: باب بِشَارَةِ مَنْ سَتَرَ اللَّهُ تَعَالَى عَيْبَهُ فِي الدُّنْيَا بِأَنْ يَسْتُرَ عَلَيْهِ فِي الآخِرَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: Glad Tidings That Whomever Allah Conceals In This World He Will Conceal Him In The Hereafter

titles.arabic: باب مُدَارَاةِ مَنْ يُتَّقَى فُحْشُهُ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Being Kind To Protect Oneself From Another's Vile Behavior

titles.arabic: باب فَضْلِ الرِّفْقِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Virtue Of Gentleness

titles.arabic: باب النَّهْىِ عَنْ لَعْنِ الدَّوَابِّ، وَغَيْرِهَا، ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Prohibition Of Cursing Animals Etc.

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ لَعَنَهُ النَّبِيُّ صلى الله عليه وسلم أَوْ سَبَّهُ أَوْ دَعَا عَلَيْهِ
titles.english: Chapter: Whomever Is Cursed, Reviled Or Prayed Against By The Prophet (SAW) When He Does Not Deserve That, It Will Be Purification, Reward And Mercy For Him

titles.arabic: باب ذَمِّ ذِي الْوَجْهَيْنِ وَتَحْرِيمِ فِعْلِهِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Criticism Of The One Who Is Two-Faced, And The Prohibition Of Doing That

titles.arabic: باب تَحْرِيمِ الْكَذِبِ وَبَيَانِ مَا يُبَاحُ مِنْهُ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Prohibition Of Lying, And What Is Permitted Thereof

titles.arabic: باب تَحْرِيمِ النَّمِيمَةِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Prohibition Of Malicious Gossip (Namimah)

titles.arabic: باب قُبْحِ الْكَذِبِ وَحُسْنِ الصِّدْقِ وَفَضْلِهِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Abhorrence Of Lying, And The Goodness And Virtue Of Honesty

titles.arabic: باب فَضْلِ مَنْ يَمْلِكُ نَفْسَهُ عِنْدَ الْغَضَبِ وَبِأَىِّ شَىْءٍ يَذْهَبُ الْغَضَبُ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Virtue Of One Who Controls Himself At Times Of Anger, And What Takes Away Anger

titles.arabic: باب خُلِقَ الإِنْسَانُ خَلْقًا لاَ يَتَمَالَكُ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: 'Man Is Created In Such A Way That He Is Not Steadfast'

titles.arabic: باب النَّهْىِ عَنْ ضَرْبِ الْوَجْهِ، ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Prohibition Of Striking The Face

titles.arabic: باب الْوَعِيدِ الشَّدِيدِ لِمَنْ عَذَّبَ النَّاسَ بِغَيْرِ حَقٍّ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Stern Warning To One Who Torments People Unlawfully

titles.arabic: باب أَمْرِ مَنْ مَرَّ بِسِلاَحٍ فِي مَسْجِدٍ أَوْ سُوقٍ أَوْ غَيْرِهِمَا مِنَ الْمَوَاضِعِ الْجَامِعَةِ لِ
titles.english: Chapter: Telling The One Who Carries A Weapon In The Masjid, Marketplace Or Other Place Where People Gather, To Hold It By Its Point

titles.arabic: باب النَّهْىِ عَنِ الإِشَارَةِ، بِالسِّلاَحِ إِلَى مُسْلِمٍ ‏ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Prohibition Of Pointing At A Muslim With A Weapon

titles.arabic: باب فَضْلِ إِزَالَةِ الأَذَى عَنِ الطَّرِيقِ، ‏ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Virtue Of Removing A Harmful Thing From The Road

titles.arabic: باب تَحْرِيمِ تَعْذِيبِ الْهِرَّةِ وَنَحْوِهَا مِنَ الْحَيَوَانِ الَّذِي لاَ يُؤْذِي ‏ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Prohibition Of Tormenting Cats And Other Animals That Are Not Harmful

titles.arabic: باب تَحْرِيمِ الْكِبْرِ ‏ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Prohibition Of Arrogance

titles.arabic: باب النَّهْىِ عَنْ تَقْنِيطِ الإِنْسَانِ، مِنْ رَحْمَةِ اللَّهِ تَعَالَى ‏ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Prohibition Of Making Others Despair Of The Mercy Of Allah

titles.arabic: باب فَضْلِ الضُّعَفَاءِ وَالْخَامِلِينَ ‏ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Virtue Of The Weak And Downtrodden

titles.arabic: باب النَّهْىِ عَنْ قَوْلِ، هَلَكَ النَّاسُ ‏ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Prohibition Of Saying "The People Are Doomed"

titles.arabic: باب الْوَصِيَّةِ بِالْجَارِ وَالإِحْسَانِ إِلَيْهِ ‏ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: Advice To Treat One's Neighbor Well

titles.arabic: باب اسْتِحْبَابِ طَلاَقَةِ الْوَجْهِ عِنْدَ اللِّقَاءِ ‏ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: It Is Recommend To Show A Cheerful Countenance When Meeting Others

titles.arabic: باب اسْتِحْبَابِ الشَّفَاعَةِ فِيمَا لَيْسَ بِحَرَامٍ ‏ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: It Is Recommend To Intercede With Regard To That Which Is Not Unlawful

titles.arabic: باب اسْتِحْبَابِ مُجَالَسَةِ الصَّالِحِينَ وَمُجَانَبَةِ قُرَنَاءِ السَّوْءِ ‏ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: It Is Recommend To Keep Company With Righteous People And Avoid Bad Company

titles.arabic: باب فَضْلِ الإِحْسَانِ إِلَى الْبَنَاتِ ‏ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Virtue Of Treating Daughters Well

titles.arabic: باب فَضْلِ مَنْ يَمُوتُ لَهُ وَلَدٌ فَيَحْتَسِبُهُ ‏ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Virtue Of One Whose Child Dies And He Seeks Reward

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا أَحَبَّ اللَّهُ عَبْدًا حَبَّبَهُ إِلَى عِبَادِهِ ‏ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: When Allah Loves A Person. He Commands Jibril To Love Him, And He Loves Him, And The People Of Heaven Love Him, Then He Finds Acceptance On Earth

titles.arabic: باب الأَرْوَاحِ جُنُودٌ مُجَنَّدَةٌ ‏ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: Souls Are Like Conscripted Soldiers

titles.arabic: باب الْمَرْءُ مَعَ مَنْ أَحَبَّ ‏ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: A Man Will Be With Those Whom He Loves

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا أُثْنِيَ عَلَى الصَّالِحِ فَهِيَ بُشْرَى وَلاَ تَضُرُّهُ ‏ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: If A Righteous Man Is Praised, It Is Glad Tidings For Him And Will Not Harm Him

titles.arabic: بَاب كَيْفِيَّةِ خَلْقِ الْآدَمِيِّ فِي بَطْنِ أُمِّهِ وَكِتَابَةِ رِزْقِهِ وَأَجَلِهِ وَعَمَلِهِ وَشَقَاوَتِهِ وَسَعَادَتِهِ
titles.english: Chapter: How The Human Being Is Created, In His Mother's Womb, And His Provision, Lifespan And Deeds Are Written Down, And His Misery and Happiness

titles.arabic: باب حِجَاجِ آدَمَ وَمُوسَى عَلَيْهِمَا السَّلاَمُ ‏ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Debate Between Adam And Musa (Peace And Blessings Of Allah Be Upon Them)

titles.arabic: باب تَصْرِيفِ اللَّهِ تَعَالَى الْقُلُوبَ كَيْفَ شَاءَ ‏ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: Allah Directs Hearts As He Wills

titles.arabic: باب كُلُّ شَىْءٍ بِقَدَرٍ ‏ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: Everything Is Decided And Decreed

titles.arabic: باب قُدِّرَ عَلَى ابْنِ آدَمَ حَظُّهُ مِنَ الزِّنَى وَغَيْرِهِ ‏ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Son Of Adam's Share Of Zina Etc. Is Decreed For Him

titles.arabic: بَاب مَعْنَى كُلِّ مَوْلُودٍ يُولَدُ عَلَى الْفِطْرَةِ وَحُكْمِ مَوْتِ أَطْفَالِ الْكُفَّارِ وَأَطْفَالِ الْمُسْلِمِينَ
titles.english: Chapter: The Meaning Of "Every Child Is Born In A State Of Fitrah" And The Ruling On The Dead Children Of The Disbelievers And Of The Muslims.

titles.arabic: بَاب بَيَانِ أَنَّ الْآجَالَ وَالْأَرْزَاقَ وَغَيْرَهَا لَا تَزِيدُ وَلَا تَنْقُصُ عَمَّا سَبَقَ بِهِ الْقَدَرُ
titles.english: Chapter: Lifespans, Provisions, Etc. Do Not Increase Or Decrease From What Has Already Been Decreed

titles.arabic: بَاب فِي الْأَمْرِ بِالْقُوَّةِ وَتَرْكِ الْعَجْزِ وَالِاسْتِعَانَةِ بِاللَّهِ وَتَفْوِيضِ الْمَقَادِيرِ لِلَّهِ
titles.english: Chapter: Belief In The Divine Decree And Submission To It

titles.arabic: بَاب النَّهْيِ عَنْ اتِّبَاعِ مُتَشَابِهِ الْقُرْآنِ وَالتَّحْذِيرِ مِنْ مُتَّبِعِيهِ وَالنَّهْيِ عَنْ الِاخْتِلَافِ فِي الْقُرْآنِ
titles.english: Chapter: The Prohibition Of, And Warning Against Seeking Out Verses Of The Quran Whose Meanings Are Not Decisive; The Prohibition Of Arguing About The Qur'an

titles.arabic: باب فِي الأَلَدِّ الْخَصِمِ
titles.english: Chapter: The One Who Is Harsh In Arguing

titles.arabic: باب اتِّبَاعِ سُنَنِ الْيَهُودِ وَالنَّصَارَى
titles.english: Chapter: Following The Ways Of The Jews And Christians

titles.arabic: باب هَلَكَ الْمُتَنَطِّعُونَ
titles.english: Chapter: The Destruction Of Those Who Go To Extremes

titles.arabic: باب رَفْعِ الْعِلْمِ وَقَبْضِهِ وَظُهُورِ الْجَهْلِ وَالْفِتَنِ فِي آخِرِ الزَّمَانِ
titles.english: Chapter: The Taking Away Of Knowledge And The Spread Of Ignorance At The End Of Time

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ سَنَّ سُنَّةً حَسَنَةً أَوْ سَيِّئَةً وَمَنْ دَعَا إِلَى هُدًى أَوْ ضَلاَلَةٍ
titles.english: Chapter: The One Who Starts Something Good Or Something Bad; The One Who Calls Others To Guidance Or Misguidance

titles.arabic: باب الْحَثِّ عَلَى ذِكْرِ اللَّهِ تَعَالَى
titles.english: Chapter: Encouragement To Remember Allah, Exalted is He

titles.arabic: باب فِي أَسْمَاءِ اللَّهِ تَعَالَى وَفَضْلِ مَنْ أَحْصَاهَا
titles.english: Chapter: The Names Of Allah, Exalted is He, And The Virtue Of The One Who Learns Them By Heart

titles.arabic: باب الْعَزْمِ بِالدُّعَاءِ وَلاَ يَقُلْ إِنْ شِئْتَ
titles.english: Chapter: Being Firm In Supplication And Not Saying: "If You Will"

titles.arabic: باب كَرَاهَةِ تَمَنِّي الْمَوْتِ لِضُرٍّ نَزَلَ بِهِ
titles.english: Chapter: It Is Disliked To Wish For Death Because Of Some Harm That Has Befallen One

titles.arabic: بَاب مَنْ أَحَبَّ لِقَاءَ اللَّهِ أَحَبَّ اللَّهُ لِقَاءَهُ وَمَنْ كَرِهَ لِقَاءَ اللَّهِ كَرِهَ اللَّهُ لِقَاءَهُ
titles.english: Chapter: Whoever Loves To Meet Allah, Allah Loves To Meet Him, And Whoever Hates To Meet Allah, Allah Hates To Meet Him

titles.arabic: باب فَضْلِ الذِّكْرِ وَالدُّعَاءِ وَالتَّقَرُّبِ إِلَى اللَّهِ تَعَالَى
titles.english: Chapter: The Virtue Of Remembrance, Supplication, Drawing Close To Allah And Thinking Positively Of Him

titles.arabic: باب كَرَاهَةِ الدُّعَاءِ بِتَعْجِيلِ الْعُقُوبَةِ فِي الدُّنْيَا
titles.english: Chapter: It Is Disliked To Pray For Punishment To Be Brought Forward In This World

titles.arabic: باب فَضْلِ مَجَالِسِ الذِّكْرِ
titles.english: Chapter: The Virtues Of Gathering To Remember Allah (Adh-Dhikr)

titles.arabic: بَاب فَضْلِ الدُّعَاءِ بِاللَّهُمَّ آتِنَا فِي الدُّنْيَا حَسَنَةً وَفِي الْآخِرَةِ حَسَنَةً وَقِنَا عَذَابَ النَّارِ
titles.english: Chapter: The Virtue Of The Supplication: "O Allah, Give Us Good In This World And Good In The Hereafter, And Save Us From The Torment Of The Fire"

titles.arabic: باب فَضْلِ التَّهْلِيلِ وَالتَّسْبِيحِ وَالدُّعَاءِ
titles.english: Chapter: The Virtue Of Tahlil (Saying La Ilaha Ill-Allah), Tasbih (Saying Subhan Allah) And (Du'a) Supplication

titles.arabic: باب فَضْلِ الاِجْتِمَاعِ عَلَى تِلاَوَةِ الْقُرْآنِ وَعَلَى الذِّكْرِ
titles.english: Chapter: The Virtue Of Gathering To Read Quran And To Remember Allah

titles.arabic: باب اسْتِحْبَابِ الاِسْتِغْفَارِ وَالاِسْتِكْثَارِ مِنْهُ
titles.english: Chapter: It Is Recommend To Pray For Forgiveness A Great Deal

titles.arabic: باب اسْتِحْبَابِ خَفْضِ الصَّوْتِ بِالذِّكْرِ
titles.english: Chapter: It Is Recommend To Lower One's Voice When Saying Remembrance, Except In The Cases Where It Is Commanded To Raise The Voice Such As The Talbiyah Etc. It Is Recommend To Say A Great Deal, "There Is No Power And No Strength Except With Allah"

titles.arabic: باب التَّعَوُّذِ مِنْ شَرِّ الْفِتَنِ وَغَيْرِهَا
titles.english: Chapter: Supplications And Seeking Refuge With Allah

titles.arabic: باب التَّعَوُّذِ مِنَ الْعَجْزِ وَالْكَسَلِ وَغَيْرِهِ
titles.english: Chapter: Seeking Refuge With Allah From Helplessness, Laziness Etc

titles.arabic: باب فِي التَّعَوُّذِ مِنْ سُوءِ الْقَضَاءِ وَدَرَكِ الشَّقَاءِ وَغَيْرِهِ
titles.english: Chapter: Seeking Refuge From A Bad End, And Misery Etc

titles.arabic: باب مَا يَقُولُ عِنْدَ النَّوْمِ وَأَخْذِ الْمَضْجَعِ
titles.english: Chapter: Supplication When Going To Sleep

titles.arabic: باب التَّعَوُّذِ مِنْ شَرِّ مَا عَمِلَ وَمِنْ شَرِّ مَا لَمْ يَعْمَلْ
titles.english: Chapter: Supplications [Of The Prophet (SAW)]

titles.arabic: باب التَّسْبِيحِ أَوَّلَ النَّهَارِ وَعِنْدَ النَّوْمِ
titles.english: Chapter: The Tasbih At The Beginning Of The Day And When Going To Sleep

titles.arabic: باب اسْتِحْبَابِ الدُّعَاءِ عِنْدَ صِيَاحِ الدِّيكِ
titles.english: Chapter: It Is Recommend To Say Supplication When A Rooster Crows

titles.arabic: باب دُعَاءِ الْكَرْبِ
titles.english: Chapter: Supplication At Times Of Distress

titles.arabic: باب فَضْلِ سُبْحَانَ اللَّهِ وَبِحَمْدِهِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Virtue Of (Saying): "Glory To Allah And With His Praise"

titles.arabic: باب فَضْلِ الدُّعَاءِ لِلْمُسْلِمِينَ بِظَهْرِ الْغَيْبِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Virtue Of Praying For The Muslims In Their Absence

titles.arabic: باب اسْتِحْبَابِ حَمْدِ اللَّهِ تَعَالَى بَعْدَ الأَكْلِ وَالشُّرْبِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: It Is Recommend To Praise Allah After Eating And Drinking

titles.arabic: باب بَيَانِ أَنَّهُ يُسْتَجَابُ لِلدَّاعِي مَا لَمْ يَعْجَلْ فَيَقُولُ دَعَوْتُ فَلَمْ يُسْتَجَبْ لِي ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: It Is Recommended For The One Who Supplicated Not To Be Impatient. And Not To Say: "I Supplicated And Received No Response"

titles.arabic: بَاب أَكْثَرُ أَهْلِ الْجَنَّةِ الْفُقَرَاءُ وَأَكْثَرُ أَهْلِ النَّارِ النِّسَاءُ وَبَيَانِ الْفِتْنَةِ بِالنِّسَاءِ
titles.english: Chapter: "Most Of The People Of Paradise Are Poor, And Most Of The Inhabitants Of The Fire Are Women, And The Fitnah Of Women"

titles.arabic: باب قِصَّةِ أَصْحَابِ الْغَارِ الثَّلاَثَةِ وَالتَّوَسُّلِ بِصَالِحِ الأَعْمَالِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Story Of Three Men In The Cave And Their Tawossul (Seeking To Draw Close To Allah) By Means Of Righteous Deeds

titles.arabic: باب ابْتِنَاءِ مَسْجِدِ النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم ‏
titles.english: Chapter: The construction of the Masjid of the Prophet (saws)

titles.arabic: باب تَحْوِيلِ الْقِبْلَةِ مِنَ الْقُدْسِ إِلَى الْكَعْبَةِ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: Changing the qiblah from Al-Quds (Jerusalem) to the Ka`bah

titles.arabic: باب النَّهْيِ عَنْ بِنَاءِ الْمَسَاجِدِ عَلَى الْقُبُورِ وَاتِّخَاذِ الصُّوَرِ فِيهَا وَالنَّهْيِ عَنِ اتِّخَاذِ الْقُبُورِ مَسَاجِدَ
titles.english: Chapter: The prohibition of building masajid over graves and placing images therein; and the prohibition of taking graves as masajid

titles.arabic: باب فَضْلِ بِنَاءِ الْمَسَاجِدِ وَالْحَثِّ عَلَيْهَا ‏
titles.english: Chapter: The virtue of building masajid and encouragement to do so

titles.arabic: باب النَّدْبِ إِلَى وَضْعِ الأَيْدِي عَلَى الرُّكَبِ فِي الرُّكُوعِ وَنَسْخِ التَّطْبِيقِ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: The recommendation to place the hands on the knees when bowing, and the abrogation of tatbiq

titles.arabic: باب جَوَازِ الإِقْعَاءِ عَلَى الْعَقِبَيْنِ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: The permissibility of squatting on the heels

titles.arabic: باب تَحْرِيمِ الْكَلاَمِ فِي الصَّلاَةِ وَنَسْخِ مَا كَانَ مِنْ إِبَاحَتِهِ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: The prohibition of speaking during the prayer, and the abrogation of its former permissibility

titles.arabic: باب جَوَازِ لَعْنِ الشَّيْطَانِ فِي أَثْنَاءِ الصَّلاَةِ وَالتَّعَوُّذِ مِنْهُ وَجَوَازِ الْعَمَلِ الْقَلِيلِ فِي الصَّلاَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: The permissibility of cursing the Shaitan during prayer, and seeking refuge with Allah from him; and the permissibility of doing a few actions while in salat

titles.arabic: باب جَوَازِ حَمْلِ الصِّبْيَانِ فِي الصَّلاَةِ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: The permissibility of carrying children during prayer, and their garments are regarded as being pure until it is realized that they are impure. Few actions will not invalidate the prayer, and the same applies if several such actions are done but are done separately

titles.arabic: باب جَوَازِ الْخُطْوَةِ وَالْخُطْوَتَيْنِ فِي الصَّلاَةِ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: The permissibility of taking one or two steps while praying, and that is not disliked if done for a reason. The permissibility of the Imam praying in a place that is higher than the people praying behind him, if that is done for a reason, such as teaching them how to offer prayers, and other than that.

titles.arabic: باب كَرَاهَةِ الاِخْتِصَارِ فِي الصَّلاَةِ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: It is disliked to put the hands on the waist during the prayer

titles.arabic: باب كَرَاهَةِ مَسْحِ الْحَصَى وَتَسْوِيَةِ التُّرَابِ فِي الصَّلاَةِ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: It is disliked to smooth the pebbles or make the dirt level during salat

titles.arabic: باب النَّهْىِ عَنِ الْبُصَاقِ، فِي الْمَسْجِدِ فِي الصَّلاَةِ وَغَيْرِهَا ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The prohibition of spitting in the masjid, during prayer and at other times. The prohibition of a praying person spitting in front of him or to his right

titles.arabic: باب جَوَازِ الصَّلاَةِ فِي النَّعْلَيْنِ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: The permissibility of offering salat while wearing shoes

titles.arabic: باب كَرَاهَةِ الصَّلاَةِ فِي ثَوْبٍ لَهُ أَعْلاَمٌ‏
titles.english: Chapter: It is disliked to offer salat in a garment with markings

titles.arabic: باب كَرَاهَةِ الصَّلاَةِ بِحَضْرَةِ الطَّعَامِ الَّذِي يُرِيدُ أَكْلَهُ فِي الْحَالِ وَكَرَاهَةِ الصَّلاَةِ مَعَ مُدَافَعَةِ الأَخْبَثَيْنِ
titles.english: Chapter: It is disliked to offer salat in the presence of food that one wants to eat. It is disliked to offer salat while restraining the urge to relieve oneself, and so on

titles.arabic: باب نَهْىِ مَنْ أَكَلَ ثُومًا أَوْ بَصَلاً أَوْ كُرَّاثًا أَوْ نَحْوَهَا عَنْ حُضُورِ الْمَسْجِدِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Prohibiting one who has eaten garlic, onions, or leeks, and other things that have an offensive odor from coming to the masjid, until that smell has gone away, and such a person should be expelled from the masjid

titles.arabic: باب النَّهْىِ عَنْ نَشْدِ الضَّالَّةِ، فِي الْمَسْجدِ وَمَا يَقُولُهُ مَنْ سَمِعَ النَّاشِدَ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: The prohibition of making lost property announcements in the masjid, and what should be said by one who hears a person making such an announcement

titles.arabic: باب السَّهْوِ فِي الصَّلاَةِ وَالسُّجُودِ لَهُ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: As-Sahw (forgetfulness) in prayer and prostrating to compensate for it

titles.arabic: باب سُجُودِ التِّلاَوَةِ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: The prostration of recitation

titles.arabic: باب صِفَةِ الْجُلُوسِ فِي الصَّلاَةِ وَكَيْفِيَّةِ وَضْعِ الْيَدَيْنِ عَلَى الْفَخِذَيْنِ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: The description of the sitting during the prayer, and how the hands are to be placed on the thighs

titles.arabic: باب السَّلاَمِ لِلتَّحْلِيلِ مِنَ الصَّلاَةِ عِنْدَ فَرَاغِهَا وَكَيْفِيَّتِهِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The salam to exit the prayer when one has finished and how it is done

titles.arabic: باب الذِّكْرِ بَعْدَ الصَّلاَةِ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: The remembrance after the prayer

titles.arabic: باب اسْتِحْبَابِ التَّعَوُّذِ مِنْ عَذَابِ الْقَبْرِ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: It is recommended to seek refuge with Allah from the punishment of the grave, the punishment of hell, the trials of life and death, the tribulation of the Dajjal and from sin and debt between the tashah-hud and the taslim

titles.arabic: باب مَا يُسْتَعَاذُ مِنْهُ فِي الصَّلاَةِ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: From what refuge is to be sought when in salat

titles.arabic: باب اسْتِحْبَابِ الذِّكْرِ بَعْدَ الصَّلاَةِ وَبَيَان صِفَتِهِ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: It is recommended to recite statements of remembrance after the prayer, and how that is to be done

titles.arabic: باب مَا يُقَالُ بَيْنَ تَكْبِيرَةِ الإِحْرَامِ وَالْقِرَاءَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: What is to be said between the opening takbir and the recitation of the Qur’an

titles.arabic: باب اسْتِحْبَابِ إِتْيَانِ الصَّلاَةِ بِوَقَارٍ وَسَكِينَةٍ وَالنَّهْىِ عَنْ إِتْيَانِهَا سَعْيًا ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: It is recommended to come to prayers in a tranquil and dignified manner, and it is forbidden to come in a hasty manner

titles.arabic: باب مَتَى يَقُومُ النَّاسُ لِلصَّلاَةِ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: When should the people stand up to pray?

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ أَدْرَكَ رَكْعَةً مِنَ الصَّلاَةِ فَقَدْ أَدْرَكَ تِلْكَ الصَّلاَةَ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: The one who catches up with a rak`ah of the prayer, he has caught up with that prayer

titles.arabic: باب أَوْقَاتِ الصَّلَوَاتِ الْخَمْسِ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: The times of the five prayers

titles.arabic: باب اسْتِحْبَابِ الإِبْرَادِ بِالظُّهْرِ فِي شِدَّةِ الْحَرِّ لِمَنْ يَمْضِي إِلَى جَمَاعَةٍ وَيَنَالُهُ الْحَرُّ فِي طَرِيقِهِ
titles.english: Chapter: The recommendation to delay Zuhr (until it has cooled down) in severe heat for one who finds it too hot in route to join the congregation

titles.arabic: باب اسْتِحْبَابِ تَقْدِيمِ الظُّهْرِ فِي أَوَّلِ الْوَقْتِ فِي غَيْرِ شِدَّةِ الْحَرِّ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: It is recommended to pray Zuhr at the beginning of its time when there is no intense heat

titles.arabic: باب اسْتِحْبَابِ التَّبْكِيرِ بِالْعَصْرِ
titles.english: Chapter: It is recommended to pray `Asr early

titles.arabic: باب التَّغْلِيظِ فِي تَفْوِيتِ صَلاَةِ الْعَصْرِ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: Stern warning against missing the `Asr prayer

titles.arabic: باب الدَّلِيلِ لِمَنْ قَالَ الصَّلاَةُ الْوُسْطَى هِيَ صَلاَةُ الْعَصْرِ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: The evidence for those who say that “the middle prayer” is the `Asr prayer

titles.arabic: باب فَضْلِ صَلاَتَىِ الصُّبْحِ وَالْعَصْرِ وَالْمُحَافَظَةِ عَلَيْهِمَا ‏
titles.english: Chapter: The virtue of the Subh and the `Asr prayers, and of maintaining them

titles.arabic: باب بَيَانِ أَنَّ أَوَّلَ وَقْتِ الْمَغْرِبِ عِنْدَ غُرُوبِ الشَّمْسِ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: The beginning of the time for Maghrib when the sun sets

titles.arabic: باب وَقْتِ الْعِشَاءِ وَتَأْخِيرِهَا ‏
titles.english: Chapter: The time of `Isha and delaying it

titles.arabic: باب اسْتِحْبَابِ التَّبْكِيرِ بِالصُّبْحِ فِي أَوَّلِ وَقْتِهَا وَهُوَ التَّغْلِيسُ وَبَيَانِ قَدْرِ الْقِرَاءَةِ فِيهَا
titles.english: Chapter: It is recommended to pray Subh early, at the beginning of its time, when it is still dark; and the length of recitation therein

titles.arabic: باب كَرَاهِيَةِ تَأْخِيرِ الصَّلاَةِ عَنْ وَقْتِهَا الْمُخْتَارِ وَمَا يَفْعَلُهُ الْمَأْمُومُ إِذَا أَخَّرَهَا الإِمَامُ
titles.english: Chapter: It is disliked to delay the prayers beyond their proper times, and what a person should do if the Imam delays the prayer

titles.arabic: باب فَضْلِ صَلاَةِ الجَمَاعَةِ وَبَيَانِ التَّشْدِيدِ فِي التَّخَلُّفِ عَنْهَا ‏
titles.english: Chapter: The virtue of prayer in congregation, and clarifying the stern warning against staying away from it, and that it is fard kifayah

titles.arabic: باب يَجِبُ إِتْيَانُ الْمَسْجِدِ عَلَى مَنْ سَمِعَ النِّدَاءَ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: It is obligatory for the one who hears the call to prayer to come to the masjid

titles.arabic: باب صَلاَةُ الْجَمَاعَةِ مِنْ سُنَنِ الْهُدَى ‏
titles.english: Chapter: Prayer in congregation is one of the sunnah of guidance

titles.arabic: باب النَّهْىِ عَنِ الْخُرُوجِ، مِنَ الْمَسْجِدِ إِذَا أَذَّنَ الْمُؤَذِّنُ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: The prohibition of leaving the masjid once the Mu’adhdhin has called the Adhan

titles.arabic: باب فَضْلِ صَلاَةِ الْعِشَاءِ وَالصُّبْحِ فِي جَمَاعَةٍ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The virtue of praying `Isha and Subh in congregation

titles.arabic: باب الرُّخْصَةِ فِي التَّخَلُّفِ عَنِ الْجَمَاعَةِ، بِعُذْرٍ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: Concession allowing one to not attend the congregation if there is an excuse

titles.arabic: باب جَوَازِ الْجَمَاعَةِ فِي النَّافِلَةِ وَالصَّلاَةِ عَلَى حَصِيرٍ وَخُمْرَةٍ وَثَوْبٍ وَغَيْرِهَا مِنَ الطَّاهِرَاتِ
titles.english: Chapter: It is permissible to offer voluntary prayers in congregation, and to pray on hasir (palm-fiber mats), khumrah (small mats), cloth, and other pure things

titles.arabic: باب فَضْلِ صَلاَةِ الْجَمَاعَةِ وَانْتِظَارِ الصَّلاَةِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The virtue of offering the obligatory prayers in congregation, the virtue of waiting for prayer and taking many steps towards the masjid, the virtue of walking to the masjid

titles.arabic: باب فَضْلِ كَثْرَةِ الْخُطَا إِلَى الْمَسَاجِدِ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: The virtue of taking many steps to the masjid

titles.arabic: باب الْمَشْىُ إِلَى الصَّلاَةِ تُمْحَى بِهِ الْخَطَايَا وَتُرْفَعُ بِهِ الدَّرَجَاتُ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: Walking to prayer erases sins and raises one in status

titles.arabic: باب فَضْلِ الْجُلُوسِ فِي مُصَلاَّهُ بَعْدَ الصُّبْحِ وَفَضْلِ الْمَسَاجِدِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The virtue of sitting in one’s prayer place after Subh, and the virtue of the masajid

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ أَحَقُّ بِالإِمَامَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: Who is more entitled to lead the prayer

titles.arabic: باب اسْتِحْبَابِ الْقُنُوتِ فِي جَمِيعِ الصَّلاَةِ إِذَا نزَلَتْ بِالْمُسْلِمِينَ نَازِلَةٌ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: It is recommended to say qunut in all prayers if a calamity befalls the Muslims – and refuge is sought from Allah (regarding that). It is recommended to say qunut in Subh at all times. And the clarification that it is to be said after raising the head from bowing in the final rak`ah, and it is recommended to say it out loud

titles.arabic: باب قَضَاءِ الصَّلاَةِ الْفَائِتَةِ وَاسْتِحْبَابِ تَعْجِيلِ قَضَائِهَا ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Making up a missed prayer. And it is recommended to hasten to make it up

titles.arabic: باب فِي الْحَضِّ عَلَى التَّوْبَةِ وَالْفَرَحِ بِهَا ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Exhortation To Repent And Rejoicing Therein

titles.arabic: باب سُقُوطِ الذُّنُوبِ بِالاِسْتِغْفَارِ تَوْبَةً ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Sins Are Erased By Praying For Forgiveness And Repenting

titles.arabic: بَاب فَضْلِ دَوَامِ الذِّكْرِ وَالْفِكْرِ فِي أُمُورِ الْآخِرَةِ وَالْمُرَاقَبَةِ وَجَوَازِ تَرْكِ ذَلِكَ فِي بَعْضِ الْأَوْقَاتِ وَالِاشْتِغَالِ بِالدُّنْيَا
titles.english: Chapter: The Virtue Of Constant Dhikr, Thinking Of The Hereafter, And Remembering That Allah Is Always Watching; Permissibility Of Stopping That Sometimes, And Attending To Worldly Matters

titles.arabic: باب فِي سَعَةِ رَحْمَةِ اللَّهِ تَعَالَى وَأَنَّهَا سَبَقَتْ غَضَبَهُ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Vastaess Of Allah's Mercy, Which Prevails Over His Wrath

titles.arabic: باب قَبُولِ التَّوْبَةِ مِنَ الذُّنُوبِ وَإِنْ تَكَرَّرَتِ الذُّنُوبُ وَالتَّوْبَةُ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Acceptance Of Repentance From Sin, Even If The Sin And Repentance Happen Repeatedly

titles.arabic: باب غَيْرَةِ اللَّهِ تَعَالَى وَتَحْرِيمِ الْفَوَاحِشِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Protective Jealousy (Ghirah) Of Allah The Most High, And The Prohibition Of Immoral Behavior

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ تَعَالَى ‏ {‏ إِنَّ الْحَسَنَاتِ يُذْهِبْنَ السَّيِّئَاتِ}
titles.english: Chapter: The Words Of Allah The Most High: "Verily, The Good Deeds Remove The Evil Deeds"

titles.arabic: باب قَبُولِ تَوْبَةِ الْقَاتِلِ وَإِنْ كَثُرَ قَتْلُهُ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Acceptance Of The Repentance Of The One Who Kills, Even If He Has Killed A Great Deal

titles.arabic: باب حَدِيثِ تَوْبَةِ كَعْبِ بْنِ مَالِكٍ وَصَاحِبَيْهِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Repentance Of Ka'b Ibn Malik And His Two Companions

titles.arabic: باب فِي حَدِيثِ الإِفْكِ وَقَبُولِ تَوْبَةِ الْقَاذِفِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Al-Ifk (The Slander) And The Acceptance Of The Slanderer's Repentance

titles.arabic: باب بَرَاءَةِ حَرَمِ النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم مِنَ الرِّيبَةِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Exoneration Of The Prophet's Concubine

titles.arabic: باب ابْتِدَاءِ الْخَلْقِ وَخَلْقِ آدَمَ عَلَيْهِ السَّلاَمُ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Beginning Of Creation And The Creation Of Adam, (Peace Be Upon Him)

titles.arabic: باب فِي الْبَعْثِ وَالنُّشُورِ وَصِفَةِ الأَرْضِ يَوْمَ الْقِيَامَةِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Resurrection And Description Of The Earth On The Day Of Resurrection

titles.arabic: باب نُزُلِ أَهْلِ الْجَنَّةِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Welcoming Feast Of The People Of Paradise

titles.arabic: بَاب سُؤَالِ الْيَهُودِ النَّبِيَّ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ عَنْ الرُّوحِ وَقَوْله تَعَالَى يَسْأَلُونَكَ عَنْ الرُّوحِ الْآيَةَ
titles.english: Chapter: The Jews' Asking The Prophet (SAW) About The Soul, And The Words Of Allah: "And They Ask You Concerning The Ruh (The Spirit)"

titles.arabic: باب فِي قَوْلِهِ تَعَالَى ‏ {‏ وَمَا كَانَ اللَّهُ لِيُعَذِّبَهُمْ وَأَنْتَ فِيهِمْ}
titles.english: Chapter: The Words Of Allah The Most High: "And Allah Would Not Punish Them While You Are Amongst Them"

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏ {‏ إِنَّ الإِنْسَانَ لَيَطْغَى * أَنْ رَآهُ اسْتَغْنَى‏}
titles.english: Chapter: The Words Of Allah: "Verily, Man Does Transgress Because He Considers Himself Self-Sufficient."

titles.arabic: باب الدُّخَانِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Smoke (Ad-Dukhan)

titles.arabic: باب انْشِقَاقِ الْقَمَرِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Splitting Of The Moon

titles.arabic: باب لاَ أَحَدَ أَصْبَرُ عَلَى أَذًى مِنَ اللَّهِ عَزَّ وَجَلَّ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Disbelievers

titles.arabic: باب طَلَبِ الْكَافِرِ الْفِدَاءَ بِمِلْءِ الأَرْضِ ذَهَبًا ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Disbeliever Seeking Ransom With An Earthful Of Gold

titles.arabic: باب يُحْشَرُ الْكَافِرُ عَلَى وَجْهِهِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Disbeliever Will Be Driven Upon His Face

titles.arabic: باب صَبْغِ أَنْعَمِ أَهْلِ الدُّنْيَا فِي النَّارِ وَصَبْغِ أَشَدِّهِمْ بُؤْسًا فِي الْجَنَّةِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Most Affluent Of People In This World Will Be Dipped In The Fire, And The Most Destitute Will Be Dipped In Paradise

titles.arabic: بَاب جَزَاءِ الْمُؤْمِنِ بِحَسَنَاتِهِ فِي الدُّنْيَا وَالْآخِرَةِ وَتَعْجِيلِ حَسَنَاتِ الْكَافِرِ فِي الدُّنْيَا
titles.english: Chapter: The Believer Is Rewarded For His Good Deeds In This World, And In The Hereafter, And The Disbeliever Is Rewarded For His Good Deeds In This World

titles.arabic: باب مَثَلُ الْمُؤْمِنِ كَالزَّرْعِ وَمَثَلُ الْكَافِرِ كَشَجَرِ الأَرْزِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Believer Is Like A Plant And The Hypocrite And The Disbeliever Are Like Cedars

titles.arabic: باب مَثَلُ الْمُؤْمِنِ مَثَلُ النَّخْلَةِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Likeness Of The Believer Is That Of A Date Palm

titles.arabic: بَاب تَحْرِيشِ الشَّيْطَانِ وَبَعْثِهِ سَرَايَاهُ لِفِتْنَةِ النَّاسِ وَأَنَّ مَعَ كُلِّ إِنْسَانٍ قَرِينًا
titles.english: Chapter: The Mischief Of The Shaitan And How He Sends His Troops To Tempt People, And With Every Person There Is A Qarin (Companion From Among The Jinn)

titles.arabic: باب لَنْ يَدْخُلَ أَحَدٌ الْجَنَّةَ بِعَمَلِهِ بَلْ بِرَحْمَةِ اللَّهِ تَعَالَى ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: No One Will Enter Paradise By Virtue Of His Deeds, Rather By The Mercy Of Allah, Exalted Is He

titles.arabic: باب إِكْثَارِ الأَعْمَالِ وَالاِجْتِهَادِ فِي الْعِبَادَةِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Doing A Lot Of Good Deeds And Striving Hard In Worship

titles.arabic: باب الاِقْتِصَادِ فِي الْمَوْعِظَةِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Moderation In Preaching

titles.arabic: باب إِنَّ فِي الْجَنَّةِ شَجَرَةً يَسِيرُ الرَّاكِبُ فِي ظِلِّهَا مِائَةَ عَامٍ لاَ يَقْطَعُهَا ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: In Paradise There Is A Tree In Whose Shade A Rider Could Travel For One Hundred Years And Still Not Cross It

titles.arabic: باب إِحْلاَلِ الرِّضْوَانِ عَلَى أَهْلِ الْجَنَّةِ فَلاَ يَسْخَطُ عَلَيْهِمْ أَبَدًا ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Bestowal Of Divine Pleasure On The People Of Paradise, And Allah Will Never Be Angry With Them

titles.arabic: باب تَرَائِي أَهْلِ الْجَنَّةِ أَهْلَ الْغُرَفِ كَمَا يُرَى الْكَوْكَبُ فِي السَّمَاءِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Inhabitants Of Paradise Will See The People In The Highest Place In Paradise As Planets Are Seen In The Sky

titles.arabic: باب فِيمَنْ يَوَدُّ رُؤْيَةَ النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم بِأَهْلِهِ وَمَالِهِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: One Who Would Love To Have Seen The Prophet (SAW) Even If That Was At The Expense Of His Family And His Wealth

titles.arabic: باب فِي سُوقِ الْجَنَّةِ وَمَا يَنَالُونَ فِيهَا مِنَ النَّعِيمِ وَالْجَمَالِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Market Of Paradise, And What They Will Get There Of Delight And Beauty

titles.arabic: بَاب أَوَّلُ زُمْرَةٍ تَدْخُلُ الْجَنَّةَ عَلَى صُورَةِ الْقَمَرِ لَيْلَةَ الْبَدْرِ وَصِفَاتُهُمْ وَأَزْوَاجُهُمْ
titles.english: Chapter: The First Group To Enter Paradise Will Look Like The Moon When It Is Full; Their Attributes And Their Spouses

titles.arabic: باب فِي صِفَاتِ الْجَنَّةِ وَأَهْلِهَا وَتَسْبِيحِهِمْ فِيهَا بُكْرَةً وَعَشِيًّا ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Attributes Of Paradise And Its People, And Their Glorifying Allah Every Morning And Evening

titles.arabic: بَاب فِي دَوَامِ نَعِيمِ أَهْلِ الْجَنَّةِ وَقَوْله تَعَالَى وَنُودُوا أَنْ تِلْكُمْ الْجَنَّةُ أُورِثْتُمُوهَا بِمَا كُنْتُمْ تَعْمَلُونَ
titles.english: Chapter: The Eternal Delight Of The People Of Paradise, And The Verse In Which Allah Says: "And It Will Be Announced To Them: This Is The Paradise Which You Have Inherited For What You Used To Do"

titles.arabic: باب فِي صِفَةِ خِيَامِ الْجَنَّةِ وَمَا لِلْمُؤْمِنِينَ فِيهَا مِنَ الأَهْلِينَ
titles.english: Chapter: The Tents Of Paradise, And The Wives That The Believers Will Have In Them

titles.arabic: باب مَا فِي الدُّنْيَا مِنْ أَنْهَارِ الْجَنَّةِ
titles.english: Chapter: Rivers Of Paradise In This World

titles.arabic: باب يَدْخُلُ الْجَنَّةَ أَقْوَامٌ أَفْئِدَتُهُمْ مِثْلُ أَفْئِدَةِ الطَّيْرِ
titles.english: Chapter: People Will Enter Paradise Whose Hearts Are Like The Hearts Of Birds

titles.arabic: باب فِي شِدَّةِ حَرِّ نَارِ جَهَنَّمَ وَبُعْدِ قَعْرِهَا وَمَا تَأْخُذُ مِنَ الْمُعَذَّبِينَ
titles.english: Chapter: About Hell - May Allah Protect Us From It

titles.arabic: باب النَّارُ يَدْخُلُهَا الْجَبَّارُونَ وَالْجَنَّةُ يَدْخُلُهَا الضُّعَفَاءُ
titles.english: Chapter: The Arrogant Will Enter The Fire, And The Humble Will Enter Paradise

titles.arabic: باب فَنَاءِ الدُّنْيَا وَبَيَانِ الْحَشْرِ يَوْمَ الْقِيَامَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: The Passing Away Of This World, And The Gathering On The Day Of Resurrection

titles.arabic: باب فِي صِفَةِ يَوْمِ الْقِيَامَةِ أَعَانَنَا اللَّهُ عَلَى أَهْوَالِهَا
titles.english: Chapter: The Description Of The Day Of Resurrection - May Allah Save Us From Its Terrors

titles.arabic: باب الصِّفَاتِ الَّتِي يُعْرَفُ بِهَا فِي الدُّنْيَا أَهْلُ الْجَنَّةِ وَأَهْلُ النَّارِ
titles.english: Chapter: Attributes By Which The People Of Paradise And The People Of The Fire May Be Recognized In This World

titles.arabic: بَاب عَرْضِ مَقْعَدِ الْمَيِّتِ مِنْ الْجَنَّةِ أَوْ النَّارِ عَلَيْهِ وَإِثْبَاتِ عَذَابِ الْقَبْرِ وَالتَّعَوُّذِ مِنْهُ
titles.english: Chapter: The Deceased Is Shown His Place In Paradise Or The Fire; And Confirmation Of The Torment In The Grave - We Seek Refuge With Allah From That

titles.arabic: باب إِثْبَاتِ الْحِسَابِ
titles.english: Chapter: The Surety Of Reckoning

titles.arabic: باب الأَمْرِ بِحُسْنِ الظَّنِّ بِاللَّهِ تَعَالَى عِنْدَ الْمَوْتِ
titles.english: Chapter: The Command To Think Positively Of Allah At The Time Of Death

titles.arabic: باب اقْتِرَابِ الْفِتَنِ وَفَتْحِ رَدْمِ يَأْجُوجَ وَمَأْجُوجَ
titles.english: Chapter: The Approach Of Tribulations And The Opening Of The Barrier Of Ya'juj And Ma'juj

titles.arabic: باب الْخَسْفِ بِالْجَيْشِ الَّذِي يَؤُمُّ الْبَيْتَ
titles.english: Chapter: The Earth Swallowing Up The Army That Aims To Attack The Ka'bah

titles.arabic: باب نُزُولِ الْفِتَنِ كَمَوَاقِعِ الْقَطْرِ
titles.english: Chapter: Onset Of Tribulations Like Rainfall

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا تَوَاجَهَ الْمُسْلِمَانِ بِسَيْفَيْهِمَا
titles.english: Chapter: If Two Muslims Confront One Another With Their Swords

titles.arabic: باب هَلاَكُ هَذِهِ الأُمَّةِ بَعْضِهِمْ بِبَعْضٍ
titles.english: Chapter: (Parts of) This Ummah Will Destroy One Another

titles.arabic: باب إِخْبَارِ النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم فِيمَا يَكُونُ إِلَى قِيَامِ السَّاعَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: The Prophet's Foretelling Of What Will Happen Until The Hour Begins

titles.arabic: باب فِي الْفِتْنَةِ الَّتِي تَمُوجُ كَمَوْجِ الْبَحْرِ
titles.english: Chapter: The Tribulation That Will Come like Waves Of The Ocean

titles.arabic: باب لاَ تَقُومُ السَّاعَةُ حَتَّى يَحْسِرَ الْفُرَاتُ عَنْ جَبَلٍ مِنْ ذَهَبٍ
titles.english: Chapter: The Hour Will Not Begin Until The Euphrates Uncovers A Mountain Of Gold

titles.arabic: باب فِي فَتْحِ قُسْطُنْطِينِيَّةَ وَخُرُوجِ الدَّجَّالِ وَنُزُولِ عِيسَى ابْنِ مَرْيَمَ
titles.english: Chapter: The Conquest Of Constantinople, The Emergence Of The Dajjal And The Descent Of 'Eisa bin Mariam

titles.arabic: باب تَقُومُ السَّاعَةُ وَالرُّومُ أَكْثَرُ النَّاسِ
titles.english: Chapter: The Hour Will Begin When The Byzantines Are The Most Prevalent Of People

titles.arabic: باب إِقْبَالِ الرُّومِ فِي كَثْرَةِ الْقَتْلِ عِنْدَ خُرُوجِ الدَّجَّالِ
titles.english: Chapter: Fighting The Byzantines, And A Great Deal Of Killing When Ad-Dajjal Emerges

titles.arabic: باب مَا يَكُونُ مِنْ فُتُوحَاتِ الْمُسْلِمِينَ قَبْلَ الدَّجَّالِ
titles.english: Chapter: Conquests Of The Muslims Before The Appearance Of Ad-Dajjal

titles.arabic: باب فِي الآيَاتِ الَّتِي تَكُونُ قَبْلَ السَّاعَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: The Signs Which Will Appear Before The Hour

titles.arabic: باب لاَ تَقُومُ السَّاعَةُ حَتَّى تَخْرُجَ نَارٌ مِنْ أَرْضِ الْحِجَازِ
titles.english: Chapter: The Hour Will Not Begin Until A Fire Emerges From The Land Of The Hijaz

titles.arabic: باب فِي سُكْنَى الْمَدِينَةِ وَعِمَارَتِهَا قَبْلَ السَّاعَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: The Inhabitants Of Al-Madinah And How Far It Will Be Developed Before The Hour

titles.arabic: باب الْفِتْنَةِ مِنَ الْمَشْرِقِ مِنْ حَيْثُ يَطْلُعُ قَرْنَا الشَّيْطَانِ
titles.english: Chapter: Tribulation From The East, From Where The Horns Of The Shaitan Appear

titles.arabic: باب لاَ تَقُومُ السَّاعَةُ حَتَّى تَعْبُدَ دَوْسٌ ذَا الْخَلَصَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: The Hour Will Not Begin Until Daws Worship Dhul-Khalasah

titles.arabic: بَاب لَا تَقُومُ السَّاعَةُ حَتَّى يَمُرَّ الرَّجُلُ بِقَبْرِ الرَّجُلِ فَيَتَمَنَّى أَنْ يَكُونَ مَكَانَ الْمَيِّتِ مِنْ الْبَلَاءِ
titles.english: Chapter: The Hour Will Not Begin Until A Man Passes By Another Man's Grave And Wishes That He Was In The Place Of The Deceased, Because Of Calamity

titles.arabic: باب ذِكْرِ ابْنِ صَيَّادٍ
titles.english: Chapter: Ibn Sayyad

titles.arabic: باب ذِكْرِ الدَّجَّالِ وَصِفَتِهِ وَمَا مَعَهُ
titles.english: Chapter: Ad-Dajjal

titles.arabic: باب فِي صِفَةِ الدَّجَّالِ وَتَحْرِيمِ الْمَدِينَةِ عَلَيْهِ وَقَتْلِهِ الْمُؤْمِنَ وَإِحْيَائِهِ
titles.english: Chapter: Description Of Ad-Dajjal; Al-Madinah Is Forbidden To Him; He Will Kill A Believer And Bring Him Back To Life

titles.arabic: باب فِي الدَّجَّالِ وَهُوَ أَهْوَنُ عَلَى اللَّهِ عَزَّ وَجَلَّ
titles.english: Chapter: Ad-Dajjal Is Very Insignificant Before Allah

titles.arabic: بَاب فِي خُرُوجِ الدَّجَّالِ وَمُكْثِهِ فِي الْأَرْضِ وَنُزُولِ عِيسَى وَقَتْلِهِ إِيَّاهُ
titles.english: Chapter: The Emergence Of Ad-Dajjal And His Stay On Earth, And The Descent Of 'Eisa Who Will Kill Him. The Death Of The People Of Goodness And Faith, And The Survival Of The Worst Of People, And Their Idol-Worship. The Trumpet Blast, And The Resurrection Of Those Who Are In Their Graves

titles.arabic: باب ‏{‏ قِصَّةِ الْجَسَّاسَةِ ‏}‏
titles.english: Chapter: Al-Jassasah

titles.arabic: باب فِي بَقِيَّةٍ مِنْ أَحَادِيثِ الدَّجَّالِ
titles.english: Chapter: The Rest Of The Ahadith About Ad-Dajjal

titles.arabic: باب فَضْلِ الْعِبَادَةِ فِي الْهَرْجِ
titles.english: Chapter: The Virtue Of Worship At Times Of Turmoil

titles.arabic: باب قُرْبِ السَّاعَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: The Approach Of The Hour

titles.arabic: باب مَا بَيْنَ النَّفْخَتَيْنِ
titles.english: Chapter: Between The Blasts (Of The Trumpet)

titles.arabic: باب لاَ تَدْخُلُوا مَسَاكِنَ الَّذِينَ ظَلَمُوا أَنْفُسَهُمْ إِلاَّ أَنْ تَكُونُوا بَاكِينَ ‏.‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Prohibition Of Entering Upon The People Of Al-Hijr (The Rocky Tract) Unless One Enters Weeping

titles.arabic: باب الإِحْسَانِ إِلَى الأَرْمَلَةِ وَالْمِسْكِينِ وَالْيَتِيمِ
titles.english: Chapter: The Virtue Of Treating Widows, The Poor And Orphans Kindly

titles.arabic: باب فَضْلِ بِنَاءِ الْمَسَاجِدِ
titles.english: Chapter: The Virtue Of Building Masajid

titles.arabic: باب الصَّدَقَةِ فِي الْمَسَاكِينِ
titles.english: Chapter: The Virtue Of Spending On The Poor And Wayfarers

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ أَشْرَكَ فِي عَمَلِهِ غَيْرَ اللَّهِ
titles.english: Chapter: The Prohibition On Showing Off

titles.arabic: باب التَّكَلُّمِ بِالْكَلِمَةِ يَهْوِي بِهَا فِي النَّارِ
titles.english: Chapter: Guarding The Tongue

titles.arabic: باب عُقُوبَةِ مَنْ يَأْمُرُ بِالْمَعْرُوفِ وَلاَ يَفْعَلُهُ وَيَنْهَى عَنِ الْمُنْكَرِ وَيَفْعَلُهُ
titles.english: Chapter: About The One Who Enjoins Good But Does Not Do It, And Forbids Evil But Does It

titles.arabic: باب النَّهْىِ عَنْ هَتْكِ الإِنْسَانِ، سِتْرَ نَفْسِهِ
titles.english: Chapter: The Prohibition Against Disclosing One's Own Sins
