titles.arabic: باب تَشْمِيتِ الْعَاطِسِ وَكَرَاهَةِ التَّثَاؤُبِ
titles.english: Chapter: Saying: "May Allah Have Mercy On You" To One Who Sneezes, And Yawning Is Disliked

titles.arabic: باب فِي أَحَادِيثَ مُتَفَرِّقَةٍ
titles.english: Chapter: Miscellaneous Ahadith

titles.arabic: باب فِي الْفَأْرِ وَأَنَّهُ مَسْخٌ
titles.english: Chapter: Mice Are A Transformed Race

titles.arabic: باب لاَ يُلْدَغُ الْمُؤْمِنُ مِنْ جُحْرٍ مَرَّتَيْنِ
titles.english: Chapter: A Believer Should Not Be Stung Twice From The Same Hole

titles.arabic: باب الْمُؤْمِنُ أَمْرُهُ كُلُّهُ خَيْرٌ
titles.english: Chapter: The Believer's Affair Is All Good

titles.arabic: باب النَّهْىِ عَنِ الْمَدْحِ، إِذَا كَانَ فِيهِ إِفْرَاطٌ وَخِيفَ مِنْهُ فِتْنَةٌ عَلَى الْمَمْدُوحِ
titles.english: Chapter: The Prohibition Of Praising if It Involves Exaggeration And There Is The Fear That It May Be A Source Of Temptation (Fitnah) For The One Who Is Praised

titles.arabic: باب مُنَاوَلَةِ الأَكْبَرِ
titles.english: Chapter: Showing Preference To The One Who Is Older

titles.arabic: باب التَّثَبُّتِ فِي الْحَدِيثِ وَحُكْمِ كِتَابَةِ الْعِلْمِ
titles.english: Chapter: Verification Of Hadith And The Ruling On Writing Down Knowledge

titles.arabic: باب قِصَّةِ أَصْحَابِ الأُخْدُودِ وَالسَّاحِرِ وَالرَّاهِبِ وَالْغُلاَمِ
titles.english: Chapter: The Story Of The People Of The Ditch And The Magician, The Monk And The Boy

titles.arabic: باب حَدِيثِ جَابِرٍ الطَّوِيلِ وَقِصَّةِ أَبِي الْيَسَرِ
titles.english: Chapter: The Lengthy Hadith Of Jabir And The Story Of Abu Al-Yasar

titles.arabic: باب فِي حَدِيثِ الْهِجْرَةِ وَيُقَالُ لَهُ حَدِيثُ الرَّحْلِ
titles.english: Chapter: The Hadith Of The Hijrah

titles.arabic: باب فِي قَوْلِهِ تَعَالَى ‏ {‏ أَلَمْ يَأْنِ لِلَّذِينَ آمَنُوا أَنْ تَخْشَعَ قُلُوبُهُمْ لِذِكْرِ اللَّهِ}
titles.english: Chapter: Allah's Saying: "Has Not The Time Come For The Hearts Of Those Who Believe To Be Affected By Allah's Reminder"

titles.arabic: باب فِي قَوْلِهِ تَعَالَى ‏ {‏خُذُوا زِينَتَكُمْ عِنْدَ كُلِّ مَسْجِدٍ}
titles.english: Chapter: Allah's Saying: "O Children Of Adam! Take Your Adornment While Praying"

titles.arabic: باب فِي قَوْلِهِ تَعَالَى ‏ {‏وَلاَ تُكْرِهُوا فَتَيَاتِكُمْ عَلَى الْبِغَاءِ}
titles.english: Chapter: Allah's Saying: "And Force Not Your Maids To Prostitution"

titles.arabic: باب فِي قَوْلِهِ تَعَالَى ‏ {‏ أُولَئِكَ الَّذِينَ يَدْعُونَ يَبْتَغُونَ إِلَى رَبِّهِمْ الْوَسِيلَةَ}
titles.english: Chapter: Allah's Saving: "Those Whom They Call Upon Desire Means Of Access To Their Lord (Allah)"

titles.arabic: باب فِي سُورَةِ بَرَاءَةَ وَالأَنْفَالِ وَالْحَشْرِ
titles.english: Chapter: Sural Baraah (Ar-Tawbah), Al-Anfal And Al-Hashr

titles.arabic: باب فِي نُزُولِ تَحْرِيمِ الْخَمْرِ
titles.english: Chapter: Revelation Of The Prohibition On Khamr

titles.arabic: باب فِي قَوْلِهِ تَعَالَى ‏ {‏هَذَانِ خَصْمَانِ اخْتَصَمُوا فِي رَبِّهِمْ}
titles.english: Chapter: Allah's Saying: "These Two Opponents Dispute With Each Other About Their Lord"

titles.arabic: باب صَلاَةِ الْمُسَافِرِينَ وَقَصْرِهَا ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The travelers’ prayer and shortening it

titles.arabic: باب قَصْرِ الصَّلاَةِ بِمِنًى ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Shortening the prayer in Mina

titles.arabic: باب الصَّلاَةِ فِي الرحَالِ فِي الْمَطَرِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Praying in dwellings when it is raining

titles.arabic: باب جَوَازِ صَلاَةِ النَّافِلَةِ عَلَى الدَّابَّةِ فِي السَّفَرِ حَيْثُ تَوَجَّهَتْ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: It is permissible to offer voluntary prayers atop one’s mount when travelling, no matter what direction it is facing

titles.arabic: باب جَوَازِ الْجَمْعِ بَيْنَ الصَّلاَتَيْنِ فِي السَّفَرِ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: It is permissible to combine two prayers when traveling

titles.arabic: باب الْجَمْعِ بَيْنَ الصَّلاَتَيْنِ فِي الْحَضَرِ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: Joining two prayers when not traveling

titles.arabic: باب جَوَاز الاِنْصِرَافِ مِنَ الصَّلاَةِ عَنِ الْيَمِينِ، وَالشِّمَالِ‏
titles.english: Chapter: It is permissible to leave to the right or left after finishing the prayer

titles.arabic: باب اسْتِحْبَابِ يَمِينِ الإِمَامِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: It is recommended to stand to the right of the Imam

titles.arabic: باب كَرَاهَةِ الشُّرُوعِ فِي نَافِلَةٍ بَعْدَ شُرُوعِ الْمُؤَذِّنِ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: It is disliked to start a voluntary prayer after the Mu’adhdhin has started to say Iqamah for prayer, whether that is a regular sunnah, such as the sunnah of Subh or Zuhr, or anything else, and regardless of whether he knows that he will catch up with the rak`ah with the Imam or not

titles.arabic: باب مَا يَقُولُ إِذَا دَخَلَ الْمَسْجِدَ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: What to say when entering the masjid

titles.arabic: باب اسْتِحْبَابِ تَحِيَّةِ الْمَسْجِدِ بِرَكْعَتَيْنِ وَكَرَاهَةِ الْجُلُوسِ قَبْلَ صَلاَتِهِمَا وَأَنَّهَا مَشْرُوعَةٌ فِي جَمِيعِ الأَوْقَاتِ
titles.english: Chapter: It is recommended to greet the masjid by praying two rak`ah, and it is disliked to sit before praying these two rak`ah, and this is prescribed at all times

titles.arabic: باب اسْتِحْبَابِ الرَّكْعَتَيْنِ فِي الْمَسْجِدِ لِمَنْ قَدِمَ مِنْ سَفَرٍ أَوَّلَ قُدُومِهِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: It is recommended to pray two rak`ah in the masjid for one who has come from a journey, when he first arrives

titles.arabic: باب اسْتِحْبَابِ صَلاَةِ الضُّحَى وَأَنَّ أَقَلَّهَا رَكْعَتَانِ وَأَكْمَلَهَا ثَمَانِ رَكَعَاتٍ وَأَوْسَطَهَا أَرْبَعُ رَكَعَاتٍ أَوْ سِتٌّ وَالْحَثِّ عَلَى الْمُحَافَظَةِ عَلَيْهَا
titles.english: Chapter: It is recommended to pray Duha, the least of which is two rak`ah, the best of which is eight, and the average of which is four or six, and encouragement to do so regularly

titles.arabic: باب اسْتِحْبَابِ رَكْعَتَيْ سُنَّةِ الْفَجْرِ وَالْحَثِّ عَلَيْهِمَا وَتَخْفِيفِهِمَا وَالْمُحَافَظَةِ عَلَيْهِمَا وَبَيَانِ مَا يُسْتَحَبُّ أَنْ يُقْرَأَ فِيهِمَا
titles.english: Chapter: It is recommended to pray two rak`ah for the sunnah of Fajr. And encouragement to pray them regularly, and to make them brief, and to persist in offering them, and clarifying what is recommended to recite therein

titles.arabic: باب فَضْلِ السُّنَنِ الرَّاتِبَةِ قَبْلَ الْفَرَائِضِ وَبَعْدَهُنَّ وَبَيَانِ عَدَدِهِنَّ
titles.english: Chapter: The virtue of the regular sunnah prayers before and after the obligatory prayers, and their numbers

titles.arabic: باب جَوَازِ النَّافِلَةِ قَائِمًا وَقَاعِدًا وَفِعْلِ بَعْضِ الرَّكْعَةِ قَائِمًا وَبَعْضِهَا قَاعِدًا ‏
titles.english: Chapter: It is permissible to offer voluntary prayers standing or sitting, and to stand and sit in the same rak`ah

titles.arabic: باب صَلاَةِ اللَّيْلِ وَعَدَدِ رَكَعَاتِ النَّبِيِّ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ فِي اللَّيْلِ وَأَنَّ الْوِتْرَ رَكْعَةٌ وَأَنَّ الرَّكْعَةَ صَلاَةٌ صَحِيحَةٌ
titles.english: Chapter: Night prayers and the number of rak`ah offered by the Prophet (saws) at night, and that Witr is one rak`ah, and a one-rak`ah prayer is correct

titles.arabic: باب جَامِعِ صَلاَةِ اللَّيْلِ وَمَنْ نَامَ عَنْهُ أَوْ مَرِضَ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: Night prayer, and the one who sleeps and misses it or is sick

titles.arabic: باب صَلاَةُ الأَوَّابِينَ حِينَ تَرْمَضُ الْفِصَالُ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: Salat al-Awwabin (the prayer of the penitent) is when the young camels feel the heat of the hot sand

titles.arabic: باب صَلاَةُ اللَّيْلِ مَثْنَى مَثْنَى وَالْوِتْرُ رَكْعَةٌ مِنْ آخِرِ اللَّيْلِ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: The night prayers are two by two, and Witr is one rakah at the end of the night

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ خَافَ أَنْ لاَ يَقُومَ مِنْ آخِرِ اللَّيْلِ فَلْيُوتِرْ أَوَّلَهُ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: One who fears that he will not get up at the end of the night, then he should pray Witr at the beginning of the night

titles.arabic: باب أَفْضَلُ الصَّلاَةِ طُولُ الْقُنُوتِ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: The best prayer is that in which one stands for a long time (tuwlul-qunut)

titles.arabic: باب فِي اللَّيْلِ سَاعَةٌ مُسْتَجَابٌ فِيهَا الدُّعَاءُ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: In the night there is an hour when supplications are answered

titles.arabic: باب التَّرْغِيبِ فِي الدُّعَاءِ وَالذِّكْرِ فِي آخِرِ اللَّيْلِ وَالإِجَابَةِ فِيهِ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: Encouragement to supplicate and recite statements of remembrance at the end of the night, and the response to that

titles.arabic: باب التَّرْغِيبِ فِي قِيَامِ رَمَضَانَ وَهُوَ التَّرَاوِيحُ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: Encouragement to pray qiyam during Ramadan, which is Tarawih

titles.arabic: باب الدُّعَاءِ فِي صَلاَةِ اللَّيْلِ وَقِيَامِهِ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: The prayer and the supplication of the Prophet (saws) at night

titles.arabic: باب اسْتِحْبَابِ تَطْوِيلِ الْقِرَاءَةِ فِي صَلاَةِ اللَّيْلِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: It is recommended to recite for a long time in the night prayers

titles.arabic: باب مَا رُوِيَ فِيمَنْ، نَامَ اللَّيْلَ أَجْمَعَ حَتَّى أَصْبَحَ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: Encouragement to pray at night even if it is little

titles.arabic: باب اسْتِحْبَابِ صَلاَةِ النَّافِلَةِ فِي بَيْتِهِ وَجَوَازِهَا فِي الْمَسْجِدِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: It is recommended to offer voluntary prayers in one’s house although it is permissible to offer them in the masjid

titles.arabic: باب فَضِيلَةِ الْعَمَلِ الدَّائِمِ مِنْ قِيَامِ اللَّيْلِ وَغَيْرِهِ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: The virtue of a deed that is done persistently, whether it be Qiyam al-Lail or anything else. The command to be moderate in worship, which means adopting what one can persist in. The command to the one who gets tired or weary when praying to stop until that feeling passes

titles.arabic: باب أَمْرِ مَنْ نَعَسَ فِي صَلاَتِهِ أَوِ اسْتَعْجَمَ عَلَيْهِ الْقُرْآنُ أَوِ الذِّكْرُ بِأَنْ يَرْقُدَ أَوْ يَقْعُدَ حَتَّى يَذْهَبَ عَنْهُ ذَلِكَ
titles.english: Chapter: The command to one who becomes sleepy while praying, or who starts to falter in his recitation of the Qur’an or statements of remembrance, to lie down or sit down until that goes away

titles.arabic: باب فَضَائِلِ الْقُرْآنِ وَمَا يَتَعَلَّقُ بِهِ
titles.english: Chapter: The book of the virtues of the Qur’an etc

titles.arabic: باب الأَمْرِ بِتَعَهُّدِ الْقُرْآنِ وَكَرَاهَةِ قَوْلِ نَسِيتُ آيَةَ كَذَا. وَجَوَازِ قَوْلِ أُنْسِيتُهَا
titles.english: Chapter: The command to keep refreshing one’s knowledge of the Qur’an and that it is disliked to say I have forgotten such-and-such a verse, but it is permissible to say I have been caused to forget

titles.arabic: باب اسْتِحْبَابِ تَحْسِينِ الصَّوْتِ بِالْقُرْآنِ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: It is recommended to make one’s voice beautiful when reciting Qur’an

titles.arabic: باب ذِكْرِ قِرَاءَةِ النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم سُورَةَ الْفَتْحِ يَوْمَ فَتْحِ مَكَّةَ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Mentioning the recitation of the Prophet (saws) of Surat al-Fath on the day of the conquest of Makkah

titles.arabic: باب نُزُولِ السَّكِينَةِ لِقِرَاءَةِ الْقُرْآنِ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: The descent of tranquility (sakinah) when the Qur’an is recited

titles.arabic: باب فَضِيلَةِ حَافِظِ الْقُرْآنِ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: The virtue of the one who memorizes the Qur’an

titles.arabic: باب فَضْلِ الْمَاهِرِ بِالْقُرْآنِ وَالَّذِي يَتَتَعْتَعُ فِيهِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The virtue of the one who is skilled in reciting Qur’an and the one who falters in reciting

titles.arabic: باب اسْتِحْبَابِ قِرَاءَةِ الْقُرْآنِ عَلَى أَهْلِ الْفَضْلِ وَالْحُذَّاقِ فِيهِ وَإِنْ كَانَ الْقَارِئُ أَفْضَلَ مِنَ الْمَقْرُوءِ عَلَيْهِ
titles.english: Chapter: It is recommended to recite the Qur’an to people of virtue who are skilled in its recitation, even if the reciter is better than the one to whom it is recited

titles.arabic: باب فَضْلِ اسْتِمَاعِ الْقُرْآنِ وَطَلَبِ الْقِرَاءَةِ مِنْ حَافِظِهِ لِلاِسْتِمَاعِ وَالْبُكَاءِ عِنْدَ الْقِرَاءَةِ وَالتَّدَبُّرِ
titles.english: Chapter: The virtue of listening to the Qur’an, asking one who has memorized it to recite so that one may listen, weeping when reciting, and pondering the meanings

titles.arabic: باب فَضْلِ قِرَاءَةِ الْقُرْآنِ فِي الصَّلاَةِ وَتَعَلُّمِهِ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: The virtue of reciting the Qur’an in prayer and learning it

titles.arabic: باب فَضْلِ قِرَاءَةِ الْقُرْآنِ وَسُورَةِ الْبَقَرَةِ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: The virtue of reciting the Qur’an and Surat al-Baqarah

titles.arabic: اب فَضْلِ الْفَاتِحَةِ وَخَوَاتِيمِ سُورَةِ الْبَقَرَةِ وَالْحَثِّ عَلَى قِرَاءَةِ الآيَتَيْنِ مِنْ آخِرِ الْبَقَرَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: The virtue of al-Fatihah and the closing verse of Surat al-Baqarah; and the encouragement to recite the two verses at the end of Surat al-Baqarah

titles.arabic: باب فَضْلِ سُورَةِ الْكَهْفِ وَآيَةِ الْكُرْسِيِّ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: The virtue of Surat al-Kahf and Ayat al-Kursi

titles.arabic: باب فَضْلِ قِرَاءَةِ ‏ {‏ قُلْ هُوَ اللَّهُ أَحَدٌ‏} ‏ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: The virtue of reciting Qul Huwa Allahu Ahad

titles.arabic: باب فَضْلِ قِرَاءَةِ الْمُعَوِّذَتَيْنِ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: The virtue of reciting al-Mu`awwidhatain (the two surahs seeking refuge with Allah)

titles.arabic: باب فَضْلِ مَنْ يَقُومُ بِالْقُرْآنِ وَيُعَلِّمُهُ وَفَضْلِ مَنْ تَعَلَّمَ حِكْمَةً مِنْ فِقْهٍ أَوْ غَيْرِهِ فَعَمِلَ بِهَا وَعَلَّمَهَا
titles.english: Chapter: The virtue of one who acts in accordance with the Qur’an and teaches it. And the virtue of one who learns wisdom from Fiqh or other types of knowledge, then acts upon it and teaches it

titles.arabic: باب بَيَانِ أَنَّ الْقُرْآنَ عَلَى سَبْعَةِ أَحْرُفٍ وَبَيَانِ مَعْنَاهُ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: The clarification that the Qur’an was revealed in seven ahruf (modes of recitation), and clarifying its meaning

titles.arabic: باب تَرْتِيلِ الْقِرَاءَةِ وَاجْتِنَابِ الْهَذِّ وَهُوَ الإِفْرَاطُ فِي السُّرْعَةِ وَإِبَاحَةِ سُورَتَيْنِ فَأَكْثَرَ فِي الرَّكْعَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: Slow, measured pace of recitation (tartil), and to not rush when reciting, and the permissibility of reciting two or more surahs in one rak`ah

titles.arabic: باب مَا يَتَعَلَّقُ بِالْقِرَاءَاتِ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: Concerning various recitations

titles.arabic: باب الأَوْقَاتِ الَّتِي نُهِيَ عَنِ الصَّلاَةِ، فِيهَا ‏.‏
titles.english: Chapter: The times when it is forbidden to offer salat

titles.arabic: باب إِسْلاَمِ عَمْرِو بْنِ عَبَسَةَ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: How `Amr bin `Abasah became Muslim

titles.arabic: باب لاَ تَتَحَرَّوْا بِصَلاَتِكُمْ طُلُوعَ الشَّمْسِ وَلاَ غُرُوبَهَا ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Do not aim to pray when the sun is rising or setting

titles.arabic: باب مَعْرِفَةِ الرَّكْعَتَيْنِ اللَّتَيْنِ كَانَ يُصَلِّيهِمَا النَّبِيُّ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ بَعْدَ الْعَصْرِ
titles.english: Chapter: Concerning the two rak`ah that the Prophet (saws) used to pray after `Asr

titles.arabic: باب اسْتِحْبَابِ رَكْعَتَيْنِ قَبْلَ صَلاَةِ الْمَغْرِبِ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: It is recommended to pray two rak`ah before Maghrib

titles.arabic: باب بَيْنَ كُلِّ أَذَانَيْنِ صَلاَةٌ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: Between every two calls, there is a prayer

titles.arabic: باب صَلاَةِ الْخَوْفِ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: The fear prayer

titles.arabic: باب وُجُوبِ غُسْلِ الْجُمُعَةِ عَلَى كُلِّ بَالِغٍ مِنَ الرِّجَالِ وَبَيَانِ مَا أُمِرُوا بِهِ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: Ghusl on Friday is obligatory for all adult men, and clarifying what they were ordered regarding it

titles.arabic: باب الطِّيبِ وَالسِّوَاكِ يَوْمَ الْجُمُعَةِ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: Perfume and siwak on Fridays

titles.arabic: باب فِي الإِنْصَاتِ يَوْمَ الْجُمُعَةِ فِي الْخُطْبَةِ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: Listening attentively to the Khutbah on Friday

titles.arabic: باب فِي السَّاعَةِ الَّتِي فِي يَوْمِ الْجُمُعَةِ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: The (special) time that occurs on Friday

titles.arabic: باب فَضْلِ يَوْمِ الْجُمُعَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: The virtue of Friday

titles.arabic: باب هِدَايَةِ هَذِهِ الأُمَّةِ لِيَوْمِ الْجُمُعَةِ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: This Ummah has been guided to Friday

titles.arabic: باب فَضْلِ التَّهْجِيرِ يَوْمَ الْجُمُعَةِ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: The virtue of going out early on Friday

titles.arabic: باب فَضْلِ مَنِ اسْتَمَعَ وَأَنْصَتَ فِي الْخُطْبَةِ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: The virtue of one who remains silent and listens attentively during the khutbah

titles.arabic: باب صَلاَةِ الْجُمُعَةِ حِينَ تَزُولُ الشَّمْسُ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: Jumu`ah prayer is when the sun has passed its zenith

titles.arabic: باب ذِكْرِ الْخُطْبَتَيْنِ قَبْلَ الصَّلاَةِ وَمَا فِيهِمَا مِنَ الْجَلْسَةِ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: The two khutbah before the prayer, and sitting briefly in between them

titles.arabic: باب فِي قَوْلِهِ تَعَالَى: {وَإِذَا رَأَوْا تِجَارَةً أَوْ لَهْوًا انْفَضُّوا إِلَيْهَا وَتَرَكُوكَ قَائِمًا}
titles.english: Chapter: The verse: “And when they see some merchandise or some amusement they disperse headlong to it, and leave you standing”

titles.arabic: باب التَّغْلِيظِ فِي تَرْكِ الْجُمُعَةِ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: Stern warning against missing Jumu`ah

titles.arabic: باب تَخْفِيفِ الصَّلاَةِ وَالْخُطْبَةِ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: Keeping the prayer and khutbah short

titles.arabic: باب التَّحِيَّةِ وَالإِمَامُ يَخْطُبُ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: Greeting (prayers upon entering the masjid) while the Imam is preaching

titles.arabic: باب حَدِيثِ التَّعْلِيمِ فِي الْخُطْبَةِ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: The hadith about teaching during the khutbah

titles.arabic: باب مَا يُقْرَأُ فِي صَلاَةِ الْجُمُعَةِ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: What is to be recited in Jumu`ah prayer

titles.arabic: باب مَا يُقْرَأُ فِي يَوْمِ الْجُمُعَةِ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: What is to be recited on Friday

titles.arabic: باب الصَّلاَةِ بَعْدَ الْجُمُعَةِ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: Prayer after Jumu`ah

titles.arabic: باب ذِكْرِ إِبَاحَةِ خُرُوجِ النِّسَاءِ فِي الْعِيدَيْنِ إِلَى الْمُصَلَّى وَشُهُودِ الْخُطْبَةِ مُفَارِقَاتٌ لِلرِّجَالِ
titles.english: Chapter: It Is Permissible For Women To Go Out To The 'Id Prayer And Attend The Khutbah, Separated From The Men

titles.arabic: باب تَرْكِ الصَّلاَةِ قَبْلَ الْعِيدِ وَبَعْدَهَا فِي الْمُصَلَّى ‏
titles.english: Chapter: Not Offering Any Other Prayer, Before Or After The 'Id Prayer At The Musalla (Prayer-Place)

titles.arabic: باب مَا يُقْرَأُ بِهِ فِي صَلاَةِ الْعِيدَيْنِ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: What Is To Be Recited In The 'Id Prayer?

titles.arabic: باب الرُّخْصَةِ فِي اللَّعِبِ الَّذِي لاَ مَعْصِيَةَ فِيهِ فِي أَيَّامِ الْعِيدِ ‏
